Name: JCB India Ltd.
Description:
JCB is a leading manufacturer of Earthmoving and Construction equipment in India. It is a fully owned subsidiary of J.C Bamford Excavators UK and has Six state-of-the-art factories in India at Ballabgarh, Jaipur, Pune and Vadodara (Halol). JCB also has a Design centre at Pune which works on Domestic as well as Global projects.

All JCB factories in India operate to ‘One Global Quality’ and its Made in India
products are exported to over 135 countries. The company makes over 60+ products in ten categories. In addition to the iconic J Backhoe Loader, popular JCB products include Excavators, Wheel Loaders, Compactors, Telehandlers, Mini Excavators, Skid Steer Loaders and Access Platforms.

An embodiment of the Atmanirbhar Bharat programme, the company has built and supported a local supply chain for the manufacturing of its products in India. 

The JCB Backhoe Loader manufactured in India is indigenised to over 95%. Close to 380 world-class Indian suppliers are aligned to JCB’s group objectives and have grown along with the company through various supplier development and cluster initiatives. 

JCB India has a network of more than 65 dealers and over 700 outlets spread
throughout the country.

The company’s CSR initiatives reach out to communities which include – Women, Adolescent Girls, Children, Rural Artisans and Youth.

Name: Netafim
Description:
Orbia’s Precision Agriculture business Netafim is the world’s largest irrigation company and a global leader in precision agriculture solutions committed to fight scarcity of food, water and land, for a sustainable future.

Founded in 1965, Netafim pioneered the drip revolution, creating a paradigm shift toward precision irrigation. Today, specializing in end-to-end solutions from the water source to the root zone, Netafim delivers irrigation and greenhouse projects as well as landscape and mining irrigation solutions supported by engineering, project management and financing services. Netafim is also leading the way in digital farming, irrigation and fertigation, integrating real-time monitoring, analysis and automated control into one state-of-the-art system. 

With 33 subsidiaries, 19 manufacturing plants, 2 recycling plants and over 5,000 employees worldwide, Netafim’s tailor-made irrigation and fertigation solutions reach millions of farmers, allowing smallholders to large-scale agricultural producers across 110 countries to grow more with less

Name: Grupo Tracbel
Description:
O Grupo Tracbel é uma das empresas responsáveis por munir o mercado brasileiro de máquinas, equipamentos e veículos essenciais para o crescimento do Brasil. 

Contamos com 40 filiais distribuídas pelo território brasileiro, oferecendo soluções de produtos e serviços para os mais diversos segmentos, principalmente mineração, construção, pedreiras e agregados, florestal e rodoviário. 

Somos referência, especialmente por nosso grande diferencial: foco no suporte ao cliente e no pós-venda. Acreditamos que este é o caminho para garantir a melhor solução na compra dos equipamentos e veículos, com uma assistência técnica de qualidade e agilidade. 

Com 1.500 funcionários, se destaca por seu vanguardismo em novas tecnologias, assistência técnica e em inovações na área de máquinas pesadas e veículos. 

A empresa é reconhecida nacionalmente por suas ações inovadoras e a excelência em pós-venda, oferecendo máquinas avançada, assistência técnica de alta qualidade e soluções criativas para aumentar a rentabilidade da operação dos clientes.

Name: Komatsu South Africa Pty Ltd
Description:
Komatsu was founded in Komatsu City in 1921. Komatsu built its first crawler tractor more than 65 years ago and has since developed the world’s most extensive range of earthmoving, mining, construction and utility equipment.
 
Komatsu now offers a full product line up with quality parts and reliable service to meet all our customers’ needs in the earthmoving industries.
 
Komatsu products are directly marketed, serviced and supported throughout Southern Africa.

Our Vision 
Is to be the leading Earthmoving equipment company in Southern Africa, with the highest level of product support and value add to our customers' business.

Name: Kepler Weber
Description:
Com fábricas no Rio Grande do Sul e no Mato Grosso do Sul, a Kepler Weber atua no setor de agronegócios, na etapa pós-colheita da cadeia produtiva de grãos. A Companhia fabrica equipamentos para a armazenagem, beneficiamento e movimentação de granéis, sendo especializada no desenvolvimento de soluções completas em armazenagem para seus clientes. Nosso portfólio de produtos é constituído por silos metálicos, transportadores horizontais e verticais, secadores e máquinas de limpeza de grãos.

Owner of manufacturing plants in the states of Rio Grande do Sul and Mato Grosso do Sul, both in Brazil, Kepler Weber operates in the agribusiness area, covering post-crop procedures in the grain production chain. The company manufactures equipments for grain storage, cleaning and conveyance, beeing specializing in complete grain storage solutions. Our portfolio includes steel silos, horizontal and vertical conveyors, grain dryers and grain cleaning machines.

Con fábricas en los estados de Rio Grande do Sul y en Mato Grosso do Sul, los dos en Brasil, Kepler Weber actúa en el sector de agronegocios, en la etapa postcosecha de la cadena productiva de granos. La compañía fabrica equipos para el almacenamiento, beneficio y movimiento de cargas de granos, siendo especializada en el desarrollo de soluciones completas en almacenamiento. Nuestro portfolio de productos está constituido por silos metálicos, transportadores horizontales y verticales, secadoras y máquinas de limpieza de granos.

Name: Samunnati
Description:
India’s largest agri enterprise, Samunnati is an open agri network to unlock the trillion-dollar plus potential of Indian agriculture with smallholder farmers at the center of it. 

Staying true to its name, Samunnati stands for collective growth & collective prosperity for the agri ecosystem. Serving the entire value chain, Samunnati’s Agri Commerce and Agri Finance solutions enable affiliated Farmer Collectives and the larger ecosystem to be more efficient and productive through multiple technology enabled interventions and collaborative partnerships.

Headquartered in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India, Samunnati has a presence in more than 100 agri value chains spread over 22 states in India and has powered over $1Bn of gross transaction value in its journey so far. Samunnati currently has access to 1500+ Farmer Collectives with a member base of over 6 million farmers and envisions impacting 1 in every 4 farming households through its network by 2027.

Name: Komatsu Africa Holdings (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Our roots stretch back more than 100 years to a lush forest near Komatsu City in Ishikawa Prefecture, Japan that was once home to a copper mine vital to the surrounding community. The mine’s closure in 1920 could have meant the end for community residents dependent on the jobs, but instead it was a new beginning. 
 
The owner of the mine and our founder, Meitaro Takeuchi, was an entrepreneur with an extraordinary humanitarian vision, committed to enhancing the community’s quality of life, developing future generations and growing with society. Determined to bring industrial technology to his country, Takeuchi created a new company by nurturing the skills of the people in the local community.
For a century, Komatsu has been by your side, with dantotsu quality, reliability, insights and support. Through manufacturing and technology innovation, we partner with you to create the solutions needed for a sustainable future where people, businesses and our planet thrive together.

Komatsu products are directly marketed, serviced and supported throughout Southern Africa.

Name: Action Construction Equipment Ltd.
Description:
Incorporated in 1995, ACE India’s leading material handling and construction equipment manufacturing company. With a dominant market share of around 63%, ACE is the No. 1 crane manufacturer in India and the world’s largest manufacturer in pick and carry cranes category. Committed to “Lifting India’s Growth”, the company is continuously striving towards offering innovative products integrated with excellent customer service and a robust sales and support network across the globe. ACE R&D Center based at Faridabad is fully equipped with modern facilities, dedicated to the development and speedy commercialization of globally competitive products. 

With 8 state-of-the-art fully-equipped manufacturing facilities located in Faridabad (Haryana), ACE has a manufacturing capacity of 12000 construction equipment & 9000 tractors annually. Our impressive product portfolio is divided into four major categories, including Agri-equipment, Construction Equipment, Road Construction & Earth Moving Machinery Equipment. After creating an impressive portfolio of 15000+ customers across India, ACE is steadily expanding its global footprints by exporting its products to around 20 countries around the world, majorly catering to Asia Pacific, Africa & Latin America regions. 

Today ACE employs around 2700 people and the company has its dedicated Training center based at Faridabad. It is one of India’s most awarded company and recognized as India’s Top 100 Wealth Creators by the prestigious Fortune Magazine.

The company has a pan-India robust aftersales service network of dealers and area offices which operate out of around 100+ locations and are supported by 21 regional offices based at key Tier-I and Tier-II cities. 

The company believes in giving back to society and is committed to CSR through its Emergency Response Services providing 24X7 free emergency response services in the districts of Palwal and Faridabad (Haryana).

Name: LiuGong Latin America
Description:
For more than 65 years, LiuGong has been a leader in China’s construction equipment manufacturing industry. From building its first wheel loader in 1966, LiuGong has evolved to become one of the fastest growing and global companies in the world, offering comprehensive tough and intuitive machines for customers worldwide. LiuGong delivers opportunities to its employees, quality products and services to its customers, financial success to its investors and community support in the regions it serves.
The company started with the arrival of 500 workers in Liuzhou, China in 1958. Today, LiuGong is a global success story with 30+ product lines, 20+ global manufacturing facilities, over 16,000 employees and 500+ dealers, offering customers the tough equipment they need to get any job done, anywhere. All with local excellent support.

Name: VST Tillers Tractors Ltd
Description:
VST Tillers Tractors Limited. was established in the year 1967 by the VST Group of companies. With a legacy of more than 55 years, VST continues to drive farm mechanization and empowerment of Indian farmers. VST Tillers Tractors Ltd is one of the fastest-growing brands in the agriculture segment and commands a leadership position in power tillers with more than 70 % Market share and pioneer in 4WD compact tractors segment and is amongst the leading producers of the other category of Tractors, Engines, Transmission, Power Reaper, and Precision Components. VST also exports products to European, Asian, and African markets. VST Tractors are marketed under the ‘FIELDTRAC’ brand in various markets of the European Union meeting the latest EU standards.

The company crossed the milestone of Rs. 1000 crore revenue during FY 2022-23 and is on track to become a Rs. 3000 crore global brand in diversified farm mechanization products and solutions in 2026, as per their 5X Vision. 

The group is also focused on Greener Tomorrow and sustainability projects and working with a US group on electric tractors. With swift changes on the technological front and digitalization, the group is exploring best practices in logistics, fintech, and other digital applications enabling all sections for smarter decisions.

Name: Pellenc Group
Description:
Depuis 1973, PELLENC imagine, produit et commercialise des outils et des machines permettant aux viticulteurs, arboriculteurs et professionnels de l’entretien des espaces verts et urbains de faciliter leur travail, au quotidien.

Une démarche qui s’articule autour de trois grandes idées :
1. La productivité : les outils PELLENC permettent d’être plus rapide, plus efficace, plus performant, quelle que soit la tâche effectuée.

2. La réduction de la pénibilité du travail : l’ergonomie, le confort et la facilité d’utilisation sont au centre de nos préoccupations.

3. Le respect de la nature : nous élaborons des produits qui prennent soin du végétal, et des solutions durables qui aident à préserver les ressources naturelles.

Pour conjuguer performance, respect de l’humain et de l’environnement, PELLENC s’appuie sur une force qui a marqué son histoire : sa capacité d’innovation. Avec passion et énergie, les femmes et les hommes de PELLENC cherchent sans cesse de nouvelles idées pour valoriser le travail de l’Homme dans la nature.

Name: TSH Resources Berhad
Description:
TSH Group (“the Group”) has come a long way from its humble beginnings in the cocoa business. At the time it was listed on the Kuala Lumpur Stock Exchange in 1994, it had already established itself as a major player in the cocoa industry in Malaysia, namely, the single largest exporter of cocoa beans and products in the country. Not content to rest on its laurels, the Group ventured into the oil palm industry in Sabah in the 1990s and subsequently in Kalimantan and Sumatera, Indonesia in the 2000s.

Today, the Group is principally engaged in oil palm cultivation and processing of Fresh Fruit Bunches (“FFB”) into Crude Palm Oil (“CPO”) and Palm Kernel (“PK”).

Name: Desert Control
Description:
Desert Control is a company specialized in climate-smart agri-tech solutions to combat desertification, soil degradation, and water scarcity. Its patented Liquid Natural Clay restores and protects soil, reducing water usage for agriculture, forests, and green landscapes. 

Liquid Natural Clay (LNC) enables sand and degraded soil to retain water and nutrients. LNC increases crop yields, biomass production, and carbon uptake, while reducing water and fertilizer consumption by up to 50%.

Our vision is to Make Earth Green Again.

Climate change and global warming degrade soil and land, causing deserts to spread and temperatures to rise further in a vicious circle.

1. Twelve million hectares of productive land are lost every year due to desertification and drought.

2. By 2025, 1.8 billion people will suffer absolute water scarcity, and 2/3 of the world will experience water-stressed conditions.

3. Restoring the soils of degraded ecosystems has the potential to store up to 3 billion tons of CO2 annually.

Restoring and protecting fertile soil and green land enable better utilization of scarce resources and combat global warming. 

Reducing world hunger and poverty through sustainable use of land and water can secure global economic growth and the prosperity of nature, people, and planet.

Name: Sickle Innovations Private Limited
Description:
The seeds for Sickle Innovations were sown at the Indian Institute of Science and the company, founded in 2013, was established in 2014 with the gracious support of IIM Ahmedabad’s business incubator, Centre for Innovation Incubation and Entrepreneurship (CIIE).

We automate farm operations with sensible technologies. Our business model is simple, we carefully pick problems in the orchards which are caused by the shortage of skill, then we solve it with appropriate pieces of technology. On India’s micro-farms, we feel that these problems of non-availability of labour, low profits, labour drudgery are all equally solvable with prudent design and technology intervention.

Our core focus is to design and develop products that solve real farm problems with clear unit economics that help farmers reduce costs, eliminate drudgery, cut losses and ultimately generate profits.

Rotary Tillers, Plows, Harrows, No Till Drills, Cutters, Slashers, Laser Levelers, Sprayers, Spreaders, Multi Crop Harvesters, Balers, Mulchers, Flail Mowers and Trailers being the mainstay of our production. With 3 State of the art Manufacturing facilities spanning 45 Acres, We Help Farmers FEED The World.

Trade Smarter. Grow Faster. Accelerate Impact.

Name: Unifert Misr- Samtrade
Description:
Unifert Misr-Samtrade, established in 1976, is a leading provider of comprehensive solutions for Egyptian agriculture. We empower farmers by offering:

Name: PlantWorx Construction Exhibition 2025
Description:
PlantWorx is a Construction Equipment Association (CEA) event, organised ‘for the industry by the industry.’

Since its inaugural show in 2013, PlantWorx has established itself as a strong base to do business. Combining live demonstrations and the latest in construction equipment and technology, PlantWorx delivers a vibrant visitor experience that educates, entertains and engages today’s construction professionals, celebrates industry achievements and inspires the next generation of owners, operators and engineers. 

Bringing together key players and thought leaders, it prepares visitors for the emerging trends and topics that will bring the construction industry into the future, including new technologies that are changing the face of the construction landscape.

Held at the Newark Showground, PlantWorx 2025 will provide extensive outdoor facilities for live-working demonstrations of exhibitors’ plant, machinery and services facilities.

Exhibitors can expect to see visitors from across the sector, including decision makers and innovators from key infrastructure projects, plant hire companies looking to expand their fleet, contractors, construction site managers, local authorities, government agencies and many more.

Why exhibit at PlantWorx 2025:

➤ PlantWorx will be the largest working construction event in the UK in 2025
➤ Three days of live demonstration
➤ New “Dig and Demo” stands spread around the showground 
➤ Meeting space for events and presentations
➤ Hard standing outdoor walkways, a bigger car park, and good site access

Ozmen Equipment Inc. is an Ontario based wholesale distributor of new high-quality replacement parts earth moving machines.

We have thousands of parts available in our vast inventory and we offer worldwide shipping with 25 years of experience in the international market, our hardworking and dedicated team aims to consistently offer our customers the best service at the greatest possible value. Name: AgriFuture Africa
Description:
AgriFuture Africa is a forward-thinking agricultural consultancy driving transformation across Africa’s food and farming systems through innovation, data, and strategic expertise. Headquartered in Kenya, we deliver professional services that empower farmers, agribusinesses, development organizations, and public institutions to achieve sustainable growth and measurable impact.

Our work is anchored in six core pillars that define our approach and value to partners:

Field Research & Data Services – Conducting baseline surveys, feasibility studies, impact assessments, and comprehensive field data collection. We analyze and present data into actionable insights that guide decision-making and inform agricultural policy and investment.

Farm Management Services – Providing end-to-end support from farm planning, enterprise design, and production optimization to agribusiness development and market access.

Capacity Building & Training – Strengthening farmer, youth, and institutional capacity through hands-on training, workshops, and mentorship in sustainable agriculture and agri-entrepreneurship.

Sustainability & Policy Advisory – Supporting partners in developing strategies and frameworks for climate resilience, resource efficiency, and alignment with the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

Innovation & AgriTech Integration – Applying digital tools, AI, and modern technology to optimize production systems, improve data flow, and enhance agribusiness performance.

Communication & Design for Agriculture – Translating complex data into compelling visuals, reports, and media products that enhance visibility, influence, and knowledge sharing in the agricultural space.

Our multidisciplinary team combines expertise in veterinary science, agronomy, data analytics, economics, IT, design, and communication, making AgriFuture Africa a trusted partner in research, implementation, and impact delivery.

We work with governments, NGOs, private investors, and grassroots enterprises.

Name: Australian Chicken Meat Federation (ACMF)
Description:
The Australian Chicken Meat Federation (ACMF) is the peak council for participants in the chicken meat industry in Australia.

The ACMF represents all elements of the industry from chicken growers and producers to suppliers and retailers and other associated entities in Australia.

The ACMF represents members in matters including animal health, biosecurity, food standards and safety, animal welfare, sustainability, workforce, trade and a range of other areas affecting the Australian chicken industry. 

The ACMF advocates for effective and strategic policy and standard setting, as well as supporting the chicken meat industry on existing and emerging issues and providing members with tools to build and grow their businesses so they remain competitive and profitable. 

The ACMF also supports the chicken meat industry by providing strategic direction to relevant research and development bodies and being a signatory to the Emergency Animal Disease Response Agreement and member of Animal Health Australia.

Name: PT. Sany Perkasa
Description: A fast growth company & sole distributor of SANY Brand for Excavators, Drilling Rig & Wheel loader products in Indonesia

Name: Saframax Industrial
Description:
Desde sua fundação em 2012, a Saframax está na vanguarda da produção de equipamentos que otimizam e maximizam a precisão do plantio.  Nossa equipe de engenharia e produção tem mais de 20 anos de experiência em pesquisa, desenvolvimento e fabricação de equipamentos eletromecânicos.
	Somos líderes no desenvolvimento de tecnologias e fabricação de sistemas para monitoramento da distribuição de sementes, pulverização e aplicação de líquidos no sulco de plantio para plantadeiras e semeadoras.
	A qualidade e praticidade de nossos produtos impulsionaram nossa expansão nacional e internacional. Nossos produtos são utilizados no Brasil e países vizinhos, com destaque para os equipamentos de aplicação precisa de inoculantes, nematicidas, micronutrientes, fungicidas, inseticidas e fertilizantes líquidos no sulco.
	Os produtos Saframax são precisos, duráveis e versáteis, características comuns encontradas apenas em equipamentos projetados de forma minuciosa e com conhecimento especializado. Por isso, a pesquisa e o desenvolvimento contínuo é o foco principal da Saframax que, trabalha em estreita colaboração com agricultores e instituições de pesquisa, mantendo-se atualizada com as mais recentes tecnologias agrícolas.
	Sempre com objetivo de inovar continuamente e garantir que sua gama de produtos evolua e dê suporte a novas técnicas e que proporcionem maior rendimento e sustentabilidade no campo.  Esta é a Saframax!

Name: Agrotonomy
Description:
Agrotonomy Corp. is a global leader in aeroponic vertical farming solutions, serving both commercial and residential markets.

We provide full turnkey vertical farming and greenhouse solutions, including on-site training in English, French, and Spanish. As pioneers in the industry, we have established aeroponic Tower Farms in over 50 countries across Europe, Asia, Africa, Australia, Central America, Polynesia, the Middle East, as well as throughout the United States, Canada, Mexico, and the West Indies.

Our projects span diverse environments: outdoor farms, indoor farms with LED lighting, rooftop farms, climate-controlled greenhouses, and even off-the-grid systems powered by solar energy. Each year, we travel to around 20 countries to supervise Tower Farm installations, deliver consultation services, and provide hands-on training.

Beyond aeroponic vertical farming, Agrotonomy also offers greenhouse consultation, including the design and construction of fully climate-controlled facilities in extreme climates. We specialize in indoor vertical farming using LED-lit aeroponic towers and provide tailored consultation for these projects.

Our commitment goes further than development—we offer continuous support to clients worldwide. On the residential side, we make aeroponic towers accessible for home use, with thousands of satisfied customers growing fresh produce at home.

Agrotonomy also partners with NGOs and charities to fight food scarcity, supporting disadvantaged communities and orphanages with sustainable aeroponic farming solutions.

الياسمين جروب تأسست في عام 2004 كشركة مصرية رائدة في مجال الإنتاج الداجني، مع التزام راسخ بالبحث والتطوير وخدمة ما بعد البيع. على مر السنين، توسعت الشركة لتشمل مجالات متعددة، مما يعكس رؤيتنا الطموحة للنمو والتطور.
في عام 2012، أطلقنا شركة كايروفيد للأعلاف والمركزات لتلبية احتياجات مزارعنا وتوفير منتجات عالية الجودة للسوق المحلي. في عام 2014، بدأنا شراكة استراتيجية مع شركة بيج داتشمان الألمانية لتوزيع معدات مزارع الدواجن في مصر، مما عزز من قدراتنا التكنولوجية. في عام 2015، أضفنا إلى محفظتنا الإنتاجية كتاكيت عمر يوم واحد تحت العلامة التجارية (كايروفيد)، بطاقة إنتاجية سنوية تصل إلى 7 ملايين كتكوت. في عام 2018، وسعنا نطاق أعمالنا الزراعية بإطلاق شركة الياسمين للإنتاج الزراعي لإنتاج الخضروات والفاكهة الطازجة. في عام 2020، أطلقنا علامة “جالينا” للدواجن، لتقديم منتجات داجنية متميزة تلبي احتياجات السوق المتنامية

Description:
AGRIORGANIC FARM Ltd is a youth led private company dedicated to promote organic farming techniques toward Sustainable Agriculture. Our mission is to empower farmers and communities by providing eco-friendly products that enhance soil fertility, protect crops, and ensure long-term agricultural sustainability. We are committed to improving food security and fostering  resilient agriculture to climate change, as a viable solution to modern agricultural challenges.
Our vision is to sustain and secure food system that promotes the health of humans and the environment. We aim to be a pioneering force in making organic farming practices accessible to all, while reducing dependence on chemical inputs and fostering a more sustainable food system. We produce nutrient-rich vermicompost made from biodagaradable waste materials. This high-quality organic fertilizer improves soil structure, enhances microbial activity, increases nutrient availability to plants, and promote circular economy. Vermicompost is essential to improve crop yield while maintaining soil health. It also supports sustainable agriculture by minimizing environmental impact and contributing to climate change mitigation efforts. We produce biopesticides from natural medicinal plants to control pests and diseases in crops. Our biopesticides are safe for the environment, non-toxic to humans and animals, and do not leave harmful residues on crops. It provides an effective alternative to chemical pesticides, promoting healthier farming practices and protecting ecosystems. We provide advisory/extension services to farmers on best organic farming practices, training in composting techniques, and the implementation of agroecological practices. We work closely with local farmers and NGOs to ensure Sustainable Agriculture. Through our products and services, we strive to contribute to a healthier, more sustainable future for agriculture and food system transformation leading to food security.

Name: Farm Safety Foundation (Yellow Wellies)
Description:
The Farm Safety Foundation (Yellow Wellies) is an independent registered charity (Registered Charity No. 1159000) set up in 2014 to preserve and protect the physical and mental wellbeing of the next generation of farmers. The charity helps to raise awareness of, and address the attitudes and behaviours around, risk-taking and poor mental health in the agricultural sector throughout the UK.

Agriculture continues to have the poorest safety record of any occupation in the UK accounting for 1% of the UK’s working population but 16% of all workplace deaths. 21 farm workers and 6 members of the public (including a child) lost their lives on GB farms in the past year according to the 2022/2023 HSE Fatal Injuries in Agriculture, Forestry & Fishing GB report. 

The charity doesn’t just raise awareness of farm safety, it is continuing to drive a real cultural change in attitudes and behaviours to risk-taking and poor mental health in the next generation of farmers through:
•	High quality training, learning and skills development - The award-winning Introduction to Farm Safety training sessions have been delivered to over 23,000 young farmers at land-based colleges and universities across the UK and through the young farmers clubs network.  
•	Working in partnership with key sector stakeholders, settings and groups to reduce risk taking and poor safety behaviours and provide support. 
•	Running campaigns (Farm Safety Week / Mind Your Head) to raise awareness, reduce stigma and increase help seeking
•	Sector-leading research into attitudes and behaviours to understand the risk factors around farm safety and poor mental health; and
•	Using this evidence to influence policy, practice and change

Through its ambitious education programme, resources, research and award-winning national campaigns, the charity is ensuring those making their journey into agriculture are equipped with the skills and confidence to live well and farm well.

អង្គរហ្រ្គីន បានបង្កើតឡើងជាផ្លូវការនៅខែសីហា ឆ្នាំ២០១១ ដែលបានធ្វើការចុះបញ្ជីអាជីវកម្មជាមួយក្រសួងពាណិជ្ជកម្មក្រោមអាជ្ញាប័ណ្ណលេខ Co. 1836KH/2011។ អង្គរហ្រ្គីន ធ្វើការផ្គត់ផ្គង់ជីថ្នាំកសិកម្ម ប្រព័ន្ធស្រោចស្រព ត្រាក់ទ័រនិងគ្រឿងយន្តកសិកម្ម។ បន្ថែមពីនេះយើងក៏មានផ្ដល់វគ្គបណ្ដុះបណ្ដាលបច្ចេកទេស ចែកចាយចំណី និងថ្នាំសត្វ ហើយក៏មានលក់វត្ថុធាតុដើមសម្រាប់កសិករក្នុងការផលិតចំណីសត្វដោយខ្លួនឯងផងដែរ។ យើងមិនមែនត្រឹមតែផ្គត់ផ្គង់ធាតុចូលកសិកម្មតែប៉ុណ្ណោះទេ គឺយើងក៏បានបង្កើតទីផ្សារប្រកួតប្រជែងសម្រាប់កសិករផងដែរក្រោមគម្រោង អេជីហ្វូត ដែលប្រមូលកសិផលពីកសិករ និងចែកចាយ ដើម្បីផ្សព្វផ្សាយពីសុវត្ថិភាពចំណីអាហារ។ បន្ថែមពីនេះគម្រោងនាំចេញ បានជួយក្នុងការផ្សព្វផ្សាយ និងនាំចេញនូវកសិផលមានគុណភាពតាមស្ដង់ដារទៅកាន់ទីផ្សារពិភពលោក។ នៅដើមឆ្នាំ ២០២១ យើងបានផ្ដើមសិក្សាអំពីការចែកចាយសម្ភារៈកសិកម្មបន្ថែមទៀតផងដែរ។

អង្គរហ្រ្គីន បានបង្កើតឡើងជាផ្លូវការនៅខែសីហា ឆ្នាំ២០១១ ដែលបានធ្វើការចុះបញ្ជីអាជីវកម្មជាមួយក្រសួងពាណិជ្ជកម្មក្រោមអាជ្ញាប័ណ្ណលេខ Co. 1836KH/2011។ អង្គរហ្រ្គីន ធ្វើការផ្គត់ផ្គង់ជីថ្នាំកសិកម្ម ប្រព័ន្ធស្រោចស្រង់ ត្រាក់ទ័ និងគ្រឿងយន្តកសិកម្ម។ បន្ថែមពីនេះយើងក៏មានផ្ដល់វគ្គបណ្ដុះបណ្ដាលបច្ចេកទេស ចែកចាយចំណី និងថ្នាំសត្វ ហើយក៏មានលក់វត្ថុធាតុដើមសម្រាប់កសិករក្នុងការផលិតចំណីសត្វដោយខ្លួនឯងផងដែរ។ យើងមិនមែនត្រឹមតែផ្គត់ផ្គង់ធាតុចូលកសិកម្មតែប៉ុណ្ណោះទេ យើងក៏បានបង្កើតទីផ្សារប្រកួតប្រជែងសម្រាប់កសិករផងដែរក្រោមគម្រោង អេជីហ្វូត ដែលប្រមូលកសិផលពីកសិករ និងចែកចាយ ដើម្បីផ្សព្វផ្សាយពីសុវត្ថិភាពចំណីអាហារ។ បន្ថែមពីនេះគម្រោងនាំចេញ បានជួយក្នុងការផ្សព្វផ្សាយ និងនាំចេញនូវកសិផលគុណភាពទៅកាន់ទីផ្សារពិភពលោក។ នៅដើមឆ្នាំ ២០២១ យើងបានផ្ដើមសិក្សាអំពីការចែកចាយសម្ភារកសិកម្មបន្ថែមទៀតផងដែរ។

Name: Pehle Jaisa
Description:
At Pehle Jaisa, we are decentralising organic fertilizer production. By integrating with waste centers (such as poultry, dairy, and bio CNG plants), we enable them to process waste at source level to produce organic fertilisers.

Our approach eliminates the first mile, which is the biggest cost in organic fertilizer manufacturing. This ensures higher quality at more competitive prices.

The produced fertilizer is then distributed to regional farmers, enhancing both the quantity and quality of their yields.

Name: Tcomx Agrotech Ventures Limited.
Description:
TCOMX Agrotech is an E-commerce enterprise focused on transitioning farmers to climate-smart agriculture with the use of precision agricultural equipment and certified seeds by making these inputs available and accessible locally.
Tcomx bridges the gap between foreign producers/ Companies and farmers in Africa, saving them time and resources spent in importing smaller units at high costs.

Tcomx is also involved in commodity trading of food and cash crops.

Name: National Animal Genetic Resources Centre & Data Bank (NAGRC&DB)
Description:
The Animal Breeding Act, 2001 established the National Animal Genetic Resources Centre & Data Bank as a statutory semi-autonomous body under the Ministry of Agriculture, Animal Industry and Fisheries in Uganda. Its  formation was part of the fulfillment of the aspirations in the National Animal Breeding Policy (1997), document and the Action Plan for its implementation providing guidelines to all actors in the animal breeding and production value-chain. The actors included input suppliers, farmers, companies, researchers, extension workers & civic leaders on suitable breeds for the various ecological and production systems. It also provided for alternative breeding programs; import, export & trade in genetic materials; breeding, management systems for conservation & sustainable use of indigenous genetic resources & use of modern breeding technologies in the country. NAGRC&DB was established with a two-fold mandate; to play a leading role in the commercialization of animal breeding activities in Uganda and to carry out development activities that enhance animal genetic improvement and productivity.
The entity operates 15 Government Animal Genetics Resource Centres strategically situated in the various Agro-ecological zones of Uganda to support animal production systems existing in those regions. The entity runs the only National Accredited Bull Stud in the country for semen production currently serving Uganda and other surrounding East Africa member states. It's Specialized Units; Conservation & Genebanking,Data Bank,National Pig Breeding Program Animal Feed Production, Apiculture,Poultry Development,National Small Ruminants Breeding Program,National Rabbits Breeding Program,Semen Production, Packaging, Storage & Distribution, Liquid Nitrogen Production & Distribution Unit,National Genetic Evaluation & Testing Centre,Assisted Reproductive Technologies,National Livestock Quarantine Centre, Community Based Breeding Program,Foundation Fish Broodstock & Fry Production.

The entity operates from 3 units from Chennai,  that offers a well-stocked warehouse and training center for distributors and customers for both heavy and light duty products. Flexco India manufactures and assembles Belt conveyor products and  mechanical belt fasteners. 

Flexco India believes in offering value-based solutions and also helps partner customers in increasing conveyor productivity. A strong sales and application team is available across India to help customers reduce downtime.

Name: SIAYA COUNTY GOVERNMENT(NAVCDP)
Description:
National Agricultural Value Chain Development Project (NAVCDP) is a five-year initiative between the Government of Kenya and World Bank. The Project builds on the strong foundation laid by KCSAP/NARGIP to transform the Agriculture sector by focusing on smallholder farmers either “in transition” or just “transited” from subsistence to commercial farming. The project objective is to increase market participation and enhance value addition for smallholder farmers in selected value chains in the project areas. 
The project envisages to deepen investments to scale up interventions around productivity enhancement, community led farmer extension, water management investments, data driven value chain services, support farmer led irrigation development especially at the individual farmer level, and enhance access to markets, credit and financial services.  
In Siaya County, the project is implemented in all thirty (30) wards across the six sub-counties. The project (NAVCDP) will use the community-driven and value chain development approach to strengthen agricultural value chains of tomato, chicken, apiculture, rice, and cotton.

Name: RockZone Americas
Description:
RockZone Americas, formerly Alpine-Rockwheel was founded in 1968 by Wilhelm Kogelmann, a native of Austria who came to study mining engineering at Penn State University and never left. Alpine has always been an innovator and has been involved with the development of numerous mining and construction machines such as roadheaders, mine planers, land mine clearing machines, hydraulic rock cutting attachments, and soil mixing attachments. We are proud of the role we have played in the development of infrastructure, defense, major engineering achievements, and clean-up of the environment. 

Rockzone Americas represents the world's best rock excavation, crushing and screening attachments from Rock.Zone, serving the global market with focus on North America, and works directly with customers as well as with equipment dealers. 

In 2023 Exodus Global a family-founded, privately owned company headquartered in Superior, Wisconsin took ownership of Rockzone Americas. Exodus Global companies also include BladeCore, Connect Work Tools, OilQuick Americas, and ShearCore.

Name: Poultry Industry Council
Description:
The Poultry Industry Council (PIC) is a non-profit organization that delivers poultry extension services and events for the betterment of the Ontario poultry industry, based in Guelph, Ontario.

The Poultry Industry Council (PIC) was officially formed in 1997, as the result of a merger between the Ontario Poultry Council and the Poultry Industry Centre. The activities of PIC are made possible through the efforts of a twelve person volunteer Board representing both producers and the poultry industry, along with the PIC staff members.

Our mission is to help poultry producers be more successful through the adoption of leading practices. We do this by facilitating relevant and practical translation of the latest research and information through effective education and extension services.

Come farm with AKAR.

Over the last three decades, SANY Group has grown and evolved into a global brand with a sales turnover of $21 billion in 2021. With three listed companies and a presence in 140 countries around the world, including global R&D and manufacturing facilities in India, Brazil, Germany and the USA, SANY's powerful machines are driving construction projects across the globe.

As the world's largest producer of Excavators, built in state of the art manufacturing plants, you can be confident in the quality and reliability of SANY machines.

Name: SoilWise Project
Description:
SoilWise is a project under the Soil Mission topic: Building the mission's knowledge repository and advancing the European Soil Observatory (EUSO). 
The overall objective of the SoilWise project is to make existing and new knowledge and data on soils easily findable, accessible, interoperable and reusable in a long-term knowledge and data repository powered by strategies for soil data and knowledge collection, processing, visualisation and exploitation, following a multi-actor co-design and co-validation processes with all key user groups and R&I (Research and Innovation) outcomes. 
The SoilWise repository and community are designed to be a joint starting point and common ground for countries, the European Commission and other stakeholders to jointly guide soil and related spatial policy and informed decision-making towards the 2030 goals of the Green Deal, achieve healthy soils in 2050 and ensure broad uptake and implementation by land managers, policy, research and industry.

Legal notice: The SoilWise project is funded by the EU Horizon program. It is not linked to and should not be confused with any of the commercial activities the Dutch company SOILWISE BV conducts under the same name via its website https://soilwise.nl/nl

Name: INJIN-Corpe Private limited
Description:
About INJIN-Corpe

INJIN-Corpe is an Indian engineering company shaping the future of sustainable machinery through the electrification of off-highway equipment. Founded in 2022 and headquartered in Gurugram, Haryana, we deliver fully electric solutions for the construction, agriculture, and mining industries—sectors long dependent on diesel-powered machines.

Our mission is to cut India’s off-highway carbon emissions by 15%, while reducing noise pollution and removing the hazards of fuel storage. By leveraging indigenous engineering, modular designs, and scalable processes, we aim to make clean technology accessible, practical, and affordable for both operators and OEMs.

Key Innovation

– MEX 1.0 Mini Electric Excavator: India’s first fully electric 1.2-ton mini excavator with zero emissions, ultra-low noise, 5–6 hours runtime, and fast charging.
– Versatile Applications: Compatible with multiple attachments for construction, agriculture, and mining.
– Built for Indian Conditions: Designed to perform seamlessly from –10°C to +60°C.

Our Unique Value

– Make in India, Design in India: Indigenous engineering with patented technologies.
– OEM Partnerships: Ready-to-use electric machines and modular conversion kits.
– Turnkey Solutions: Full R&D, engineering, component supply, and training under one roof.
– Global Collaboration: Partnerships with European developers and nationwide operator training programs.

Company Profile

– Incorporated: May 18, 2022
– Founders: Aashray & Anuj Nagpal
– Headquarters: Gurugram, Haryana, India
– Team Size: 2–10 employees
– Sectors: Construction | Agriculture | Mining | Electric Vehicles

Our Impact

We are the first Indian company to launch a fully electric mini excavator. INJIN-Corpe is scaling production and expanding globally, pioneering India’s zero-emission heavy equipment sector and enabling sustainable industrial growth.

Name: Modern Agriculture Technology Innovation Center (MATIC)
Description:
At MATIC (Modern Agriculture Technology Innovation Center), we are building India’s deep-tech post-harvest infrastructure—starting at the farm gate.

Our mission is simple yet powerful: to ensure that no farmer loses the value of their harvest due to infrastructure gaps, inefficiencies, or quality rejections. Every year, India loses nearly ₹40,000 crore worth of fruits and vegetables post-harvest. MATIC is changing this—one farm at a time.

We design and deploy mobile On-Farm Primary Processing Machines and AI-Based Grading Systems that transform the way fruits—especially mangoes—are handled after harvest. Our innovations perform de-sapping, cleaning, washing, drying, and AI grading directly at the farm, saving time, reducing losses, and ensuring that the right fruit reaches the right market.

 Our Impact
	•	 Reduced post-harvest losses by up to 30% in early deployments
	•	 Enabled on-site grading and processing for over 100+ farmers
	•	 Improved average farmer income by 20–35% by matching fruit quality to market demand
	•	 Enabled entry into export markets through global-grade quality standardization
	•	 Minimized carbon footprint by reducing multiple transport cycles and water usage in packhouses

We work closely with ICAR-CISH, FPOs, exporters, and aggregators to bridge the last-mile infrastructure gap and to scale our solutions across India, Asia and Africa. 

Let’s Collaborate
We’re always open to meaningful partnerships with:
 Farmers and FPOs seeking on-farm post-harvest processing solutions
 Exporters and aggregators in need of AI-based mango grading systems
 Researchers and institutions exploring post-harvest technologies
 Investors and enablers supporting rural deep-tech innovation
 Government bodies and NGOs aiming to scale AgriTech interventions

 Reach out to us
 Email: connect@matic.one
 Website: www.matic.one
 Based in Salem, Tamil Nadu – Operating PAN India

Name: National GET
Description:
Our high quality GET Kits have the following features:-

•	GET torque specs included with the hardware ensuring the fitters have the information on hand to correctly torque the mount bolts.  Less chance of loose GET.

•	National GET hardware containers were selected based upon their smaller capacity limiting their weight when full to no more than 15kg. Reduced manual handling risk.

•	National GET's proven procedure of a 12hr retorque eliminates loose GET due to incorrect torquing.  12hr retorque tags are supplied with every rubber tyred kit.

•	Tracked gear hasn't been forgotten either with Loctite 243 provided with these kits. With correct torquing, this addition provides a second defense against loose GET hardware.

National GET's focus on improving kit fitment safety has resulted in us providing your fitters the best possible system. This ensures the GET stays on the machine improving availability & eliminating re-work.

Let National GET give you the competitive edge!

A KITE piacvezető agrárintegrátorként nemcsak a jövedelem-hatékonyság mentén keresi a fejlődési lehetőségeket, hanem a gazdálkodás fenntarthatóságát is integrálja rendszereibe, ezért elvárja és támogatja munkatársai fejlődését és megújulását is.

A KITE Zrt. nagy múltú vállalat, 1972-es alapítása óta jelentős hatással van a magyar mezőgazdaság fejlődésére, ma már Magyarország legnagyobb, leginnovatívabb és legkomplexebb horizontális integrációja. A precíziós és talajkímélő gazdálkodáshoz kapcsolódó technológiák széles körű elterjesztésével közvetíti az agrárinnovációt a gazdálkodók felé, elősegíti versenyképességüket, és felelősen hozzájárul a gazdasági, környezeti és társadalmi fenntarthatósághoz.

A cégcsoport dinamikusan fejlődik, 2024. évi nettó árbevétele meghaladta a 415 milliárd forintot. Központja Nádudvaron található, az 5 régióba és 20 alközpontba szervezett kereskedelmi és szolgáltató hálózata az ország egész területét lefedi, stabil munkalehetőséget nyújtva több mint 1800 munkatársnak, akiknek több mint 45%-a felsőfokú végzettségű. A KITE tevékenyen hozzájárul a vidék megtartó erejének erősítéséhez, többek között korszerű munkakörnyezet biztosításával, a mezőgazdasági szakemberképzés minden ágának és szintjének támogatásával, KITE képzési programok működtetésével, valamint a gazdálkodók folyamatos tájékoztatásával, szakmai oktatásokkal is.

Name: Farm Warehouse
Description:
We are an agri-tech company enabling smallholder farmers and agri-processors with clean-energy-powered agro-hubs, finance, and digital market access across Nigeria and Sub-Saharan Africa. Our agro-hubs sit on solar mini-grids and house agro-processing and storage equipment so rural communities can mill, dry, and store their produce closer to the farm, cut post-harvest losses, and earn more from every harvest. Through our platform, farmers and agri-businesses access improved seedlings, inputs, mechanization, productive-use equipment, insurance, and microloans, bundled with aggregation, warehousing, and logistics.

On the demand side, we connect farmers directly to markets and off-takers through an e-marketplace that offers transparent pricing, quality assurance, and simple, secure contracts. We support activities from grain milling and cassava processing to packaging and distribution, while improving traceability from farm to final buyer. Our work turns mini-grids into hubs of productivity by linking reliable power to the equipment and services farmers need to grow their businesses.

Technology and partnerships are at the heart of how we operate. We use digital tools and data to match farmers with markets, de-risk lending, and streamline last-mile service delivery. By working with clean-energy developers, financiers, and value-chain partners, we co-create models that are commercially viable, climate-smart, and scalable across multiple communities and crops.

Our mission is to provide real value, security, and transparency to every transaction in our network, and to show that rural agriculture can be both profitable and sustainable. We are building a future where smallholders have better access to infrastructure, finance, and information, and where young people see agriculture as a path to income and impact.

Description:
Vusizinga Rural Youth and Entrepreneurs Empowerment NPC is a registered South African purpose is to foster rural community  development, alleviate poverty and improving food security in the rural areas with a skills training, mentorship program in sustainable agriculture businesses . 

Mission Statement 
 We aims to address the crucial issue of poverty reduction through the establishment and promotion of sustainable agriculture businesses. By harnessing the potential of agriculture as a means of income generation and food security, this initiative aims to empower vulnerable communities, improve livelihoods, and create a sustainable pathway out of poverty.

Objectives:
Foster economic empowerment: Promote entrepreneurship and create opportunities for individuals and communities living in poverty by establishing and supporting agriculture-based businesses.

Strengthen local farming practices: Support farmers in adopting sustainable agricultural techniques, such as organic farming, permaculture, and crop rotation, to enhance productivity while minimizing negative environmental impacts.

Enhance food security: Increase agricultural productivity, diversify crops, and improve access to markets, ensuring a consistent food supply for vulnerable populations. Increase local food production through the promotion of diversified farming systems, improved seed varieties, efficient irrigation methods, and integrated pest management.

Foster knowledge sharing: Facilitate platforms for farmers to exchange ideas, experiences, and best practices, fostering a culture of learning and innovation.

Improve market access: Provide training and support to farmers on market analysis, product branding, packaging, and distribution, enabling them to access broader markets and secure fair prices for their produce.

Strengthen community engagement: Engage local residents, schools, and organizations to participate in agriculture-related activities, including community gardens, farm visits,

Name: Central Plains Water Limited
Description:
Central Plains Water Limited (CPWL) supplies sustainable water that our shareholders use to support agriculture, cropping and seed production, which in turn drives growth that benefits our region, people and the environment.
We operate the largest irrigation system in the South Island, Aotearoa New Zealand. Our irrigation network currently supplies water to 45,000 hectares of Canterbury farmland.

Our irrigation scheme increased the reliability of water flowing to the food-producing farms of the Canterbury Plains. Reliable water not only extends the growing season but enables CPWL shareholder farmers to grow more food and increase the types of crops and animals that they farm.

We work hard to be excellent environmental stewards of the Waimakariri and Rakaia rivers that supply the irrigation scheme, monitoring water take every 15 minutes of every day. We transparently report our results and ensure we comply with all resource consents. 

Working closely with local district and city councils, our farmers adhere to stringent environmental standards and take a long-term, multigenerational approach to water management.

CPWL is a limited liability company operating under a co- operative philosophy. In 2024, the scheme directly and indirectly contributed a total of $364 million to Canterbury’s GDP, generated 2045 jobs for the Canterbury region, and supported many local community projects.

Aramco, NEOM, and SABIC Approved: Certified solutions tailored for harsh industrial environments in Saudi Arabia.

Innovation-Driven: Cutting-edge AI and radar technologies designed to reduce risk and improve safety.

Customized Solutions: Systems engineered to meet the specific needs of construction, oil & gas, mining, and logistics sectors.

Description:
Rooted in Florida and deeply connected to the land, IMG Citrus is a family-owned company built on a passion for farming and a commitment to people, community, and sustainability. With our own Florida citrus groves and partnerships with growers around the world, we bring the best of every season to the citrus aisles of leading retailers across the Southeast United States.

Farming keeps us grounded, while curiosity and innovation keep us growing. From grove to table, we cultivate not only citrus but also trust, collaboration, and shared purpose among our teams, growers, and customers.

Fully Integrated Citrus Operations
We are a grower, packer, marketer, importer, and shipper operating a 185,000-square-foot packinghouse and refrigerated distribution center. Through our Florida groves and partner growers, we deliver fresh citrus year-round with consistency, quality, and care.

Stewards of the Land
We see the land as both a gift and a responsibility. Every decision—from soil health and water conservation to integrated pest management—is made with future generations in mind.

People and Communities First
Goodness comes from the hands and hearts of many. We invest in our people and communities through employer-funded housing, profit-share programs, school partnerships, and food bank donations. We’re proud to grow opportunities alongside our fruit.

Where Tradition Meets Innovation
We honor the legacy of Florida citrus while embracing innovation that moves our industry forward. From higher-density plantings to Citrus Under Protective Screen (CUPS) systems, we’re reimagining what’s possible for citrus today and tomorrow.

Home of Happy Food
Our commitment to freshness and joy comes to life through Happy Food—our year-round citrus brand celebrating health, positivity, and connection. With organic and Fair Trade options, it delivers the best of every season with our customers in mind.

Name: Petros Farms
Description:
Petros Farms is a beacon of hope for our community. Born amidst the chaos of the COVID-19 pandemic, it is a shining example of what can be achieved through determination, perseverance, sacrifice and a commitment to making a difference. Our roots are firmly planted in the Egbelu Nguru Community of Ngor Okpala Local Government Area of Imo State, Nigeria; where our wholly-owned Indigenous Agro-Allied company is creating ripples of change.

Our mission is not just about supplying businesses with table eggs for their operations, but about transforming lives, families, and communities. This mission began when after graduation, our co-founder, Justine Echebiri found himself struggling to secure employment.  But it wasn't until he visited a friend at an egg depot that the idea of Petros Farms was born.

Bringing Petros Farms from an idea to fruition by convincing his brother who is an Obstetrician and Gynecologist to fully fund this multimillion-dollar project is a story for the ages. The story of an obstetrician and gynecologist instead of starting his own practice in the USA, traded in his stethoscope and scalpel for a rooster call; using his lifesavings to create jobs in Nigeria by starting a Commercial Poultry Egg Producing Company. 

We stand as a testament to the power of the human spirit, and Petros Farms is dedicated to being a constant, consistent, and reliable source of hope and employment for those around us. Join us on our journey to make a lasting impact.

Name: AMADAS Industries
Description:
AMADAS Industries is a world-class manufacturer of premium agricultural and industrial equipment for specialized markets. We provide innovative equipment solutions and support for agricultural customers in key peanut and cotton growing areas of the world through our extensive dealer network.

The name AMADAS is actually an acronym, composed from three key phrases that are tenets of our company: American Made, Advanced Design, Absolute Service.  Our history date back to early 1963, when a successful partnership was formed between Oliver K. Hobbs and J. Carlie Adams, the beginning of Hobbs-Adams Engineering. The enterprise combined engineering, manufacturing, and marketing expertise to produce a new generation of peanut harvesting and processing machinery. During the decades that followed, Hobbs-Adams evolved to become AMADAS Industries, and new products were added to meet the needs of the modern marketplace. Today AMADAS Industries produces equipment in Suffolk, VA, Albany, GA. and Cordoba, Argentina.

AMADAS Industries' current product lines include pull-type and self-propelled peanut combines, peanut diggers, crop transporters, Reel Rain irrigators, cotton stalk puller/choppers, mowers, round cotton module handlers and a line of industrial equipment for both the horticultural and recycling industries. Through a 25+ year partnership with John Deere, AMADAS developed and builds the world’s largest and highest capacity self-propelled peanut combines.

Equipment manufactured by AMADAS is at work throughout the United States and in over fifty countries around the globe. We continue to develop innovative products, manufacture those products to the highest quality standards, and support our products with matchless product support.

Our company can independently develop and manufacture undercarriage parts products with a full range of pitches from 90 mm to 350 mm, with an annual production capacity of 100,000 sets of crawler chassis.

With rich experience in supply chain and extensive inventories up to 2 million US dollar, we are confident to fulfill our commitment “You deserve the Best” to our customers, which means at Origin Machinery you will always get the best quality products, the best prices, the fastest delivery and the most flexible payment term.

Name: IRESOIL Agro Tech
Description:
IRESOIL is an Agri-Tech startup spearheaded by the need to integrate sustainable agriculture with improved soil health. 
At IRESOIL, we believe that soil health is the key to a better tomorrow. 
* IRESOIL AGRIPACK focuses on utilizing Biogas and improving soil health with the residual bio-slurry. 
* IRESOIL AGRIHUB comprises two products namely ‘JEEVAN’ & ‘KAVACH’ together with allied products like wormi-compost, azolla, earthworms and azolla seed. As the name suggests, 
IRESOIL JEEVAN provides a bio micronutrient essential for building plant immunity.
IRESOIL KAVACH is a herbal product that protects plants from pests and diseases.
* IRESOIL PROMAKTIVE tackles the worrying concerns of soil health by integrating an organic phosphatic bio-fertilizer which is on par with chemical phosphatic fertilizers. Our vision is to innovate and deliver Agri inputs that will enable farmers towards sustainable agriculture and improved soil health.

Name: Wakefield BioChar
Description:
Wakefield BioChar provides a sustainable, organic solution for soil health and remediation services. For agriculture, biochar is a premium quality soil conditioner that gives your crops the best opportunity for success because it helps create healthier soil. And, as an added bonus biochar soil conditioner contributes to the reduction of greenhouse gases in our atmosphere by returning carbon to the soil. Biochar is not a new product for your soil. It is actually a solution for great soil health that has been forgotten over the years. With a gentle nudge we are happy to help remind the world of its benefits.

Public awareness of the need for sustainable business practices has put biochar into the conversation for preferred organic solutions that won't negatively impact our environment. By using low nutrient value biomass (a.k.a. cleared trees and paper mill waste material) and returning back into our soil to improve crop production, reclaim urban land for farming,  reduce contaminants in our stormwater and decrease the amount of CO2 released into our atmosphere we are creating a system the optimizes the use of resources to improve our society. Simply put, returning carbon back into our soil can make the world a better place. This is done through a micro-level with backyard gardens, flower beds and lawn care and in large industrial measures by incorporating biochar into stormwater remediation and farming.

Name: Vertical Lake
Description:
EarthShot Prize nominees, we’re Revolutionising sustainable, organic protein/collagen and bio-fertiliser production with vertical aquaculture lake system

Our Purpose
We aim to nourish the planet in a way that is clean, safe, healthy, and sustainable for future generations. We do this through innovative vertical aquaculture systems that produce high-quality protein with a global reach.

Our Mission
Our mission is to scale the production of climate-resilient, clean, and safe protein, while reusing and upcycling all byproducts. We are fully circular, sustainable, and organic.

What We Do
We are transforming sustainable protein aquaculture with a unique vertical freshwater aquaculture lake system. Our approach uses proprietary, organic, and circular bio-filtration technology to produce organic protein and natural plant fertilizer for global markets.

Our Impact
Our system is highly circular—water- and space-efficient, zero-emission, and waste-reusing. It aligns with global demands for sustainable, regenerative, and circular food production.


Our Products
We produce edible freshwater fillets and whole fish for the Kenyan market, as well as fish-skin collagen and protein derivatives from by-products. These serve the super-premium organic protein segment, which we intend to have global reach.

Stage of Business
We are in the early stage of our business—generating sales and operating profitably, preparing for scale. Our fish skin collagen and protein derivatives for premium markets is currently in the validation stage.

The company focuses on poultry table egg farming production. Currently, the company manages over 4,000 egg-laying chickens across 320 potentially surveyed urban farmland acres.

The company is owned by Tariq Said Mchibya and Eric Mmanwa Lugusha, and is strategically positioned to serve both local and regional markets.

In phase 1 of the project, the business has built modern poultry facilities, including organic egg-laying chicken-rearing units. We intend to expand operations to increase table egg production from 4,000 eggs per day to 1 million per day for both local and international markets.

Annual growth in livestock and crop production is projected at over 5%, driven by rising market demand for eggs. The company’s brand, GORICH, is gradually gaining recognition for quality and reliability across Tanzania, particularly in the Tanga region.

The company's mission is to provide a high-quality, safe, affordable, and sustainable supply of table eggs that meet the nutritional needs of local and international households, institutions, and businesses, while promoting sustainable and efficient poultry farming practices.

Gorich's vision is to become the leading egg producer and supplier in Africa, recognized for excellence, reliability, and innovation in production, setting new standards for quality. This will be achieved through strategic vision and scale-up operations, reaching 1,000,000 layers in phase two by 2026 to 2027, and ultimately 4,000,000 layers by 2030. This phased expansion will strengthen economies of scale, ensure reliable market supply, and position Gorich as a leading player in both national and international poultry markets

In this phase 2 of the project, the company aims to raise TZS 15,756,000,000 through a bond listing with a four-year term and a six-month grace period.

Traditional post-milking routines are not only time consuming but disruptive to milking and can be prone to human error.

By automating the dip and flush process ADF's simple and robust system automatically applies 'dip' (emollients and sanitiser) to cows' teats immediately after milking. The teat cups are then automatically rinsed and disinfected ready for the next cow.

Improved cow health saves money, increases milk yield and saves time.

Name: PATH2DEA
Description:
PATH2DEA is a 3-year Coordination and Support Action (CSA) funded by the European Commission (EC) and the Swiss Federation.

The potential of agroecological farming systems to master many of today’s challenges to the environment, economy, health, and society can be significantly promoted by coupling with digital tools and technologies. PATH2DEA is committed to unlocking digitalisation’s catalysing power to foster European agriculture’s transition towards enhanced sustainability. It builds on farmers’ competences and views and match them with the rich repertoire of digital solutions already available for agriculture, aimed at tailoring digital technologies to users’ needs and fostering wide-range adoption of digital agroecological farming in the EU and associated countries. Strategic engagement by multiple actors includes early adopters of digital agroecological farming represented by six Showcase farms located in different pedo-climatic regions, with hands-on experience for solid consensus validation of the project’s conclusions.

PATH2DEA will deliver a robust knowledge base in the frame of an Open Source Repository of digital tools and technologies in agroecology with decision support functionalities and a well-aligned R&I Roadmap for guiding digital agroecology transition.

PATH2DEA is co-funded by the European Union (Grant no. 101060789) and the Swiss State Secretariat for Education, Research and Innovation (SERI) (Grant no. 22.00535). Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union, European Research Executive Agency (REA) or Swiss State Secretariat for Education, Research and Innovation (SERI). Neither the European Union nor any other granting authority can be held responsible for them.

Name: Mozgrain
Description:
Mozgrain is the Meridian commodity trading arm in Mozambique.
We originate, process, and trade a range of commodities domestically, as well as for export.

Our core focus is on maize, pulses such as pigeon peas, green mung beans, oilseeds such as soya, sesame seeds, ground nuts, and beans such as kidney beans, soya beans, and cow peas. In 2021 we have launched Maize Flour under our “TA NICE” brand.

The Mozgrain model provides last mile connectivity for farmers and their produce. We originate commodities through a range of small-scale farmers, commercial farms, commodities dealers, and agricultural collectives. We then go on to process the produce according to the buyers’ requirements, and from here we handle the transport to the end buyers via road or deep sea.

We operate in different locations of central (Sofala, Manica, Zambézia and Tete) and northern (Nampula and Cabo Delgado) Mozambique.  With various grass-root level initiatives, we continue our efforts to help farmers achieve higher productivity and work on increasing up take of crop protection chemicals and improved seeds.

Our management team has a combined experience of the commodities industry spanning several decades, allowing us to be fast, flexible, and extremely pragmatic in finding solutions to supplier requirements and buyer needs.

Key Projects and Achievements

To meet constant foreign exchange challenges for imported fertilizer inputs, Meridian Group pooled its expertise to extend its grain and pulses trading to Mozambique. In 2021 our traded volumes exceeded 60k+ tons. We manage 7 Silos Complex under a Public Private Partnership (PPP) with Ministry of Industry and Commerce of the Republic of Mozambique. This has further improved our storage capacity. Our factory in Nhamatanda has fully functional mechanized capacity of cleaning and processing to handle Maize and to hull Sesame Seeds. Mozgrain represents Bayer for Crop Protection Chemicals.

Name: New Energy Farms (NEF)
Description: NEF is an agricultural technology company, developing and licensing artificial seeds. 50% of the most important crops globally, such as sugarcane do not produce seed and rely on bulky propagation options using stem or root cuttings. The patented NEF CEEDS system replaces these, with disruptive artificial seed technology, that brings the benefits of conventional seed to these markets for the first time. In sugarcane, CEEDS reduces by up to 50 fold the amount of seed material require to plant 1 ha, compared to existing systems. In target crops CEEDS delivers added value across the full supply chain, and provides a new field delivery system for plant genetics, crop protection and nutrition products that did not previously exist. NEF have commenced commercially licensing the technology to the sugarcane market in 2014, initially in Brazil with expansion underway in other key sugar regions. CEEDS can be applied to a range of other non-seeded crops of economic importance. This includes using CEEDS for regenerative agriculture with perennial grasses, to produce fibre and fuel. Over 1 billion ha of land is degraded globally, with 7 million ha of farmland annually lost to soil erosion, reducing productive food land, using these crops planted via CEEDS can reverse this damage. Can also potentially be applied to diverse range of food, protein and ornamental and other fibre crops globally.

Description:
SmartLand is an advanced irrigation IoT solution designed to enhance smart farming and gardening practices. The platform offers wireless, self-powered irrigation automation, leveraging IoT technology to improve water efficiency, reduce electricity costs, eliminate human errors, and optimize crop yields for a growing global population.

SmartLand employs the latest IoT low-power and long-range radio communication technology, such as LoRa, integrated with cloud computing. This integration creates a cutting-edge smart irrigation system focused on addressing water wastage in agriculture and promoting sustainable food production.

Key features of SmartLand include wireless automation for easy installation and scalability, self-powered operation for energy efficiency, and water conservation through intelligent monitoring and control. The platform also contributes to electricity savings by automating irrigation processes, minimizing the need for continuous electrical operation.

SmartLand eliminates human error in irrigation management, ensuring precise and consistent application of water, nutrients, and other inputs. It optimizes crop yields through real-time monitoring, analysis, and data-driven decision-making. Cloud integration facilitates data storage, analysis, and remote access, offering a centralized platform for managing irrigation systems.

With scalability designed into its modular structure, SmartLand accommodates both small-scale gardens and large agricultural fields. By combining IoT technology, wireless communication, and cloud computing, SmartLand emerges as a pioneering solution for sustainable and efficient irrigation, contributing to the advancement of smart agriculture practices worldwide.

Our objectives are simple – To provide quality seeds that will pay back the farmer multi-fold, by reducing input costs via efficiencies, and increase productivity.
We are cognizant of our Prime Minister’s vision of ‘doubling farm incomes’ and we hope to play our part and have aligned ourselves accordingly. 
The country stands to benefit with a collaborative approach and it is with this spirit that we will endeavor to share our journey with you. 
This page will provide you with the latest developments in the company and in the industry as a whole.  We welcome you to this platform and would certainly appreciate you joining our community.

Name: Bloomfield
Description: Crop cultivation demands accurate, precise and consistent inspection in the field and elsewhere. For virtually all crops inspection is a manual process of visual inspection performed by trained experts. Yet, the challenge with crop inspection or any visual inspection regime for that matter, is the time and effort associated with the inspection, finding qualified inspectors to perform that inspection with the necessary frequency and, most important, obtaining consistent, precise and accurate data from multiple inspectors. Bloomfield applies AI and deep learning to complement the work of the crop inspectors by identifying and assessing the same plant characteristics and anomalies that human visual inspection looks for and assesses now.

Name: Mineral.ai
Description: Mineral, an Alphabet company, is working to make the world’s food system more productive and more sustainable. Since 2017, Mineral has been working to harness the power of artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), and perception technology to unlock more sustainable ways to feed humankind while protecting the planet. Many of the agriculture and food industry’s most influential companies and research institutes already use Mineral technology to more deeply understand plant physiology, discover more resilient crops, increase production, and improve the bottom line for agribusinesses and farmers alike. Together with our partners, we're hopeful that these platforms and tools will - over time - drive a deeper understanding of the complex interactions of plant genes, the environment, and farm management practices.

Interagrovial. Tecnología, respaldo y servicio para quienes mueven al país.

Name: Brooks Hire Service Pty Ltd
Description:
Brooks Hire is the largest privately owned hire company in Australia, specialising in the supply of earthmoving and road-building equipment to the civil and mining industries.
 
The company was established in 1979 when Doug Brooks purchased two u/s compressors on bank card.  The fleet expanded, with Doug acquiring the first piece of mobile plant in 1982, an 8-tonne JEC crane, by tender. At this point, Doug was operating the whole business from a small shed in Eneabba. He was working 18-hour days and living five days a week in a humpy behind the shed, while simultaneously working locally as a fitter. His dedication continued throughout the weekends, as Saturdays consisted of driving to Perth to obtain parts, and Sunday was his day for accounts as well as returning to Eneabba.

Over 45 years, Brooks Hire’s fleet has grown to more than 6000 pieces of machinery, including backhoes, breakers, dozers, dump trucks, excavators and attachments, freight trucks, forklifts, graders, light towers, loaders, rollers, service trucks, side tippers, skid-steers, tele handlers, tip trucks, tool carriers, water trucks and various other machinery.

Every machine is backed by experienced and trade qualified mechanical staff who are on call 24 hours a day, seven days a week. 

Brooks Hire has 29 conveniently located branches throughout Australia.

Description:
Chi Farms Limited, a subsidiary of Tropical General Investments, stands as a pioneering force in Nigeria's agricultural sector. With a steadfast commitment to revolutionize agriculture through innovation and sustainability, we cater to a wide customer base across the nation.

Our value chain is robust, covering farming, processing, and distribution operations. We take pride in being the foremost supplier of Parent Stock Day-Old Chicks (Arbor Acre Plus Broiler and Isa Brown Layer) and Commercial Day-Old Chicks (Arbor Acre Plus Broiler and Isa Brown Layer) in Nigeria.

At Chi Farms Limited, we believe in empowering farmers with knowledge and expertise. Our Poultry Training Academy is instrumental in disseminating best practices in poultry farming, ensuring a more prosperous and knowledgeable farming community.

Headquartered in Lagos, our mission is to increase nourishment for the nation through our wide variety of protein foods. We are not just a company; we are a catalyst for positive change, aiming to create a sustainable future for generations to come.

Name: Big Dutchman Asia
Description:
For over half a century, Big Dutchman Asia has stood as a beacon of innovation in the livestock industry, offering state-of-the-art equipment and tailor-made solutions to cater to the unique demands of the Asian market.

Poultry Production: Our diverse range of offerings serves poultry farms of all sizes, specializing in broilers, layers, breeders, and egg production. Our advanced feeding systems, production tools, and equipment are parts of a comprehensive approach to optimize poultry farming.

Pig Production: We understand the intricate needs of pig farming in Asia. From farrowing to finishing, our range of solutions equips pig farms with the finest livestock technology on the market.

Layer Breeder & Egg Production: The significance of the egg production sector is paramount to us. We furnish specialized solutions for layer breeders, incorporating state-of-the-art equipment to amplify yield and ensure peak conditions for the birds.

Data-Based Farming Decisions: With the advent of technology, we advocate for data-driven approaches. Our Big Data cloud solutions, combined with advanced farm controller systems, provide farms with actionable insights to make informed and efficient decisions.

Automation & Precision Farming: We recognize the pivotal role technology plays in modern farming. Our automated solutions, from feeding to climate control, guarantee optimal livestock conditions and production efficiency.

Environmental Solutions: Beyond livestock, we present robust manure and waste management solutions. We support farms in resourcefully handling resources, driving down operational costs and enhancing efficiency.

Choosing Big Dutchman Asia is more than an equipment purchase; it's forming a partnership with a leader well-versed in the nuances of the Asian market. Our profound regional insights and legacy of innovation make us the premier choice for livestock solutions in Asia. Setting the future standards of livestock farming.

Description:

Headquartered in the center of China, CREG provides full-range TBM solutions together with its up-to-date technical solutions highly oriented towards project challenges and customer expectations.  
 
Until June 2018, CREG has signed 788 TBMs for tunnelling projects, in which 656 TBMs are boring different tunnels around the world. The TBM, we provide, are the EPB, Slurry, Single-shield, Telescope shield, and Gripper TBM, with a boring dia. ranging from 3 m to 15 m. These TBMs, with their unexceptional performances, are active in operation and highly appreciated by customers worldwide. This speaks of CREG’s unremitting commitment to technical standard and service quality at the highest level, as well as a sound assurance of customer-oriented operative efficiency. 
 
In addition to the TBM tunnelling solutions, CREG has also included a wide spectrum of auxiliary tunneling equipment into product portfolio, such as drilling jumbo, roadheader, rolling stock, disc cutters, diesel- and battery-driven locomotives as well as tunneling formworks and building structures.

Dalam menjalankan bisnis, kami fokus pada dua sektor ketenagakerjaan yaitu penyedia tenaga kerja (Manpower Support) serta penyedia jasa fabrikasi dan perbaikan kendaraan alat berat (Manufacturing Process & Fabrication Project).
