Name: PhycoTerra
Description:
At PhycoTerra we help growers #FarmForever. 

Farms around the world are trying to keep up with rising costs, shrinking profits, extreme weather, and declining soil quality. We set out to develop a new generation of inputs that would help growers increase productivity today while conserving the fertility of their land for years to come.

PhycoTerra provides a nutrient-dense balance of proteins, lipids, and carbs to feed and revitalize microbial life — boosting beneficial microbial activity 33x to make NPK more available to crops, to improve soil water holding capacity, and to strengthen crop resistance to environmental stressors.

It’s not, “bugs in a jug”, not a biological, not a fertilizer or a synthetic, and it's not kelp or seaweed. It’s nature’s best biostimulant. PhycoTerra is made from nonliving microalgae to replenish your soil with organic matter and provide microbes with a balanced food source that supplies lasting energy. It’s shelf stable, highly mixable, and compatible with a variety of different inputs. 

Our products help farmers to feed their fields all year long - from seed to stubble.

Learn more, and check out our trial results on over 500+ farms and 30+ crops at www.phycoterra.com. 

Note: PhycoTerra is product suite housed under the company Heliae Developments, LLC.

Description: Sonalika Industries (A Unit of ICML), a flagship company of International Tractors Limited (Sonalika Tractors), has always remained committed towards customising its technologically superior range of Agri Implements as per the critical soil and crop centric requirements of farmers. Sonalika's advanced product portfolio is designed while keeping a sharp focus on deep insights of the farming community, and therefore the company manufactures 70+ implements in a way which increase farmers’ productivity and rapidly increase their income levels. Name: AATF
Description:
The African Agricultural Technology Foundation is a not-for-profit organisation that facilitates and promotes public/private partnerships for the access and delivery of appropriate agricultural technologies for sustainable use by smallholder farmers in Sub Saharan Africa (SSA) through innovative partnerships and effective stewardship along the entire value chain.

The Foundation is a one-stop-shop that provides expertise and know-how that facilitates the identification, access, development, delivery and utilisation of agricultural technologies.

AATF works towards food security and poverty reduction in Sub-Saharan Africa, and its structure and operations draw upon the best practices and resources of both the public and private sectors.

It also contributes to capacity building in Africa by engaging African institutions in the execution of tasks that contribute to the Foundation’s mission.

AATF is a registered charity under the laws of England and Wales and has been given a tax-exempt status in the USA. It is incorporated in Kenya and in the UK and has been granted host country status by the Government of Kenya where it is headquartered.

Name: Boustead Plantations Berhad
Description:
Boustead Plantations Berhad (BPlant) is one of Malaysia's prominent plantation companies and a subsidiary of Lembaga Tabung Angkatan Tentera (LTAT). We have over 100 years of plantation industry experience and over 50 years of oil palm plantation estate management experience.

We are an investment holding company and are involved in the ownership of oil palm plantations. Through our subsidiaries, we are principally involved in the ownership and management of oil palm plantations, cultivation of oil palm and harvesting of its fresh fruit bunches (FFB), and the production and sale of crude palm oil (CPO) and palm kernel (PK). We also sell FFBs and provide mill design and consultancy services. We are actively involved in oil palm agricultural and agronomic research through our associate company.

We own and manage a total of 42 oil palm plantation estates and 10 palm oil mills in Malaysia with 16 plantation estates in Peninsular Malaysia, 20 in Sabah and 6 in Sarawak. We own and operate 3 palm oil mills in Peninsular Malaysia, 5 in Sabah and 2 in Sarawak. Our total landbank stands approximately at 97,500 hectares (ha). Out of this total, the area under oil palm cultivation is approximately 72,200 ha comprising 23,400 ha in Peninsular Malaysia, 38,500 ha in Sabah and 10,300 ha in Sarawak.

Our involvement in the plantations business is carried out via our wholly-owned subsidiary, Boustead Estates Agency Sdn Bhd (BEA), a central agency which provides a range of services such as the management of all plantation activities within our Group, plantation advisory services for oil palm, plantation engineering services, marketing of plantation produce and agronomic research.
Location: Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur

We specialize in durable, high-performance, and affordable equipment—from PTO stump grinders and wood chippers to sawmills, tire changers, and pressure washers—designed to meet the real-world demands of landowners, farmers, mechanics, and contractors.

Built with quality materials and offered at affordable prices, every MechMaxx product is backed by responsive customer support, fast nationwide shipping, and a commitment to long-term value. 

With a fast-expanding product line and a growing presence across North America, MechMaxx is proud to support the hands that build, grow, and maintain the world around us.

Name: Equinom Ltd
Description:
Determine the precise quality of your grains and predict how they will function when milled and used in food products and ingredients. Use Manna to improve your purchasing power, storage efficiency, and processing output, to save up to 10% of your respective costs. 

The Manna technology is the driving force behind our breakthroughs. This software enables us to zero in on top-quality grains by crossing insights from biochemical and field data with ingredient quality and functionality. After all, every grain’s biochemistry reveals the story of how that ingredient grows, processes, and performs when prepared in food.  

Founded in 2012, Equinom is a leader in food-tech, specializing in the functionality of food ingredients from crop cultivation to end-product production. 
Equinom drives innovation throughout the food supply chain. With over a decade of enhancing biodiversity, Equinom has improved the quality, cost-effectiveness, and nutritional value of crops like peas, sesame, and chickpeas. Today, we are excited to extend our AI solutions to the milling and baking industry.

Name: Growpital
Description:
Growpital connects you to the world of agriculture driven by the firm belief of the untapped potential of the agriculture sector.

With Zetta Farms, Growpital opens up avenues to join the journey of #DeshKaCultureAGRICULTURE and directly impact the agricultural industry. 

At Growpital, we see agriculture as a resilient and sustainable sector, and our corporate farming endeavors reflect this viewpoint. Join us in embracing the future of agriculture, where innovation seamlessly merges with tradition.

Name: Trituración y Equipo de Agregados S.A. de C.V.
Description: Expertos en Trituración, con más de 35 años de experiencia impulsando la productividad en la industria de MINERÍA y AGREGADOS. Ofrecemos una gama completa de equipos (trituradoras, cribas, bandas transportadoras, control de polvos, perforadoras) y la capacidad de diseñar e implementar proyectos completos, desde componentes individuales hasta plantas llave en mano.

Name: Energreen S.P.A.
Description:
Energreen nasce nell'anno 1999, dopo vent’anni di attività come in outsourcing per le altre aziende, i fratelli Fraron creano un nuovo ramo d’azienda con il marchio Energreen, che ha sviluppato un prodotto concepito, progettato
e realizzato totalmente all’interno dei moderni stabilimenti Laserjet, dando così vita ad una nuova generazione di macchine semoventi progettate per la manutenzione del verde, preposte allo sfalcio dell’erba e degli arbusti, adatte per l’uso su strade, autostrade, fiumi, argini, canali e fossi. In linea con la filosofia aziendale del nuovo prodotto, Energreen si è subito calata in un mercato di nicchia. La gamma di macchine semoventi è stata progettata e sviluppata con la massima attenzione in modo da soddisfare le richieste di carattere operativo individuate direttamente dall’utilizzatore finale. Tutto ciò ha consentito di registrare numerosi brevetti a livello internazionale. Oggi ENERGREEN, oltre alla gamma completa di macchine decespugliatrici semoventi professionali, offre anche una gamma altrettanto completa di macchine portattrezzi radiocomandate, una macchina portattrezzi comunale unica nel suo genere e una gamma completa di attrezzature per la viabilità invernale di recentissima introduzione.

Name: CubicFarm Systems Corp.
Description:
CubicFarm Systems Corp. is an award-winning technology company, founded by farmers. At CubicFarms, we provide local chain agriculture technologies to help minimize the use of natural resources and maximize cubic growing space. Using our indoor farming technologies, we strengthen local food systems that benefit our people, resources, and economy.

We developed two indoor growing technologies—one for fresh produce (CubicFarm System) and one for high-energy fresh livestock feed (HydroGreen Automated Vertical Pastures). These ag-tech solutions help farmers to grow more with less: less land, water, energy, and labour, 365 days a year, anywhere.

Name: Kisaan Helpline
Description:
KISAANHELPLINE is a growing start-ups in Agri Tech sector and assists Farmer's communities to increase the efficiency and sustainability of their agricultural operations.

We are building AI-enabled technologies to revolutionize farmers to be more connected, integrated, and knowledgeable than ever before and production efficiency in farm management.

Currently we are operating in Middle India - Madhya Pradesh, Chhattisgarh, Uttar Pradesh, Rajasthan, Maharashtra, Gujarat - with 2,00,000+ farmers in our service network and our goal is to bring our services to 2 million farmers by 2023.

We provide expertized knowledge from quality crop production so that farmer can take On Farm Decision and predict what will happen in the future and act more effectively as predicted.

Name: Agro Dairy
Description: Agriculture company

Name: AgriNext Conference
Description: Welcome to AgriNext Conference, a premier event by Next Business Media Private Limited, uniting pioneers in Agriculture Technology. This two-day extravaganza includes the prestigious Agriculture Tech Awards, insightful Conference sessions, and an Expo showcasing cutting-edge solutions. Celebrate innovators revolutionizing farming practices, explore the latest agri-tech trends, and connect with industry leaders. Join us to witness the synergy of agriculture and technology, shaping a sustainable and advanced future for global farming. AgriNext Conference is your gateway to the forefront of agri-tech evolution.

Name: FireFly Automatix, Inc.
Description:
An AgTech leader in robotics and electrification for turfgrass farms, golf, and sports turf.

Since 2010, FireFly Automatix has applied the most current engineering tools to solve challenges in the turf industry. FireFly manufactures fully automated, self-propelled turfgrass harvesters, as well as autonomous field mowers. 

Headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, FireFly has a growing international customer base. At FireFly, we improve people's lives by solving problems through creative disciplined engineering, operational excellence, and epic TEAMwork.

Name: Global Green Enviro Solutions India
Description:
If the development is not sustainable, it can not take us anywhere, it will be superficial and can not last long. At Global Green Enviro Solutions, we provide sustainable solutions for new era farming.
We are manufacturer of Neem fertiliser and Neem Oil which is 100% natural.
We also manufacture and Supply all kinds of organic fertilisers including Vermi compost, Poultry and cow dung manure, wood ash etc.
We provide urban Greenery solutions eg. vertical green walls, balcony gardening, landscape design and mini hydroponics systems. 
Premium quality service, customised solutions and customer satisfaction are the three main principles of our business.

Name: Grain & Protein Technologies APAC
Description:
Grain & Protein Technologies is a leading global designer, manufacturer, and marketer of reliable, durable, and innovative equipment solutions for grain, seed, poultry, egg, and swine production. Generating $1.1 billion in annual revenue, we serve farmers and agribusiness managers in over 100 countries and currently operates 19 manufacturing facilities across 5 continents, employing more than 3600 people.

We go to market with our strong portfolio of industry leading brands – GSI, Cimbria, Cumberland, AP, Tecno, Aerotech, Reventa, and Euroemme. With our Company Purpose of “Feeding the World Better”, Grain & Protein Technologies emphasizes advancing smart technologies and offering innovative technical solutions to make farmers and agribusiness managers more productive and profitable in a sustainable way.

Name: XCMG Group LATAM
Description: Fundada en 1943, XCMG es uno de los 3 principales fabricantes de maquinaria de construcción del mundo. XCMG se dedica a proporcionar excelentes soluciones y servicios de equipos de construcción para los clientes. En 2023, XCMG se centrará en la transformación integral y la actualización de industrias de alta gama, inteligentes, ecológicas, orientadas al servicio e internacionalizadas y ayudará sólidamente a nuestros clientes a tener éxito.

Name: NEFC Group
Description: At NEFC, our vision is to provide fully integrated sales, support, and logistics services to a diverse customer base across our mining, construction, automotive, power generation, and agriculture brands.

Name: PT Dwi Mitra Adhiusaha
Description:
PT Dwi Mitra Adhiusaha (PT DMA) adalah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang perkebunan dengan komoditas utama berupa produk hasil tanaman kelapa sawit.

Berdiri sejak tahun 1996, PT DMA kini membawahi perkebunan kelapa sawit seluas 6.000 Ha yang terletak di Kalimantan Tengah dan Kalimantan Selatan beserta pabrik pengolahan kelapa sawit berkapasitas 30 ton/jam di Kalimantan Selatan.

Dengan jumlah karyawan melebihi 1000 orang, PT DMA memiliki misi mengedepankan inovasi dan pengembangan sumber daya manusia untuk menjadi perusahaan yang lestari dan berkesinambungan.

Name: CENTROCAR - Centro de Equipamentos Mecânicos S.A.
Description:
Exclusive Dealer of Doosan construction equipment in Portugal, Spain, Angola and Mozambique.

Centrocar is a team of professionals determined to daily achieve the best results for its Customers, Shareholders and other Stakeholders.

Centrocar is a company committed to always surpassing its results, with an ever combative attitude towards business opportunities.

Centrocar is a modern and innovative attitude of selling machines, with sobriety, professionalism, customer proximity and always the willingness to learn and improve its results.

Centrocar is a reference in construction equipment sales.

Name: SAWIE Ecosystems
Description: Promoting Sustainable Agriculture practices, climate-smart agriculture, and Netzero agriculture,  improving water use efficiency, soil health, regenerative agriculture, clean water, clean energy, and clean air. Helping a digital transformation, rural connectivity, supply chains, traceability.

Name: Weba Chutes
Description:
Chute systems have an enormous impact on production and profitability. Our world-renowned Weba Transfer Chute Systems are used for bulk materials transfer in the industrial and mining sectors. We are the leading manufacturer of bespoke transfer chute systems. 

Leveraging our extensive experience and the latest technology we engineer and produce quality transfer systems that can accommodate coarse, dry, slightly wet or sticky materials. Each solution we deliver is uniquely tailored to each clients’ specific application requirements, enhancing productivity and reducing unscheduled downtime.

We have offices and representation in South Africa, Africa, Australasia, North America, South America and Europe, with skilled, competent people on hand who are dedicated to providing fit-for-purpose transfer chute solutions globally.

With more than 5000 chutes installed worldwide, our customers know that a genuine custom engineered Weba transfer chute system is the difference!

Name: Consolidated Pastoral Company (CPC)
Description:
Our history goes back to 1879 and the CPC portfolio was first consolidated as a company in 1983.

Consolidated Pastoral Company (CPC) is a leading Australian managed, UK owned Agribusiness with strong ESG values. CPC owns and operates a portfolio of nine station aggregations in Australia and two feedlots in Indonesia.  Across more than 3.2m hectares of land, the CPC team can care for more than 300,000 head of cattle and produce a diverse range of crops. With an asset base in excess of AUD$1 billion, CPC supplies a variety of domestic and international customers.

CPC holds a 90% interest in PT. Juang Jaya Abdi Alam (PT. JJAA), the other 10% being owned by our Indonesian Joint Venture partners. PT JJAA was first established in 2000 and now operates two feedlots in Indonesia, located in Lampung (South Sumatera) and Medan (North Sumatera). The Lampung feedlot has a capacity of 28,000 head, while the Medan feedlot has a capacity of 7,500 head; both facilities are “best in class” operations.

CPC direct sales channels primarily involve selling cattle and beef to Asian consumer markets, domestic feedlots or exporting processors, and exporting live cattle.

CPC is owned by Guy and Julia Hands through the Hands Family Office. Terra Firma (UK) (owned by Guy Hands) is the investment manager of CPC for the Hands Family Office.

Name: ESP Africa (Pty) Ltd
Description:
ESP was established in 1980 and is the largest multi-brand supplier of replacement spare parts for earthmoving and mining machines in South Africa. ESP’s inventory is in excess of  US$ 15 million with over 35,000 line items in stock.

ESP’s product range of aftermarket and replacement parts are suitable for popular makes of earthmoving equipment for mining and construction, such as Caterpillar, Komatsu, Volvo, Cummins and Detroit Diesel. 

The company is a multi-brand distributor of  high quality aftermarket replacement parts from Berco, KBJ, MTG, ETE, Metisa, TGW, Bulldog, KMP, World Gasket, CGR, OFM, ASP, ETP, SLP, Baldwin and many other popular brands.

The company serves the mining, construction, plant hire, agriculture, engine and machine rebuild sectors through an extensive network of 8 branches throughout South Africa.  In addition, the company markets its products and services extensively into Lesotho, Swaziland, Botswana, Namibia, Mozambique, Zimbabwe, Malawi, Zambia, Democratic Republic of Congo and Tanzania.

ESP is able to undertake all forms repairs for undercarriage, track frame and bucket through its three central workshops based in Johannesburg, Cape Town and Durban. 

ESP only distributes products with the highest quality and safety standards from leading parts manufacturers. ESP has established long term relationships with suppliers who are able to supply the Company with OEM equivalent parts. The high quality standards are embedded in all processes throughout the organization.

ESP Africa (Pty) Ltd falls under the ownership of Invicta Holdings Limited.

ESP is a Level 2 BBBEE (Broad Based Black Economic Empowerment) contributor in South Africa. ESP is  a IS9001 certified company. Visit www.espa.co.za

Name: Fluitek
Description:
En Fluitek  nos especializamos en el suministro, instalación y mantención de productos de seguridad operacional para la industria minera. Contamos con un excelente equipo de ingeniería y servicio para asesorar a nuestros clientes en nuestras sucursales de Antofagasta, Copiapó y Santiago. Valoramos el trabajo en equipo y la excelencia en el servicio, reconociendo a nuestros colaboradores por su compromiso. 

Trabajamos para proteger la vida de las personas, los equipos de nuestros clientes y seguir siendo líderes en el mercado.

Name: NWK Limited
Description:
NWK Limited is South Africa's oldest agricultural company and has been participating successfully in the grain and food value chain of Southern Africa, mainly in the North West, for more than 110 years. It is expanding its footprint at a rapid pace by opening even more NWK Retail and Mechanisation branches in not only the North West, but also Gauteng, the Free State and Limpopo. 

NWK delivers cutting edge expertise, service and products from a modern company that has evolved with the times to cater for its clients’ diverse needs in a mutually enabling environment of cooperative culture.

This innovative company transforms and grows together with agriculture in order to look after the needs of stakeholders and contribute to food security. The main objective of the group is to trade in agricultural and related products, aids and services at a retail level and to undertake associated activities. Backed by corporate principles and cooperative values we provide financing, agricultural inputs, grain market participation, advisory services and farming technology.

The addition of value to primary products by industrial and other subsidiaries and participation in, for example, the insurance industry and freight and logistics businesses, occur in accordance with NWK’s 2025 strategy. 

NWK also participates actively in the upliftment and development of local communities and beginner farmers. As one of more than 1 000 participating companies on the African continent and one of only 77 companies in South Africa, the group has been nominated as a top employer several times after an independent audit.

Name: Schramm Powered by Epiroc
Description: Schramm Powered by Epiroc manufactures Reverse Circulation (RC) drilling rigs, hammers and bits for the exploration drilling industry. With service and production centers in Australia, a US-based aftermarket team, and a global dealer network, Schramm provides full spectrum service, tooling, engineered upgrades, and OEM parts worldwide.

Name: ITM Filters
Description:
ITM FILTERS diseña y fabrica soluciones de filtrado para aguas de procesos y de aplicaciones en los sectores de Riego, Industria, Municipal y Medio Ambiental.

La gama de productos, con un diseño exclusivo y patentado, está formada por filtros auto-limpiantes automáticos, filtros de malla, filtros de arena y filtros convencionales.

El agua es vida, es por ello que toda actividad la requiere. El amplio abanico de actividades supone un reto constante a la hora de diseñar y fabricar la solución correcta para cada proceso. ITM FILTERS se adapta a las necesidades del cliente para garantizar la filtración óptima del agua en función del ámbito de aplicación.

Queremos daros la bienvenida a este espacio en el que mostraremos los procesos de diseño y fabricación utilizados para crear nuestras soluciones de filtrado.

Name: AVANT South Africa
Description:
About AVANT SA

AVANT MPM Distributors (AVANT SA) started importing AVANT equipment since 2006. With early success and sales in the mining industry the machines quickly became popular amongst mining engineers for their durability and excellent parts and service support. The concept of the compact multi task articulated loader with large attachment range were also a first in the South African equipment industry. With many advantages over the skid steer loaders, we have taken the market by storm with relatively good success. We stay humble and have to thank our South African and Namibia customers whom has invested in our brand and made our business a success.

We pride ourselves in the highest levels of support possible offered to our family of valued customers. Very importantly, we have hundreds of great South African and Namibian customer references which we can offer our prospective new customers. With customers owning machines on which some units has done in excess of 10000 hours and still working daily, we pride ourselves to be involved with such a great quality machine. The reason for the 2 year factory warranty is proof of confidence in our equipment. We also offer our customers full maintenance lease packages, service plans as well as rent to own finance options. We also offer in house financing through Standard Bank South Africa. With branches in Western Cape, Gauteng, Durban and Windhoek we offer our well organized support base to our valued customers and are available 24 hours for any technical support.

To all our prospective customers we ask that you do your homework before deciding to purchase any inferior copies of our machines and attachments. Ask for references and make sure you get the original AVANT loader. With a dedicated family of sales staff we appreciate your business and for the best deals on AVANT wheels, contact us today

Name: HYDRAUMAC
Description:
Présente au Maroc depuis plus de 20 ans, Hydrau Mac S.A.R.L est une société qui a su développer une expertise dans les domaines du BTP, des mines et carrières, de l'énergie, de l'agriculture et de la manutention.

Forte de sa réputation basée sur la qualité de ses produits et de son service après-vente, Hydrau Mac se place comme acteur majeur dans les secteurs d'activités représentant son cœur de métier. Distributeur et importateur exclusif de plusieurs marques de renommée internationale : Doosan, Ammann, Bobcat, Soosan, MST, Aksa, Case IH,etc .

S'engager avec nous revient à bénéficier d'un service de conseil et de suivi performant et à la hauteur des standards internationaux.

Name: Master Drilling Brasil Ltda
Description:
Sediada em Belo Horizonte-MG, a Master Drilling Brasil é parte integrante do Grupo Master Drilling,  um dos maiores fornecedores de serviços de perfuração e sondagem de rocha do mundo. Operando em todo o continente Africano, na República Democrática do Congo, Zâmbia, Mali, Tanzânia e Serra Leoa, e na América Latina, no Brasil, Chile, México e Peru. Também temos presença nos EUA, Canadá, Austrália, Índia, Colômbia, Turquia, China, Rússia e França.

A Master Drilling desafia o “Status Quo” ao fornecer um portfólio completo de serviços especializados, adaptáveis e integrados de sondagem de rocha, desde a perfuração e exploração até o suporte e treinamento. Nosso grande foco está ainda em soluções inovadoras e personalizadas, sustentadas por observância rigorosa aos padrões globais de saúde e segurança.

Name: Bin Shehab Co شركة بن شهاب
Description:
Bin Shehab Co. for Trading & Contracting is a trusted Saudi partner in aftermarket spare parts, mining & infrastructure equipment, and wear solutions. Established in 1975, we bring in over 40 years of expertise serving the construction, mining, cement, and heavy industries across the Kingdom.
We deliver global quality with local speed through partnerships with world leaders such as Epiroc, Brokk, SSAB, Kennametal, SPT, Terraroc, and FP Diesel. Our solutions reduce downtime, extend equipment life, and lower operating costs.
• ATS Division – Non-genuine Caterpillar & Komatsu spare parts covering GET, undercarriage, powertrain, and engines.
• MAS Division – Drilling and mining equipment, hydraulic attachments, and drilling tools from Epiroc. Robotic demolition from Brokk, precision downhole survey instruments from SPT, and foundation drilling consumables from Terraroc.
• SWS Division – SSAB steels (Hardox, Strenx, Armox), fabrication of wear parts, and customized steel solutions.

Name: Sarawak Oil Palms
Description: Sarawak Oil Palms Berhad (SOP) is public listed on Bursa Malaysia. SOP commitment to Planet, People & Profit is reflected in its core values and by aligning its business values, purposes and strategy that will produce sustainable future.

Name: Zoomlion Latam
Description:
Somos zoomlion, una de las fábricas de maquinaria pesada e industrial, más grandes del mundo.
Atendemos al rubro de la construcción, minería y agricultura, u otros que requieran de maquinaria de movimiento de tierras, izaje, concreto, y mucho más!

Contamos con más de 30 años de experiencia en desarrollo e innovación de maquinaria y estamos presentes en más de 21 países, con 15 centros de servicios, 9 bases (fuera de China) y 200 distribuidoras al rededor del mundo.

Ahora en Latinoamérica!

Name: Heavy Machinery Viqa LLC
Description: Welcome to Heavy Machinery Viqa, a trusted leader in supplying heavy equipment solutions in the UAE. Specializing in recycling and mining equipment, our diverse offerings encompass jaw crushers, impact crushers, cone crushers, crushing & screening equipment, complete crushing & screening plants, and operational support. With a dedicated sales and rental division for heavy-duty equipment, we stand as your go-to partner. Based in Dubai, our commitment to excellence extends to spare parts, ensuring uninterrupted operations. Follow us for insights, updates, and industry-leading equipment solutions.

Name: Farmbot Monitoring Solutions
Description:
Farmbot is an Australian agritech providing remote monitoring solutions for the agriculture industry that solves water challenges, safeguarding the long-term availability of water whilst improving stewardship of natural resources.

IP hardware drives data to a SaaS platform providing users with near real-time SMS and email alerts and reporting on water levels and trends. This data along with predictive analytics improves management, production and resource allocation equipping farmers with actionable insights to help make better business decisions.

Farmbot improves productivity and profitability through reductions in labour and fuel costs whilst improving sustainability outcomes, animal welfare and carbon emissions for as little as $1 a day.

Name: Forest & Wood Products Australia
Description:
Forest and Wood Products Australia (FWPA) collaborates with government and industry to grow the market, delivering real-world outcomes that are good for business, the environment and society. We:

•	Promote the advantages of wood products to everyone – including consumers, governments and the design and build industry 
•	Educate – university collaborations to produce the next generation of timber industry leaders, resources for teachers and information to help the design and build specifiers better use wood products 
•	Fund research and development in a wide range of areas – including tools to increase the value and volume recovery from existing resources
•	Get the facts – co-ordinate the collection of industry data so that members can benchmark against peers, measure consumer attitudes towards wood and study the social and economic effects of our industry on regional areas
•	Grow the market – successfully campaign for changes in building standards to benefit timber
•	Look to the future – with projects in genetics, pest control, remote sensing and more
•	Collaborate – with government, academia, industry and members

Working with stakeholders, FWPA identifies and delivers collaborative programs that improve the competitiveness – and market and community acceptance of – forest and wood products.

FWPA has a number of brands working to:

•	Promote the sustainable benefits of wood (The Ultimate Renewable)
•	Promote wood to the design and build industry (WoodSolutions)
•	Help teachers communicate and understand the industry – (ForestLearning)

Name: Attach2
Description:
Attach2 is a specialist manufacturer of standard excavator attachments.
Through streamlined manufacturing processes, our industry’s shortest lead times and unrivalled after-sales support, our aim is to be the No.1 supplier of the tools that are vital to keeping your excavators working.

With over 50 years’ experience in the earth moving industry, we are committed to bringing you the best service ever provided in the industry. We pride ourselves on being an experienced, proactive and dynamic company that always holds to our values, which we class as being critical to success. 
We are an excavator attachments supplier delivering attachments to excavator resellers. We focus on delivering our standard range of attachments with rapid delivery, product support and a quality solution.
Operating from our state-of-the-art, purpose-built factory located in the heart of the lower North, where real men meet the ground, we can offer service found by no other. Our factory and storage complex has been set
up so that we can get our product out the door faster and onto the job site where they prove their worth. However, our factory is not our most valuable advantage, our advantage lies in the people who work here at Attach2, those who drive the company forward always ensuring we are performing on the cutting edge.

Our Vision
A product of what we have supplied will be on every work-site where there is an excavator in Australasia, United Kingdom and United States.

Our Mission
Attach2 provides construction items to the industry. In all divisions our Mission is to conduct our business as follows.
• To carry out our business effectively with a constant upholding of the integrity and morals it has been built on.
• To add to the welfare and prosperity of the wider community and all mankind.
• To do what is right and commendable at all times.
• To provide excellent on-time service and products, constantly looking for opportunities to improve.

Name: PIPESTONE
Description: PIPESTONE has been serving their mission of Helpings Farmers Today Create the Farms of Tomorrow since 1942. PIPESTONE is helping farmers through expertise and resources in pig health, management, nutrition, research, and business. We serve over 1,500 farmers across the Midwest from our five office locations and the 70+ sow farms that we manage on behalf of family farmers.

Name: Flexco Australia
Description:
Flexco helps customers be more productive by providing solutions that increase belt conveyor uptime and facility output. Backed by an extensive highly trained support network with over 110 years of experience in solving belt issues around the world, clients adopt our innovative products because they know we’re hands-on and reliable. 

Flexco Australia’s head office is in Norwest, NSW, with additional offices in Perth, WA and Newcastle, NSW. Our manufacturing facility in Sydney produces the entire range of Flex-Lag pulley lagging and tungsten carbide tips for the Flexco group worldwide. Local manufacturing allows quality to be closely monitored to ensure only the best product is delivered to our customers.

Flexco specialises in designing and manufacturing high-performance products that enhance belt conveyor productivity, including belt cleaners, ploughs, trackers, impact beds, conveyor rollers, skirting systems, pulley lagging, mechanical belts fasteners and safety tools. Flexco understands that your belt conveyors play a critical role in your productivity, which is why we constantly strive to make them more productive through a combination of superior products and sound advice.

Name: PRAKRITIAAN MILLET
Description: Welcome to Prakritiaan Millet, a pioneering startup at the forefront of revolutionizing the millet sector. Our mission is clear: to empower farmers, enhance their income, and promoting consumer health. By leveraging innovative solutions, we bridge the gap between farmers and consumers, fostering a sustainable agricultural ecosystem. Through our dedication to quality and nutrition, we're reshaping the way people perceive and consume millets, unlocking their full potential for a healthier lifestyle. Join us on this transformative journey as we strive to make a positive impact on agriculture, uplift farming communities, and create a healthier future for all. Together, let's sow the seeds of change, cultivate prosperity, and nourish communities with the goodness of millets. Welcome to the Prakritiaan Millet family, where every grain counts towards a brighter tomorrow.

Name: George Maijo Agri
Description:
We are dedicated to supporting the agricultural community in India by offering state-of-the-art machinery. Our focus is on delivering high-quality, powerful, and fuel-efficient agricultural equipment.

Our machinery is meticulously designed to meet the specific needs of Indian farmers, incorporating advanced technology and engineering for optimal performance.

Name: Clifford-Jacobs Forging
Description:
Clifford-Jacobs Forging sets the industry standard for quality, performance, craftsmanship, and customer service. Our steel forgings help the leading brands in the mining, gear, aerospace, energy, and defense industries run. That’s because we use the highest-quality materials expertly engineered to fit each customer’s individual needs from standard to custom die forgings. And our ready supply of raw materials and strategic location means we deliver faster.

Please send any inquiries to sales@clifford-jacobs.com.

Name: TONDĀR
Description: We produce grade "A" unrefined shea butter for local and export sales. We empower rural women through capacity building and job creation. We plant, protect and promote the shea and other economic trees in Northern Ghana and beyond.

Name: Lamp Serge - IRAS
Description:
LAMP SERGE Specializes in offering upskilling platforms for smallholder farmers and agri consultancy services.
Are you passionate about agriculture and its potential to drive economic growth and development in Africa? Let's work together to make subsistence farming profitable and drive sustainable economic growth in Africa.

#GROWTH #AGRICULTURE #IRAS #DEVELOPMENT #PARTNERSHIPS

Name: Pacific Ag
Description:
Pacific Ag is North America’s largest and most experienced agricultural residue and forage harvesting and supply company. With over 150 years of combined experience on our management team, and millions of tons of harvested material under our belt, Pacific Ag has built a reliable, cost-effective feedstock supply solution that serves both our legacy markets of animal protein, mushroom compost and erosion control products as well emerging renewable product markets into which Pacific Ag is now forwardly integrating.  

Since 1998, Pacific Ag has been helping growers across the country to reduce costs, improve crop emergence and yield, and increase revenue by providing residue management services.  Now in 10 states, we work one-on-one with each grower, year-by-year and field-by-field, to develop a unique residue removal program to best support their farming and soil management goals.

Recognizing the urgency and opportunity for agriculture to play a role in decarbonizing large sectors of our economy, Pacific Ag through its subsidiary, Pacific Ag Renewables (PAR) is now building best-in-class bioconversion projects to develop and operate the production of low carbon fuels, packaging, textile fibers and a broad array of additional market opportunities.

Crop residue and other agricultural wastes are abundant and underutilized, low carbon, renewable feedstocks for bioconversion, and with its harvest and supply capability, Pacific Ag is a strategic enabler of a wide array of decarbonization technologies.

Name: Terra Ideal Cooperativa Educacional
Description:
Somos uma Cooperativa Educacional focada em capacitar gestores que lideram pessoas e operações agrícolas.

Se a gente só aprende fazendo porque também não ensinar fazendo? Acreditamos que o ensino só funciona se for prático, por isso, somos uma cooperativa escola em que os cooperados são educadores e a sala de aula são as Fazendas Escola, ou seja, a aprendizagem se dá no local real, onde as coisas acontecem, feita por quem vive o dia a dia da produção agrícola.

Oferecemos um modelo inovador de educação no agro, com linguagem simples, conteúdo prático e alinhado à realidade dos produtores. Promovemos com orgulho a mentalidade cooperativista e fomentamos o desenvolvimento sustentável do setor rural, formando pessoas preparadas para liderar com eficiência, consciência e propósito.

Name: BenArox Piggery & Sustainability Initiatives
Description:
BenArox Piggery & Sustainability Initiatives began rearing native pigs in 2015 and was recently registered with the Investment Promotion Authority and the Internal Revenue Commission. The business specializes in pig rearing, integrating sustainable agriculture practices, including apiculture. At its core, BenArox collaborates with a feed-supply network of women and youth within the Lower Bena LLG of Unggai-Bena District in the Eastern Highlands Province, supporting local livelihoods and economic growth.

Through its cooperative, women and youth receive agricultural inputs, climate-smart farming programs, and training in cultivating sorghum, maize, and soybean for animal feed. They also gain access to tools and resources that promote farming diversification and alternative income generation. 

In 2016, BenArox identified a market need for crossbred pigs that balance quality, resilience, and cultural significance. Early trials with crossbred pigs from Goroka revealed gaps in husbandry skills, nutrition, and housing, prompting the business to refine its approach. Despite these challenges, BenArox remained committed to improving pig breeds while maintaining traditional pig farming knowledge. After extensive research in crossbreeding and modern pig management, the business upgraded its facility to house up to seventy pigs, incorporating dedicated farrowing, weaning, fattening, and boar housing sections to enhance efficiency and animal welfare. Expansion plans are underway to accommodate over three hundred pigs, positioning BenArox as a leading supplier of premium pigs in the region.

Name: Escola Cooperativa Terra Lean
Description:
Somos uma Cooperativa Educacional focada em capacitar gestores que lideram pessoas e operações agrícolas. Acreditamos que o ensino só funciona se for prático, se a gente só aprende fazendo porque também não ensinar fazendo? Por isso, somos uma cooperativa escola em que os cooperados são educadores e a sala de aula são as Fazendas Escolas Cooperadas, ou seja, a aprendizagem se dá no local onde as coisas acontecem, feita por quem vive o dia a dia da produção agrícola.

Um modelo inovador de educação para permitir o acesso ao conhecimento com linguagem simples e aplicada a realidade do produtor e fomentando com orgulho a mentalidade cooperativista para o desenvolvimento do setor.

A primeira iniciativa da Cooperativa é a Escola Cooperativa Terra Lean, com cursos, projetos e programas focados na capacitação de lideranças na produção de HF. A escola vem sendo estruturada em 3 grandes polos produtivos do Brasil: São Gotardo, Brasília e São Paulo e em breve estará em muitos outros. 


Um dos principais pilares desse trabalho é a filosofia Lean, modelo de gestão criado pela Toyota para produzir com mais qualidade, mais rápido, mais fácil e mais barato, utilizando os recursos de forma racional por meio da eliminação de desperdícios. A Cooperativa Terra Ideal nasce inspirada por centenas de pessoas que trabalham para levar esse modelo às mais diversas áreas, especialmente pelo revolucionário trabalho do Prof. Paulo Machado, diretor da Clínica do Leite e professor titular da ESALQ/USP, que nos últimos 40 anos vem se dedicando à aplicação e ao aperfeiçoamento do Sistema MDA, modelo de gestão para fazendas de leite aplicado por milhares de produtores de todo o Brasil. 

Buscando expandir esse trabalho para cada vez mais espaços na produção de alimentos, a Cooperativa Terra Ideal segue pautada pela construção de uma cultura de melhoria contínua e de respeito às pessoas, solo, plantas, animais e meio ambiente.

Name: Onzebi
Description:
A Onzebi surgiu de um grupo de amigos que compactuam os mesmos princípios e valores de vida. O cuidado com a saúde através dos benefícios que a natureza nos proporciona é um destes princípios. Entendendo a riqueza da flora brasileira e conhecendo o potencial dos óleos essenciais, a Onzebi tem como objetivo a pesquisa e a produção de óleos essenciais de espécies exóticas e nativas de alta qualidade.
Óleos Essenciais são substâncias aromáticas presentes nas estruturas de determinadas plantas, chamadas plantas aromáticas. Através do processo de destilação (entre outros métodos) conseguimos extrair estes compostos, que além do incrível aroma, resultam em benefícios terapêuticos, nos trazendo bem-estar em nível físico e emocional.
Promovemos a popularização do uso desses compostos seja na aromaterapia, perfumaria, cosmética, farmacêutica, proteção de cultivos e culinária. Visualizamos um extenso potencial de exploração de novos compostos aromáticos e farmacêuticos, novas fontes de matéria prima e perspectivas sustentáveis da biodiversidade brasileira. Nossa área de produção está localizada no município de Casa Branca, no interior do estado de São Paulo, e hoje estudamos a produção e adaptação de mais 10 espécies de plantas em condições sustentáveis.

-Growers and farm advisors experimenting with new regenerative practices

Name: LandBauTechnik Bundesverband e.V.
Description:
Der LandBauTechnik Bundesverband ist ein Arbeitgeberverband im Handwerk und für den Fachhandel und spricht für bundesweit ca. 4.500 Unternehmen, Fachhändler und Serviceunternehmen an ca. 5.700 Standorten mit knapp 44.000 Mitarbeitern, die einen Jahresumsatz von hochgerechnet 9 Mrd. Euro erzielen.

Die Verbandsorganisation ist föderal aufgebaut. Der zugehörige Bundesinnungsverband und die 40 Innungen LandBauTechnik sowie die zehn Landesverbände vertreten die Mitgliederinteressen von Handel und Handwerk überregional und regional. Auf Bundesebene koordiniert der Bundesverband als Spitzenvertretung übergeordnet fachliche Themen, veranstaltet Kongresse, Messeauftritte und über seine Akademie ein umfangreiches Schulungs- und Seminarwesen, erstellt Arbeitshilfen und Infodienste und berät Betriebe und seine regionalen Verbandseinheiten.
Mit sechs Fabrikatsvereinigungen und der Bundesfachgruppe Motorgeräte vertritt der Verband die Interessen des Fachhandels gegenüber der Industrie. Er ist Partner der Agrarwirtschaft und des Handwerks; international eingebunden ist er im europäischen Branchen-Dachverband CLIMMAR. Seine Vertreter sind Ansprechpartner für Politik, Wirtschaft und Verwaltung sowie Sozialpartner und Berufsgenossenschaften.
Der Bundesverband ist mit seinen Partnern in der beruflichen Bildung verantwortlich für die Gestaltung der Berufslaufbahnkonzepte des Land- und Baumaschinen-mechatronikers, des Servicetechnikers und des Meisters. Mit fortschreitender Digitalisierung werden die Anforderungen komplexer, das Berufsbild aber auch gleichsam noch facettenreicher.

Der Bundesverband sitzt mit seiner Geschäftsstelle in Essen. Sein Präsident ist Ulf Kopplin und sein Hauptgeschäftsführer ist Dr. Michael Oelck.

Impressum: https://www.landbautechnik.de/impressum-2/

It’s about time

Agriculture is as ancient a foundation as it is life-giving. Yet, the agricultural market is moving and changing as we speak. We understand the challenges of producing traceable, safe and affordable food for savvy consumers while protecting the natural resources we depend on.

Intelligent digital solutions enable you to retain control over your product throughout the entire food production value ecosystem. 


Embrace data-driven solutions

Take the next step into next level solutions.

Name: Rainmaker.Earth Corp.
Description:
Rainmaker.Earth Corp. is the worldwide supplier for a transformative water technology that restructures irrigation water so that it has the characteristics of rainwater through an advanced oxidation process. The technology was originally developed in South Africa over 15 years ago, and we are now introducing it to the rest of the world.

The restructured water oxidizes contaminants including chlorides and keeps the irrigation system clean, disease free and operating optimally. The water which is now highly oxidized breaks up soil compaction, increases permeability and water holding capacity creating a robust aerobic soil environment that lets natural biological systems to thrive. Water use reduction in excess of 30%, increased yields, higher quality and lower input costs give Rainmaker and exceptional value proposition.

Our Agtech supports rapid transition to regenerative agriculture practices, which need to be supported by an aerobic environment.

Name: Krampe Fahrzeugbau GmbH
Description:
MASSGESCHNEIDERTE FAHRZEUGE – MADE IN GERMANY!
Die Firma Krampe Fahrzeugbau hat sich von einer kleinen Dorfschmiede zu einem international agierenden Unternehmen gemausert. Seit dem Jahr 1981 werden im westfälischen Coesfeld-Lette Anhänger gebaut. Die ersten landwirtschaftlichen Einachskipper wurden aus alten umgebauten LKW gefertigt, die vom Schrottplatz kamen. Anfangs wurden die Anhänger vornehmlich im Münsterland vertrieben, die Produktvielfalt und der Umsatz wuchsen über die Jahre kontinuierlich an, neue Märkte wurden erschlossen. Als Marktführer für landwirtschaftliche Wannenkipper in Deutschland hat sich Krampe mittlerweile auch einen guten Namen im Bereich Containeranhänger bzw. Kipper für Erdbewegungen mit Schlepperzug gemacht. Fahrzeuge für die Entsorgungswirtschaft und den Kommunalbereich runden das Programm ab, wobei sich Krampe nicht als Volumen-, sondern als Individualhersteller sieht. So entstehen viele Unikate, die speziell nach Kundenwunsch gefertigt werden.

Jedna z hlavných úloh Asociácie výrobcov organických hnojív je vytváranie partnerstiev s ministerstvami a orgánmi štátnej správy, privátnymi subjektami a obdobnými združeniam doma a v zahraničí, za účelom komercializácie, prezentácie, popularizácie a výmeny skúseností.

AVOH združuje slovenských výrobcov nielen hnojív ale aj ochranných prostriedkov pre rastliny ako aj farmárov so záujmom o organické poľnohospodárstvo. Výhodou pre členov je stabilita cien a dodávok organických hnojív ako aj spoločná prezentácia produktov na domácom a zahraničných trhoch.

Gracias a nuestro conocimiento del comportamiento de las distintas pulpas minerales, diseñamos y fabricamos repuestos a medida, ajustando la formulación de nuestros revestimientos para maximizar su durabilidad frente al alto desgaste generado por el flujo de pulpa en equipos y tuberías.

Nuestro proceso comercial se basa en una atención técnica y personalizada, que incluye las siguientes etapas clave:

Visita a la unidad minera

Toma de medidas en terreno

Diseño técnico y propuesta de solución

Cotización formal

Fabricación con control de calidad

Entrega oportuna

Servicio postventa y seguimiento

Description:
ILA Group – The Essence
ILAAGRI ENTERPRISES PVT.LTD was founded by professionals with shared rural roots and diverse backgrounds in Commodity Trading, Financing, Banking and Broking Industry. Our “4i” approach forms the basis of Business Philosophy in terms of bringing in Innovation to Agri service offerings, Integration of various Agri services using IT solutions and Implementation of the solutions across the Agri value chain - Pre-harvest through post-harvest services.

ILA's Distinctive Approach

Our post-harvest services, which include Bill Discounting, Trade Finance Facilitation, Procurement & Supply, Stock Disposition / Dispensation, and Distressed Assets / Securities Management, suit the Agri-value Chain industry's diversified demands.

ILA Agri Services

Eyeing to become a “One stop solution to Farming Fraternity”, at present we offer farming support services via our own assets as well as through third party aggregation in the following aspects: – Soil testing kits, Drone Spraying Services (DSS), Harvesters etc. 

With 12 fully automated Drones in the kitty and operational in the State of Andhra Pradesh, we await the delivery of next set of Drones that takes our count to 25 in the coming weeks. Our drone vendors are Marut Drone Tech & Aries Solutions. Our target is to spread our DSS to serve one lakh acres for the FY’2025 through a fleet of 100 fully automated drones in the States of Andhra Pradesh and Telangana and to increase our geographical outreach.

Name: Agriventure Egypt
Description:
Agriventure is a regional leader in high-tech agriculture — shaping the future of fruit cultivation through innovation, partnerships, and sustainability.

From our 500-acre smart-farm network in Egypt to expansion sites in Oman and Saudi Arabia, we integrate advanced genetics, data-driven farming, and precision irrigation to grow premium blueberries and other berries tailored for international markets.

Our ecosystem is built on exclusive collaborations with global agritech pioneers. In parallel, our exclusive and limited cultivation rights give us access to the world’s most innovative blueberry genetics — ensuring consistency, yield, and exceptional flavor.

Supported by a dedicated R&D hub trialing more than 40 varieties across seven breeding programs, Agriventure combines science and sustainability to redefine what’s possible in arid-climate farming.

Our mission is clear:
 To build a regional model of agricultural excellence where technology, sustainability, and quality coexist.

 Agriventure — cultivating progress across the MENA region.

Name: Quivogne
Description:
Bienvenue chez Quivogne, votre partenaire de confiance dans le domaine des machines agricoles, du travail du sol et de l'environnement. Depuis notre création en 1946, nous sommes fiers d'être un fabricant français engagé dans la conception et la production de solutions innovantes pour l'agriculture.

Entreprise Familiale :
Chez Quivogne, nous sommes plus qu'une entreprise, nous sommes une famille. Cet esprit familial se reflète dans notre approche du travail et dans la relation que nous entretenons avec nos clients. Chaque produit que nous concevons est imprégné de cette passion et de cet engagement familial, assurant ainsi une qualité exceptionnelle.

Bureau d'Étude Intégré :
Au cœur de notre démarche d'innovation se trouve notre bureau d'étude, situé au sein même de nos locaux et de notre usine à Jussey, en Haute-Saône. Cette proximité nous permet d'être constamment à la pointe de la technologie, de concevoir des solutions sur mesure et d'adapter rapidement nos produits aux besoins changeants du secteur agricole.

Conception Passionnée :
La passion pour l'agriculture et le respect de l'environnement sont les piliers de notre démarche. Nous concevons nos produits avec une passion inébranlable, en veillant à intégrer les dernières avancées technologiques tout en maintenant un équilibre respectueux de la nature.

Garantie Qualité et Durabilité :
La qualité et la durabilité sont au cœur de chaque produit Quivogne. Nous sommes fiers de garantir à nos clients des solutions robustes, fiables et durables. Chaque étape de la fabrication est minutieusement contrôlée pour assurer la conformité aux normes les plus élevées.

Chez Quivogne, nous sommes bien plus qu'un fabricant de machines agricoles, nous sommes des partenaires dévoués à la réussite de nos clients. 

Rejoignez-nous dans notre quête constante d'innovation, de qualité et cultivons ensemble l'avenir de l'agriculture.

Name: Okovate Sustainable Energy
Description:
Agrivoltaics is a type of dual-use solar deployment that optimizes land use for both solar photovoltaic energy generation and agriculture production. As the world increasingly experiences the impacts of the global climate crisis, agrivoltaics is an essential part of the solution. American Farmland Trust (AFT) estimates 83 percent of new solar built in the next few decades will likely be sited on agricultural acreage. While the deployment of solar energy is a key component of the larger climate solution, it should not come at the expense of farm land - especially when the global demand for food is increasing.

Enter Okovate. We are a 100% Black-owned and-operated group building value-add services within Agrivoltaic solar research, development, and maintenance operations. We partner with crop farmers in select markets to develop agrivoltaic systems on active farmland. Okovate is a lean company looking to intentionally grow our team.

Name: Ausinland
Description:
AusInland is a company that stands out in its industry, having been founded in 2016 by two individuals with a clear mission: to provide exceptional supply chain services to Australian businesses in the infrastructure and mining sectors. The company has achieved this through its commitment to forging strong relationships with Chinese and overseas manufacturers while maintaining product quality and supply security.

The company's expertise in this field has led to an engagement by China Railway Construction Heavy Industry Corporation Limited (CRCHI) as its representative in Australia and New Zealand. The company is promoting CRCHI's non-standardized, customized high-end equipment such as tunnel boring machines, drilling and blasting equipment, and rail track systems.

CRCHI is an established leader in the field of underground engineering equipment, having developed three mature industrial sections and expanded into other industry sectors such as railway track maintenance machinery, agricultural machinery, green building materials equipment, and mining construction equipment. AusInland and CRCHI share a vision of building a better, smarter, and more sustainable future for all.

AusInland's strong supplier relationships have enabled it to help clients meet their business and project needs in times of global health and geopolitical upheaval that have caused significant supply chain disruptions. The company's supply chain services provide clients with better access to overseas sources of equipment that are not readily available in the Australian market.

Through efficient communication with CRCHI, AusInland is helping the Australian and New Zealand construction industry benefit from CRCHI's knowledge and capacity to support TBM projects. The company is building a local network for CRCHI to provide after-sales services such as spare parts and maintenance, thus allowing local businesses to participate in the supply chain around major infrastructure projects.

Name: Ridder North America
Description:
We are Ridder  

Farmers and growers worldwide need to be able to adopt their own individual approach to efficient and sustainable controlled environment agriculture. This is the promise that Ridder, as an international family-owned company, fulfils by translating more than 65 years of Dutch agri-food expertise into adaptive technology and know-how that is tailored precisely to local needs and conditions.    

At Ridder, the drive to innovate is in our DNA. We are also committed to finding the best possible solution. The balanced combination of these two characteristics has enabled Ridder to evolve into the experienced market leader in technical solutions for the horticulture, intensive livestock and crop storage sectors. Today, Ridder has customers in more than 100 countries, who receive support from international offices and a global partner network. 

Our future health and wellbeing will largely depend on a successful global transition to efficient controlled environment agriculture. Ridder’s effective knowledge sharing processes and pragmatic solutions are essential in helping growers and farmers all over the world to achieve this goal - in their own way.

The Rumen Nation team is founded on the experience of three generations of Hornbuckles in the intensive livestock production industry.

Veterinary Doctor Harry Hornbuckle began consulting to the beef and pork industries in the 1960s before establishing his own beef feedlot in the 1970s at Yengarie, near Maryborough, QLD. He is succeeded by his son, John, and grandson, Joshua, who now heads the Rumen Nation stockyard design team.

At Rumen Nation, we see cattle handling as more than a job. It is a craft. A skill passed down from old hands to young ones. A way of working cattle that shows respect, reduces stress, and keeps people safe. Our family’s history in livestock production is what guides our thinking and keeps us grounded in real-world, practical stockmanship.

We honour that craft in the way we design. Every yard starts with flow — vision lines, behaviour, angles, pressure and release. We build facilities that help good stockmanship shine, not fight against it.

When it comes time to build, we don’t cut corners. Rock-solid steel, practical layouts, and no-fuss project management. Workmanship built for decades, not seasons.

We build yards that make cattle handling calmer, safer, and more efficient.
We build for families. We build for graziers.
We build for the next generation.

Name: Green in Blue
Description:
Green in Blue was born in 2019 in Barcelona as a commercial spin-off of Aquapioneers with the aim of answering to the increasing demand for more sustainable agriculture at urban level. 

The future cities will not be able to keep cultivating products following the traditional ways, so the road to full sustainable agriculture is necessary and ever-growing and we work to run this new route. For this reason, we help people and organizations to realize their aquaponic projects with our consulting services. 

In order to significantly reduce our impact on the environment, we follow a food miles philosophy for our production by applying the aquaponic method: we exploit the perfect balance among fishes, bacteria and plants to obtain no-chemicals high-quality products.

Name: NSF AgTech Engine in North Dakota
AgCarE
Description:
AgCarE is the premier platform for assessing, verifying, and monetizing natural capital on agricultural properties. 
Aligned with international sustainability frameworks—including the Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures (TNFD) and the International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS)—AgCarE empowers landholders to unlock environmental and financial opportunities.
Key benefits of AgCarE include:
•	Enhanced productivity and sustainability outcomes.
•	Access to ecosystem services payments and premium markets.
•	Improved financial terms with lenders and insurers.
AgCarE bridges the gap between practical on-ground practices and global benchmarks, providing a robust and verifiable framework to measure, manage, and capitalize on Natural Capital assets.

Name: Indeco North America
Description:
For over three decades, Connecticut-based Indeco North America (INA) has been a leading manufacturer of heavy-duty hydraulic breakers, forestry mulching heads, steel shears, compactors, pulverizers, and pedestal booms for demanding demolition, scrap, recycling, mining, and road construction applications in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. A wholly-owned subsidiary of Italy’s Indeco Ind. S.P.A., the Company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Milford, Connecticut.

Today, thousands of Indeco North America demolition attachments can be seen on every type of carrier at every type of construction, recycling, mining, or demolition site, including those from John Deere, Komatsu, Volvo, and many others. These organizations turn to Indeco North America because, unlike many competitive offerings, INA products utilize an innovative, system-engineered approach and fully exploit the latest in state-of-the-art hydraulic technology to provide highly robust, flexible, and configurable products help these organizations satisfy even the most demanding performance and budgetary requirements.

Whether you need to build roads, crush rocks, mine gold, or trench riverways, Indeco North America has a world-class solution for your application, backed by the industry’s most comprehensive support program.

Trusted worldwide, our products are used across construction, mining, waste management, agriculture, defence, and more.

FlipScreen has also recently launched the WL3000, the largest-ever screening attachment, designed for large-scale mining operations. The WL3000 models are fully mobile primary processors that eliminate all bottlenecks from oversized and contaminated ore. Visit www.flipscreenmining.com to learn more. 

Proudly Australian-owned and manufactured, FlipScreen has grown from a local operation in Wagga Wagga into a globally recognised brand. Our screening attachments are now used in over 47 countries, helping industries improve efficiency, reduce handling costs, and achieve operational sustainability.

Proudly Made in Australia. Proven Worldwide.

I augusti 2022 anställdes företagets första externa VD någonsin. Verksamheten sysselsätter ett hundratal personer, huvudkontoret ligger i Ellös i Orust kommun med filialkontor i Stenungsund.

Idag är vi branschledande i Norden och levererar delar och utrustning till både äldre och nyare traktorer samt till entreprenadmaskiner så som grävmaskiner, hjullastare och dumpers liksom servicedelar till Volvo Pentas motorer.

Brett sortiment
Med mer än 30 000 olika artiklar i lager kan vi erbjuda en unik bredd, även på sällanköpsartiklar, som exempelvis kylare och motordelar, till mer ovanliga modeller. Vi hanterar reservdelar till mer än 5 000 olika traktor- och entreprenadmodeller samt till både nyare och äldre Volvo Penta-motorer. Vi utvecklar ständigt vårt sortiment och har förutom reservdelar även ett växande utbud av utrustning så som kraftöverföring, hydraulik belysning och olika tillbehör.

Snabb leverans
Vi arbetar med flera olika speditörer och tack vare ett omfattande lager och effektiv lagerlogistik kan vi nästan alltid leverera omedelbart. Lägger du din order före kl 16 hanterar vi den samma dag. Det innebär att du kan ha dina delar redan nästa
dag.


Personlig service
Även om olssonparts.com är norra Europas mest lättanvända e-handel för reservdelar kan det ibland kännas skönt att få prata med en riktig människa. Vi finns bara ett telefonsamtal bort och förutom svenska kan du även få hjälp på danska, finska, engelska och tyska.

Name: Tenant Farmers Association
Description:
The Tenant Farmers Association (TFA) is the only organisation dedicated to supporting all farmers who do not own the land that they operate in England and Wales.  This includes those involved in share farming agreements, grazing licences, contract farming arrangements as well as traditional tenant farmers. 

The TFA lobbies at all levels of Government for policies and legislation which assist those who do not own the land they farm and gives expert advice, information and support to assist its members. The TFA also seeks to support and enhance the landlord-tenant system in agriculture.  

The TFA represents and advises members on all aspects of agricultural tenancy, land occupation and ancillary matters.  It also aims to improve the professional and technical knowledge of its members, to increase the flow of new tenancies and other valid farming opportunities onto the market and to help the farming industry best apply existing legislation occupation of non-owned farm land.
TFA members have access to specific, one-to-one advice on all agricultural and land occupation queries from a dedicated head office team. This comes at no additional cost and is available by telephone, email, letter or when required, at a face to face meeting.

For more information about the TFA and details on how to join, visit www.tfa.org.uk or call 0118 930 6130.

In recent years, our engineers have worked closely with mine site personnel in some of WA’s harshest mining operations to address challenges in high duty, hardworking applications and as a result, a range of High Duty (HD) boom systems was developed by TRS. The TRS HD booms are proudly Australian made including 7 models that operate faster, have longer reach and carry larger hammers than previous generations of boom systems on the market.

Name: Ocean Harvest
Description:
Ocean Harvest is a technology-enabled agribusiness based in the UAE, focused on year-round, local production of salmon. Ocean Harvest leverages innovative Recirculating Aquaculture System (RAS) technology and advanced wastewater treatment systems to enable year-round production of delicious and affordable salmon. Ocean Harvest is addressing systemic challenges by delivering tangible food security, water conservation, economic diversification, and environmental sustainability solutions.

Ocean Harvest designs, builds and operates Recirculating Aquaculture System (RAS) facilities which localize the production of Atlantic Salmon and other salmonid species of fish. Leveraging advanced wastewater treatment technology, Ocean Harvest’s proprietary RAS technology enables the re-use of over 99.5% of process water. This almost eliminates wastewater discharge and helps protect fragile ecological systems. In addition, Ocean Harvest’s first-of-its-kind RAS design for salmon de-couples farming from marine systems while virtually eliminating the environmental stress caused by traditional open-net pen farms. Localization of production minimizes carbon dioxide emissions by reducing the amount of “food miles” needed to deliver product to end consumers. Ocean Harvest’s RAS solution also has the benefit of being completely indoor and protected from outside conditions, meaning fish stocks are shielded from sea lice and diseases – a challenge faced by traditional open-net pen farms. Such controlled environment conditions significantly improve fish welfare and boost the quality of the final product.

Name: Dapibuset
Description:
Dapibuset is developing a modular bio-manufacturing platform that upcycles agricultural and industrial side streams into higher-value ingredients for feed, food, and future functional applications.

Global food and feed systems are under increasing pressure from climate change, supply chain volatility, and inefficient use of resources. At the same time, large volumes of nutritious side streams from agriculture and food processing are underutilised or wasted. Dapibuset addresses this challenge by enabling the local conversion of these underused resources into valuable ingredients through fermentation.

The platform is designed to be modular, scalable, and deployable close to where side streams are generated. This approach reduces transport needs, improves resource efficiency, and creates new value streams for producers and processors. By working directly with partners across the agri-food value chain, Dapibuset supports decentralised production models that strengthen resilience and circularity.

Dapibuset’s approach combines fermentation technology with circular design to increase the value of existing resources rather than relying on new raw material extraction. Initial applications focus on animal feed, food and functional ingredient categories.

By enabling local, resource-efficient bio-manufacturing, Dapibuset aims to help accelerate the transition toward a more resilient, circular, and sustainable food system - doing more with what is already available.

In a world overwhelmingly reliant on chemicals, particularly in the agricultural sector where pesticides dominate, NaturaVolt emerges as the revolutionary solution to chemical weed control. 

Here at NaturaVolt, we've pioneered a groundbreaking technique. We channel electrical current through the very root system of weeds, effectively boiling them from the inside out. This innovative approach allows us to address weed infestations in sensitive areas such as watercourses, wildflower meadows, around precious flora, fruit trees, and vegetables, or in places where children play – all without the looming threats of poisoning or cross-contamination. 

Our commitment extends beyond just weed control; we're dedicated to a more sustainable, health-conscious, and environmentally-friendly future. If you're eager to explore our chemical-free weed control services and discover how we're transforming the landscape, don't hesitate to connect with us at info@naturavolt.com. Name: Tea Association of Malawi
Description:
The Tea Association of Malawi Limited (TAML) has been a significant player in the tea industry since its establishment in 1934. 
TAML was initially incorporated as Nyasaland Tea Association on 10th January 1936 and later renamed Tea Association (Central Africa) Limited. 
The Association is the representative body of all tea producers, (including smallholder tea producers) in Malawi with a mandate of promoting the sustainability of Malawi tea.
The Tea Association of Malawi, advocates for a favorable operating environment for the tea industry in Malawi, and promotes the Malawi tea industry globally. The Association maintains close ties with the Tea & Coffee Merchants Association of Malawi (TCMA), Tea brokers in managing the Limbe Tea Auction where tea is sold locally.
 TAML is affiliated several international organisations, including:  
United Kingdom Tea Council; Canada Tea Association; Malawi Confederation of Chamber, Commerce and Industry (MCCI); Employer Consultative Association of Malawi (ECAM); FAO - Intergovernmental Group on Tea (IGG); Tea Association of USA and is recognized by the International Labour Organization.
The Association is governed by a nine members Board of Directors and board sub-committees which provide policy guidance. The Association is funded by its members through a Cess levied on tea production as provided by the Tea Cess (Imposition of Cess) Act. The Cess also funds  research at the Tea Research Foundation of Central Africa (TRFCA), which reflects the importance placed on research on tea by the association and its members.
TAML is committed to increasing awareness of the tea industry in Malawi, both locally and internationally.

Name: Pinnacle Pocket Cattle
Description:
Pinnacle Pocket stud, established in 2006 by Peter Spies, is the first registered Senepol stud established in the coastal tropics north of Rockhampton and only registered stud in Far North Queensland. Pinnacle Pocket breed fertile Senepol, Senepol composite and Senepol X Droughtmaster cattle well adapted to the conditions of tropical Australia. 

The Pinnacle Pocket operation is based on the Atherton Tablelands, west of Cairns; at Glen Allyn, east of Malanda on the North Johnstone River. The Senepol and Senepol Composite herds are run on high rainfall country, east of Malanda, near Mt Bartle Frere, Queensland's highest mountain. It is here we apply selection pressure on our breeders for fertility and insect resistance with high tick and buffalo fly pressure.
The Pinnacle Pocket difference - our bulls are paddock-raised and not fed up for sale. We sell out of the paddock thereby lowering the cost to buyers. Southern Senepol seedstock operations cannot apply the same selection pressure in this environment, with our tick, buffalo fly, nutrition and tropical heat/humidity issues. Southern-bred cattle may not be adapted to the North Queensland Environment and can go backwards in condition or take significant time to adapt.

In producing cattle, we follow best-practice commercial husbandry including early weaning, controlled mating and pregnancy testing with cows having to produce a calf every year. Our branding rate is typically over 90%. All calves are raised from weaning, on the Tablelands, and the stud applies strong selection criteria to retained bulls and replacement heifers with emphasis on polledness, sheath, testicles, slick coat, fertility, temperament and structural correctness.

We guarantee the fertility of our cattle. We are also a tested Pestivirus-free herd. Our cattle, bred for docility and fertility, are a pleasure to work with. Come and visit our herd for yourself!

Name: Wmatcha & Co.
Description:
WMATCHA & CO. is a Wazuka-based, farm-to-table specialty tea company founded to redefine matcha as a global cultural standard—not a commodity.

Japan has produced iconic brands across industries, exporting not only products but values. Yet matcha—one of Japan’s most symbolic cultural expressions—has long been consumed globally without origin, philosophy, or voice.
WMATCHA & CO. was born from this unresolved contradiction.

Rooted in KANECHU, the founder’s ancestral tea house in Wazuka, Kyoto, we combine over 800 years of Uji matcha heritage with modern wellness, performance, and global design thinking. Our mission is not to follow trends, but to restore meaning—returning matcha to its role as a culture that cultivates clarity, balance, and inner discipline.

Beyond product creation, we take responsibility for the industry itself.
Through WTEA, the world’s first direct trade platform dedicated exclusively to matcha, we enable transparent, single-origin transactions starting from just one kilogram. By removing non-producing intermediaries, we restore fairness, sustainability, and pride to tea farmers—while giving global buyers access to authentic, origin-driven matcha.

WMATCHA & CO. exists to build the world’s most iconic matcha company—
by reimagining culture, industry, and spirituality through tea.

From Wazuka to the world.
Leading a new era. Through matcha.

Description:

produce like tomatoes, cabbages, and pineapples going to waste. To combat this, we've

harvest management to minimize spoilage right from the farm. To ensure farmers get the

placing them at the heart of the market. We're revolutionizing cold storage with our
solar-powered units available on a flexible pay-as-you-store basis. This innovation not only preserves produce quality for over 21 days but also

GUIDING MANIFESTO of ORICoop

PRESERVATION:- to protect, preserve and enhance business assets that grow and produce organic food in an organic, sustainable and regenerative manner

EDUCATION:- to demonstrate organic best practices for existing & incoming organic & biodynamic farmers, that enable more people to manage organic farms & businesses, in regenerative agriculture and food production

COMMUNITY:- to connect eaters & consumers to sustainable and profitable food systems that empower farmers, eaters, and investors to bring long term change and longevity.

INVESTMENT:- to activate aligned capital that provides sustainable returns and builds a stronger, more resilient and localised food and farming system. Name: Novin AgriTech
Description:

For decades, traditional breeding methods have aimed to improve these crops, but the process is slow, often requiring years to achieve meaningful results. While biotech advancements have revolutionized crops like corn and soybeans, wheat and other cereals have lagged due to technological challenges.

Now, Novin AgriTech (a spin-off of Purdue University) is breaking through these barriers with a revolutionary approach that transforms the way we enhance cereals. Our cutting-edge technology eliminates the complex and time-consuming steps of traditional methods, enabling rapid and precise genetic improvements across a wide variety of crops. For the first time, high-quality, genetically enhanced cereals can be developed at unprecedented speeds.

Novin’s innovation has already achieved remarkable success in wheat, barley, oats, and rice, paving the way for more resilient, productive, and nutritious crops. This groundbreaking method promises to reshape agriculture, delivering stronger crops to feed a growing global population while addressing challenges like climate resilience and food security. The future of farming is here, and with Novin AgriTech leading the way, the possibilities are limitless.
