Farmhand Ventures builds startups that enable a just transition towards the future of work in agriculture.

Agricultural production is labor intensive, with 2.5-3 million people  working on today’s US farms. However, there is a growing labor gap, costing an estimated $3.1B in unrealized fresh produce sales, annually, in the US. This shortage is exacerbated by an aging and declining workforce, due to declining birth rates in Mexico, wages increasing faster than farm income, and increasingly dangerous conditions during climate change. Name: Bondura Technology AS
Description:
With 30 years of experience in the oil and gas and manufacturing industries, the principle of the bondura pin is both ingenious and simple. bondura is the global leader in smart pivot pin technology, its unique design is adaptive, cost effective, proven and trusted.
 
When our clients use the bondura pin, they’re promised:
 A perfect fit every time
 A reduction in both planned and unplanned down time, up to 90%
 Decreased costs
 Increased profit through up-time
 Faster pin recertification
 NO unpredictable failure

bondura’s in-house experts have created a pin that expands and contracts for easy installation and removal, tapered at both ends. No matter what the challenge, bondura’s technology responds to provide the right engineering solution.
 
bondura is the only product that provides its customers with a bondura CAD application to enable faster designs for all mechanical joints. The modular design of the pin serves to simplify the engineering process and enhance the quality of the end product.
 
The bondura pin removes the slack and eliminates any ovality that occurs from general wear and tear with a regular bolt or pin. When new equipment is being manufactured, assembly slack can be built in that is absorbed by tightening the bondura pin, resulting in easier assembly of equipment and a solid connection, helping to avoid future pivot wear.

Name: CredoSense Inc.
Description:
CredoSense builds real-time crop-health diagnostics for outdoor farms and indoor/controlled-environment agriculture (CEA). Our portable leaf-chamber platform combines leaf physiology, soil and microclimate sensing, evapotranspiration (ET), and—outdoors—satellite data. An embedded + cloud AI engine turns these signals into bench/acre-level actions for irrigation, nutrition, and crop protection in about 60 seconds.

Our product suite includes the leaf-chamber system with integrated plant/soil/microclimate sensors and on-device analytics; a fungal spore counter that quantifies airborne spores for early disease risk and spray timing; and ET/weather nodes that track stress and feed recommendations. Everything is designed for accuracy, speed, and auditability, with data export and integrations for enterprise workflows.

We serve Certified Crop Advisors, agronomists, growers, and plant-science teams who need repeatable measurements and clear, defensible recommendations at scale.

Our approach is holistic and context-specific: we start at the leaf and tune models to environment. Indoor diagnostics account for benches, lighting spectra, airflow, humidity, and crop recipes. Outdoor analytics fuse plant signals with weather, soil, and satellite/RADAR data. Low-power hardware, calibration discipline, and third-party validation keep the science rigorous while field use stays simple.

We exist to make rigorous plant physiology practical everywhere and accelerate climate-smart agriculture. By directing water, nutrients, and disease control with measured plant signals, our customers cut irrigation hours, improve nitrogen use efficiency, reduce unnecessary sprays, protect yields through heat and drought, and lower the operational footprint from pumping, passes, and product use—outcomes that scale from smallholders to large enterprises.

Name: Hiresha's World of Mushrooms (HWOM) | Women-Led Rural Mushroom Bioeconomy
Description:
Hiresha's World of Mushroom (HWOM) builds women-led rural bioeconomies by enabling women to create and own medicinal mushroom micro-enterprises.

We work with Self-Help Groups (SHGs) and women’s cooperatives to set up micro-farm clusters supported by training, assured buy-back, shared processing facilities, and direct market linkages — ensuring stable, dignified, year-round income at the village level.

Our model strengthens local ownership, keeps value within the community, and removes market risk — shifting women from laborers to enterprise owners in a growing wellness bioeconomy.

We use GIS-based cluster planning, climate-smart cultivation, and standardized processing to build traceable, consistent-quality supply chains that serve domestic and international demand.

We introduce women to high-value medicinal mushrooms such as Turkey Tail, Reishi, Lion’s Mane, Cordyceps, Shiitake, Maitake, Chaga, and Oyster, chosen for their strong demand in immune health, neuro-wellness, metabolic balance, and recovery nutrition markets.

What We Do
• Train & upskill rural women in medicinal mushroom cultivation
• Establish community-owned micro-farm & processing clusters
• Provide assured buy-back and transparent pricing
• Build market pathways to nutraceutical, wellness & export buyers

Impact
• Women own the value chain
• Families earn recurring, climate-resilient income
• Villages build circular, regenerative local economies

SDG-Aligned Social Impact: 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 8 • 9 • 12 • 13 • 17

When women own the value chain, rural economies transform — and nothing is impossible for a willing heart.

Name: Red Meat Industry Services - RMIS
Description:
The Red Meat Industry Strategy 2030 (RMIS, 2021) pointed out that the South African red meat industry has the potential to grow by more than 20% above a “business as usual” scenario, adding more than R12 billion in real terms to South Africa’s agricultural GDP per annum by 2030 (RMIS, 2021). Beef, which traditionally constitutes around 80% of total formal red meat production value, will likely contribute the bulk of this value. With approximately 40-50% of the national herd in the hands of communal and smallholder farmers, the sector can become a dynamic driver of inclusive growth, rural development, employment, and wealth creation for more than 1 million households involved in livestock production, largely in the poorest and most neglected regions of the country (RMIS, 2021).  
Industry cohesion, strong leadership and structured execution of a co-ordinated strategic plan is required to propel the industry from a marginal surplus producing sub-sector, exporting roughly 5% of beef production, to an inclusive, sustainable and competitive industry which exports closer to 20% of beef production by 2030, with food security benefits for local consumers. 
The Red Meat, and Livestock Primary Cluster, which is grouped as the Red Meat Abattoir Association (RMAA), the South African Feedlot Association (SAFA), the Red Meat Producers (RPO) and the National Emerging Red Meat Producers (as the Federation) tasked BFAP to draft a “South African Red Meat Industry Strategy 2030”. The aim was to unpack the interactions in the red meat value chain not only from a functional / operational perspective, but also from an institutional perspective, where the general views and interaction of role-players in the industry were taken into consideration, coupled with existing national policy frameworks such as the AAMP and the NDP.

The indicators will continue to be refined through a process of consultation with both stakeholders and technical experts.

How do we define sustainability? 
Sustainability is the production of beef in a manner that is socially, environmentally and economically responsible. We do this through the care of natural resources, people and the community, the health and welfare of animals, and the drive for continuous improvement.

Our vision is a thriving Australian beef industry that strives to continuously improve the wellbeing of people, animals and the environment.

The ABSF supports the strategy outlined in the Red Meat 2030 to deliver for the red meat industries longevity and prosperity of people, livestock and the communities we serve.

We currently trade in maize, soy, sesame, shea, and cocoa, supported by regenerative agriculture training focused on no-till and crop rotation practices.

Sustainable sourcing for buyers: From food and feed processors to FMCGs and specialty exporters, Warc enables scalable sourcing of quality crops — with full traceability, logistics support, and a permanent presence in the field.

Warc Consultants: Strategy meets implementation - Our consulting division works with donors, investors, and governments to deliver hands-on implementation, market research, and strategy across the agricultural ecosystem. Warc builds on this operational foundation to deliver practical advisory services across agriculture, food systems, climate, entrepreneurship, and impact measurement.

100,000+ lives improved and growing - We’ve increased farmer incomes, created rural jobs, and moved tens of thousands of tons of food. With strong local roots and scalable systems, we’re ready to grow sustainable sourcing across Sub-Saharan Africa.

Name: Bisalloy
Description:

Indeed, use of these trusted Bisalloy Steels’ products is so widespread that BISALLOY has become the generic name for quenched and tempered performance steels in Australia and many countries across Asia.

From its base in Unanderra, south of Sydney in NSW, Bisalloy Steels manufactures these products through a highly efficient, continuous flow process and, since beginning operation in 1980, has earned an outstanding international reputation for the quality of its products and technical backup. 

As a specialist performance steel manufacturer and supplier, Bisalloy Steels is highly responsive to customer demands and market changes anywhere in the world and is also strongly committed to, and clearly focused on, the crucial task of continuous product development and improvement. 

Supplying manufacturers and end-users in a vast array of industries including mining, construction, general fabrication, pressure vessel and defense, Bisalloy Steels distributes its products via a network of distributors across Australia, directly to end users, through its businesses in Indonesia, Thailand and the People’s Republic of China, and through agents in at least a dozen countries worldwide.

Bisalloy Steel Group comprises Bisalloy Steels Pty Ltd in Australia, the majority-owned distribution businesses in Indonesia (PT Bima Bisalloy) and Thailand (Bisalloy Thailand) and, from July 2011, the investment in the Chinese CJV - Bisalloy Shangang (Shandong) Steel Plate Co. Ltd.

Name: Microbiometer
Description:
Prolific Earth Sciences is an AgTech company advancing soil health measurement through innovative, mobile-enabled diagnostics. Founded in 2014 by Dr. Judith Fitzpatrick, Dr. E. Brady Trexler, and James Sottilo, the company developed microBIOMETER, a rapid on-site soil test that measures microbial biomass and fungal-to-bacterial ratio — key indicators of soil health.

Using a simple extraction and smartphone app, microBIOMETER delivers lab-quality results in about 20 minutes for around $10 per test, with results stored securely in the cloud. The app, available for both iOS and Android, enables users to track and share data, contributing to a growing global database of soil biology metrics.

The microBIOMETER platform is used by regenerative farmers, universities, soil labs, and research organizations in over 100 countries. By making soil biology measurable, Prolific Earth Sciences empowers data-driven decision-making for regenerative agriculture, carbon farming, and sustainable land management.

Healthy soil is central to reversing climate change, restoring ecosystems, and ensuring resilient food systems. Prolific Earth Sciences is proud to make soil life visible, measurable, and actionable — supporting a more sustainable and regenerative planet.

Name: Baramouda
Description:
Baramoda, we are at the forefront of sustainable innovation, leveraging advanced biotechnology to unlock the hidden potential of organic waste. By transforming this neglected resource into valuable raw materials, we contribute to improving soil health and revolutionizing food production for a more efficient and eco-friendly future, our efforts today are shaping a greener, healthier world for current and future generations.

Founded in 2016 as an LLC, Baramoda began production in 2018 in Qena Governorate, Upper Egypt, focusing on recycling agricultural waste—both industrial and field waste. Our goal is to produce organic and biofertilizers that align with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals. We aim to increase crop yields while reducing costs, minimizing the need for chemical fertilizers, and promoting the wise use of water resources. Ultimately, we strive to preserve natural resources for future generations.
Baramoda has made a significant environmental, social and economic impact in just five years of operation as follows:
	Saved 6.9 million liters of irrigation water.
	Recycled 209,000 tons of waste.
	Produced 104,000 tons of organic fertilizer.
	Served 8,142 acres of agricultural land.
	Reduced 522,500 kg of CO2 emissions.
 Baramoda's commitment to sustainable agriculture, job creation, social equity, environmental stewardship, and collaboration all contribute to a just transition. By addressing social and environmental challenges, we strive to create a more inclusive, equitable, and sustainable economy for the benefit of present and future generations.

Name: DigiCow Africa Ltd
Description:
With a database of 300,000 farmers and 400 extension personnel DigiCow Africa offers two primary solutions to support small-scale farmers: the DigiCow Dairy App and the Ndume App.

DigiCow Dairy App
The DigiCow Dairy App has two main features:

Extension Information: This feature provides farmers with comprehensive information to improve animal husbandry practices. It ensures that farmers have access to relevant content tailored to their specific needs at any given time and allows for easy reference at their convenience.

Record Keeping: This feature allows farmers to maintain digital records of their farming activities. It provides summarized analyses and reports, enabling farmers to make informed decisions.

For farmers without access to smartphones, DigiCow Africa offers a group training model. This model facilitates training sessions for groups of 5-30 members. Trainers use Bluetooth speakers for effective communication and assist farmers with registration during these sessions.

Ndume App
The Ndume App is designed to support veterinarians in recording data for farmers who do not have smartphones. The recorded information is sent to the farmers via SMS, and they also receive constant reminders guiding them through various stages of animal husbandry as recorded by the vet. This ensures that farmers can make informed decisions based on accurate and timely information.

XCMG Türkiye'yi kurma yolculuğunda ilk adımlar 2016 sonbaharında atılmıştır, daha sonrasında ise başarılı ve yetenekli bir ekip oluşturma konusunda yoğunlaşılmıştır. XCMG Türkiye, Türkiye pazarındaki genişleme fırsatını öngörerek inşaat makineleri sektöründe bilgili ve tecrübeli yeni ekip üyelerinin de ekibe katılmasının ardından 2018 yılında ilk distribütör olarak XCMG ekskavatörlerinin ve lastik tekerlekli yükleyicilerinin satışını gerçekleştirmek adına Hakan Makina ile işbirliği yapma kararı almıştır. Daha sonrasında 2019 yılında Enka Pazarlama'yı fore kazıklar, platformlar, diyaframlı kepçeler, silindirler ve greyderler gibi XCMG ürünlerinin satışını üstlenmesiyle beraber distribütör listesine dahil edilmiştir. Daha sonrasında Odabaşı Makina'nın XCMG ailesine eklenmesiyle kule vinç ve beton pompalarının distribütörlüğü için gerekli anlaşmalar sağlanmıştır. 2025 yılında ise XCMG'nin Türkiye pazarındaki partnerleri arasına platform makinelerinin satışlarını gerçekleştirmesi hedefiyle Yeni Denge eklenmiştir.

Farmer’s biggest issue today is to handle the growing pressure of resistant weeds in their crops. They struggle to kill weeds, thus they have to spray more and more herbicides. By using so much herbicides the worse the problems get. It has a huge cost for them, on their health, their wallet and the environment.

We want to change this.

We are developing an embedded camera network in our lab that mounts on agricultural sprayers. The system allows the recognition and treatment of problematic areas in real time and in precise manner. It also allows our farmers to visualize their crops on a weed map, so they can track the evolution of problems.

In 2016, Bilberry was founded and realised 100k in revenues thanks to our clients. Today, we are a dedicated team of 7 engineers, developers and marketers.

Name: RegenPGC
Description:
We are RegenPGC* (“Regenerating America’s Working Landscapes to Enhance Natural Resources and Public Goods through Perennial Groundcover”), a transdisciplinary team of academic and industry scientists and engineers funded by USDA-NIFA.

Our shared vision is to make year-round groundcover on working lands the norm, rather than the exception, for Midwestern US agriculture and beyond. 

Central to our approach is developing and de-risking perennial groundcover systems, where a perennial cover crop is planted once and then persists for multiple years alongside annual crops such as corn and soybean.

By providing year-round groundcover, PGC can deliver multiple ecosystem services, including conserving soil resources, reducing nutrient export, enhancing carbon sequestration, and suppressing weeds, thereby reducing herbicide requirements. 

Compared to conventional cover cropping, a PGC approach has lower management requirements, which could facilitate the widespread adoption of cover cropping systems critical to achieving measurable differences in large-scale environmental issues.

Ready to learn more? Jump over to our website www.regenpgc.org

*RegenPGC is supported by Agriculture and Food Research Initiative Competitive Grant No. 2021-68012-35923 from the USDA National Institute of Food and Agriculture. Any opinions, findings, conclusions, or recommendations expressed in this publication are those of the author(s) and do not necessarily reflect the view of the U.S. Department of Agriculture.

Alman mühendisliğiyle geliştirilen CLEANFIX fan, yakıt tasarrufu sağlayarak işletme maliyetlerini düşürür ve maksimum çalışma verimliliği sunar.

CLEANFIX, inşaat, tarım, ormancılık, atık yönetimi ve geri dönüşüm gibi birçok sektörde güvenle kullanılmaktadır. Biçerdöverlerden ekskavatörlere, tekerlekli yükleyicilerden özel endüstriyel ekipmanlara kadar geniş bir makine yelpazesinde etkin koruma ve üstün performans sağlar.

Nakon više od tri decenije uspešnog rada u oblasti trgovine delovima za poljoprivredne i komunalne mašine, možemo se pohvaliti zavidnim brojem domaćih klijenata, odličnom saradnjom sa stranim partnerima i dobavljačima. Za kardan, Mikronov prvi proizvod na kom se bazirao razvoj kompanije, nudimo i usluge servisiranja, stoga je servis poljoprivrednih kardanskih vratila osnovna delatnost našeg servisa. U servisu popravci pristupaju odmah po detektovanju kvara i isporučuju popravljen kardan u najkraćem mogućem roku, vrlo često i za manje od jednog sata.

Saradnja sa nama je laka. Možete se u potpunosti osloniti na nas zbog stabilne snabdevenosti velikog broja proizvoda koje imamo na lageru i efikasnom i brzom uslugom. Profesionalni pristup naših zaposlenih Vam obezbeđuje kvalitetno iskustvo i naša ambicija za rastom, kako za nas, tako i za naše klijente obezbeđuje najbolje rezultate.

Our team boasts vast experience in local and global agricultural and tobacco industries, bringing a fresh perspective and passion for diversified, sustainable small-scale farming. Famous Rock is poised to be a pivotal player in shaping the future of global agribusiness, driven by innovation, integrity, and a deep commitment to sustainable practices from the heart of Tanzania.

Description:
The South African Avocado Growers Association (SAAGA) represents the interests of local avocado growers with the vision of maximising grower returns. Through voluntary cooperation and effective communication across the value chain, SAAGA promotes production efficiency, drives demand locally and internationally, and supports sustainable practices.

Key activities include the coordination of industry research, provision of technical information, promotion of avocados in domestic and export markets, and facilitation of quality standards and post-harvest best practices. By sharing market insights and production data, SAAGA empowers its members and strengthens the South African avocado industry.

Name: MONI Worldwide ApS
Description:
MONI Worldwide er stiftet i 2013, for at tilbyde vores forhandlere og deres kunder muligheden for at købe kvalitets maskiner fra tyske DEUTZ-FAHR, til fair priser. 
Vi har etableret en forretningsmodel, hvor en importør står bag indkøb og distribution i tæt samarbejde med DEUTZ-FAHR, men hvor de lokale forhandlere tager sig af alle kundernes behov. Det er en omkostningseffektiv model, der skal være med til at gøre DEUTZ-FAHR konkurrencedygtig på alle parametre, hvilket virkeligt har vist sig i 2022, hvor man har haft en markedsfremgang på 196%.

Udover dette, er vi også officel importør for FJD Autocut, som er verdens første elektriske og selvkørerende zero-turn græsslåningsmaskine, som kører på RTK signal med 2 cm nøjagtighed.
Vi har en stor tro på, at dette produkt virkelig vil være interessant for mange kommuner, hede selskaber, større virksomheder samt selvfølgende gartnere og landbruget.

Name: Farm Carbon Toolkit
Description:
The Farm Carbon Toolkit was created by farmers for farmers. For over a decade, we’ve worked to further the understanding of greenhouse gas emissions in agriculture. We provide tools and services to measure environmental impacts and run projects with farmers that inspire action on the ground.

June 2025 saw us transferring  to become a Employee Ownership Trust, a significant move to secure our long-term independence, deepen staff involvement, and strengthen our commitment to farmers, sustainability, and shared leadership.

We work to enable a diverse farming and food sector that is part of the climate and nature solution. We empower businesses to thrive with positive environmental and social impacts, underpinned by our evidence, expertise and respect.

Alongside our free Farm Carbon Calculator and Toolkit for farmers, we run various projects covering:

- The annual Soil Farmer of the Year and Carbon Farmer of the Year competitions.
- Peer-to-peer training and learning events on whole-farm and soil carbon footprinting;
- Farmer outreach and support projects;
- Bespoke advice and action planning with farmers, landowners and companies, centred around measuring and improving soil health, regenerative agriculture, greenhouse gas emissions and other ecosystem services;
- Professional training on greenhouse gas emissions, regenerative agriculture, carbon and climate change mitigation in agriculture.
- Partnerships with research institutions to further our understanding of soil carbon sequestration and best practice protocols for measurement, reporting and verification.
- Bespoke software integrations with supply chains and tech platforms through our Calculation Engine API.

Name: Green Doxa
Description:
Green Doxa is revolutionizing the agricultural industry with its cutting-edge technologies and innovative approach to farming. Our mission is to increase crop yields, reduce waste, and promote sustainable practices through the use of advanced technology.

Our team of experts has developed a range of solutions, including precision irrigation systems, drone-based crop monitoring, and AI-powered farming software. These technologies enable farmers to optimize their operations, reduce costs, and improve productivity.

With our precision irrigation systems, farmers can deliver the exact amount of water and nutrients to each plant, reducing waste and ensuring maximum absorption. Our drone-based crop monitoring system provides real-time insights into crop health, allowing farmers to identify issues early and take corrective action.

Our AI-powered farming software analyzes data from various sources, including weather forecasts, soil sensors, and crop monitoring systems, to provide personalized recommendations to farmers. This enables them to make data-driven decisions, reduce guesswork, and improve overall efficiency.

At Green Doxa, we are committed to empowering farmers with the tools and knowledge they need to succeed in today's fast-paced agricultural landscape. Join us in our mission to revolutionize farming and create a more sustainable future for generations to come.

Наша місія:
Ми сприяємо розвитку аграрного потенціалу України, забезпечуючи технології вирощування для отримання максимальної врожайності та якості сільськогосподарських культур.
Ми є надійним партнером для усіх сільськогосподарських виробників України.

Наша мета:
Бути лідером на ринку комплексного забезпечення аграрних виробників України. Йти вперед шляхом постійного удосконалення та інновацій.

Наші цінності:
Ми існуємо лише завдяки нашим клієнтам. Ми поважаємо і цінуємо наших клієнтів, розвиваємось разом з ними і швидше за них, щоб передбачити та задовольнити їх майбутні потреби.
Ми створюємо достойні умови праці і надаємо можливість займатися цікавою та захоплюючою роботою. Ми заохочуємо командний дух, професійний розвиток, прояв ініціативи та відповідальності.
Наші продукти та сервіси відповідають найвищим стандартам якості. Кожен з нас забезпечує якість у всьому, чим він займається.
Ми прагнемо досягати найкращих результатів, впроваджуючи інновації і вдосконалення на основі найновіших технологічних досягнень.
Ми знаємо, що ми робимо і використовуємо наші знання та досвід для отримання максимального результату. Ми не зупиняємся на досягнутому і завжди прагнемо до більшого.

“From Farms to Fortune – Building India’s Crop-roate Future.”
SRAPCL is not just another Farmer Producer Company. It is an Agri Venture-in-the-making — transforming from a grassroots FPO into a B2B AgriTech powerhouse that delivers scale, efficiency, and profitability across the agri value chain.

At the helm is Manmohan Singh, our Founder & CEO — a farmer by roots, an entrepreneur by vision, and what he proudly calls himself: a Crop-roate Farmer. He personifies SRAPCL’s mission to bridge the gap between farmer collectives and agri-tech commerce, taking farmer equity into the mainstream of India’s food economy.

 SRAPCL – AgriTech Business Verticals

 B2B Market Linkage: Wheat, paddy, pulses, oilseeds; direct supply to mandis, processors, exporters, corporates.
 Kisan Mall: Retail & e-commerce for seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, bio-stimulants; call centers + ERP.
 Drone & Bio-Stimulator: Precision spraying & yield-boosting inputs.
 Honey Processing: Collection, processing & SRAPCL branding.
 Animal Husbandry: Cattle care, fodder & livestock income support.
 Skill Development: Training, agronomy, soil testing, govt/CSR programs.
 Agri-Finance: WC loans, crop-cycle finance, NABARD, SFAC, AIF linkages.
 Processing & Infra: Milling, spice-processing, packaging (Ramdaya Premium), warehousing & cold storage.

 Vision: To be India’s first farmer-led AgriTech B2B venture, scaling farmer equity into profitable enterprises with farm-to-market linkages & technology adoption.

Name: Econutri-Project
Description:
ECONUTRI is a consortium of scientific experts and researchers from different disciplines, private companies, farmers’ associations, and stakeholders. ECONUTRI is partnering with six Chinese Institutions, four from public research and two from industry, to complement activities and to strengthen the scientific collaboration between Europe and China. The project will scientifically support the EU’s Green Deal in its target to reduce fertiliser use by least 20% by 2030, thereby reducing by 50% losses of nutrients associated with negative environmental impacts. More specifically, ECONUTRI will
address water pollution caused by NO3 and P leaching and run-off from cultivated soils, manure/slurry and plant residues,
as well as greenhouse gas (N2O, CO2, CH4) and NH3 emissions from cultivated soils, barns, and organic biomass
during storage, composting, and land application. ECONUTRI will optimise, validate, and demonstrate 24 innovative
technologies that currently have a TRL of 4-6, and will increase their TRL to 7-8. These technologies are integrated parts
of a holistic concept based on recycling of nutrients and organic material, novel machinery and fertilisers, novel decision support systems (DSS), and novel nutrient management plans incorporating nature-based solutions to reduce nutrient losses and to increase nutrient use efficiency. The expected results include hyperspectral analysis algorithms, advanced on-line DSS platforms to develop smart nutrient management plans for organic and conventional crops, protocols for circular cropping systems in open field and greenhouses, advanced emission monitoring feedback systems, novel manure
spreaders, variable rate technologies for precision fertilisation, smart fertilisers, and biostimulants increasing N use efficiency. ECONUTRI will establish eight demonstration sites and deploy a comprehensive range of dissemination,
communication, and exploitation activities to maximise the impact of the expected results and technologies.

Name: KLR Industries Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1984, KLR Industries Limited has built a legacy of excellence and reliability in the field of drilling solutions. With over 40 years of expertise, we are globally recognized for manufacturing and exporting advanced drilling rigs and accessories. Having supplied over 4,500 rigs to more than 60 countries, KLR has established a strong presence in sectors such as Water Wells, Mining, Construction, Piling, and Exploration.

What began with the production of DTH Bits and Hammers has grown into a comprehensive portfolio. Today, KLR offers a wide range of products, including Water Well Rigs, Mining Rigs (Surface and Underground Blasthole), Construction Rigs, Piling Rigs, Excavator Mounts, and Exploration Rigs. Our rock drilling tools—such as DTH, Top Hammer, Reverse Circulation (RC), Core, Rotary Tools, and Drill Rods—are designed to deliver precision, durability, and cost-efficiency, ensuring high performance in the most challenging environments.

At KLR, we adopt a customer-focused approach, offering customizable rigs with flexible configurations and power options to meet unique project requirements. Our commitment to world-class quality is evident in our ISO 9001:2015 certification, ensuring every product adheres to stringent standards of excellence.

Innovation is at the core of KLR Industries. Our dedicated R&D team continuously works to improve product efficiency, incorporating cutting-edge technologies to stay ahead of industry trends and address evolving market needs.

Beyond manufacturing, KLR is committed to providing exceptional after-sales support, ensuring seamless project execution globally. We proudly collaborate with governments and industries on major drilling projects, further cementing our legacy as a trusted partner in the drilling solutions space.

Name: Smarterra powered by SMAFINE
Description:
Smarterra is all about improving today’s food system in the direction of health and sustainability through the help of the inherent power of local food ecosystems empowered by leading science, technology and entrepreneurship. Smarterra hubs work by identifying strategic opportunities based on what already is there and then works on empowering those opportunities. A Smarterra hub has its own, distinct logic. A Smarterra hub is relentless in its strive for relevance.

A Smarterra hub could be a country but a better fit is a region or a specific place. The Smarterra hub unites all relevant parties around common understanding, shared insights and strategic directions. Smarterra hubs put an outsized focus on engaging all relevant parties and making the ecosystem work for everyone.

Name: GrazeMate (YC W26)
Description:
GrazeMate builds autonomous aerial mustering systems that help graziers move cattle calmly, frequently, and with far less time and effort. By using intelligent drones instead of helicopters, bikes, or horses, we make it practical to rotate stock more often, respond faster to pasture conditions, and manage larger herds with the same team.

We partnered with leading experts in low-stress stockmanship to teach our system how cattle actually think and move. GrazeMate reads their position, speed, and pressure, and applies the same calm, deliberate cues a skilled stockperson would, keeping herds together and stress low.

The result is better welfare for cattle, healthier pastures through tighter rotational grazing, and a dramatic reduction in the time, cost, and physical toll of mustering. GrazeMate exists to help farmers like our families manage their properties the way they've always wanted to.

Name: PT Andalan Artha Primanusa
Description:
PT Andalan Artha Primanusa (AAP) berdiri dengan semangat menjadi kontraktor pertambangan generasi baru yang mampu menghadirkan standar profesionalisme, keselamatan kerja, dan inovasi teknologi di industri tambang Indonesia. Perusahaan ini lahir dari kesadaran bahwa sektor pertambangan, khususnya batubara dan mineral strategis, bukan hanya tentang eksploitasi sumber daya alam, tetapi juga bagaimana menjalankannya dengan penuh tanggung jawab, efisien, serta memberi nilai tambah bagi masyarakat dan lingkungan.

Sejak awal berdirinya, AAP berfokus pada operasional pertambangan yang terintegrasi, mulai dari perencanaan tambang (mine planning), pengupasan lapisan tanah penutup (overburden removal), pengangkutan hasil tambang (hauling), hingga pengelolaan logistik pendukung. AAP juga terlibat aktif dalam proyek-proyek besar yang melibatkan penggunaan peralatan modern dengan standar internasional.

Kantor pusat perusahaan berada di Jakarta Utara, dengan lokasi tambang utama beroperasi di Muara Lawai, Kabupaten Lahat, Provinsi Sumatera Selatan. Dari sinilah perusahaan mengembangkan sayapnya, mengelola proyek pertambangan dengan mengedepankan keselamatan kerja, kepatuhan hukum, serta keberlanjutan lingkungan.

Visi

Menjadi kontraktor pertambangan terkemuka dan terpercaya di Indonesia dengan kredibilitas dan komitmen dalam memberikan hasil, didukung oleh fondasi operasi pertambangan yang solid, sistem yang terintegrasi, dan kerja tim yang luar biasa.

Misi

Memaksimalkan produktivitas operasional dengan sistem pemantauan yang sangat baik.

Melakukan identifikasi yang tepat dengan pemeriksaan data yang teliti sebagai peningkatan dan perkembangan berkelanjutan.

Memiliki pola pikir yang kuat dan tangguh untuk memiliki ketahanan mental dan emosional, agar mampu bangkit kembali dari kesulitan, mengatasi tantangan, serta beradaptasi dengan situasi sulit.

Memberikan solusi yang saling menguntungkan bagi para pemangku kepentingan.

Back Ground.

In Uganda, over 70% of the population are subsistence farmers yet over 35.7% are still below the poverty line.  Naturing small holder farmers of today into commercial farmers shall significantly improve household incomes thus a better future. Through increasing smallholder farmer access to genuine and affordable farm inputs, timely advisory services and market support, we endeavor to boost the SDGS; 1. No poverty, 2. Zero Hunger, 8 Decent works and Economic growth.

Agro and More was registered on 11th June 2021 and has since been operating with main office in Mpigi town off Masaka Road Church center zone A, Mukasa Building. The company operates in Uganda and Across East Africa region with branches in mpigi town, Kamengo, Kibibi, Bulo and Gombe regions.

We operate three foundries in Portugal:  two close to Oporto, Cruz Martins & Wahl Lda; and one near Lisbon, MDF Tramagal Lda.

With installed capacity to produce 15,000 Tons of castings per year, we can manufacture and deliver finished castings in a wide variety of alloys, for weights up to 10 Tons.

We keep engineering, pattern making, production, quality control, and machining under one roof, to create an efficient process and short communication lines, which reflects our commitment to ensure high quality products and on-time deliveries.

We are focused on long term customer satisfaction through competitive prices, high quality of castings, on time deliveries and efficient service.

Our core business is supporting customers with technical assistance in order to develop and produce wear solutions in materials resistant to abrasion, impact, corrosion, and temperature, to increase lifetime of components and achieve cost savings.

Name: Bharat Pro Value Chains Private Limited
Description:
Bharat Pro Value Chains Private Limited company founded in 2023, is revolutionizing the sector by promoting residue-free farming. They advocate for natural methods and organic farming, eliminating harmful chemicals and GMOs.

Their approach goes beyond individual farms. Bharat Pro spearheads the development of residue-free farming clusters, where farmers collaborate and share knowledge. This fosters a supportive environment for transitioning to organic practices, boosting yields and profits for small-scale farmers.

Innovation is key at Bharat Pro. They integrate cutting-edge technology like drones for precision agriculture. These drones help farmers monitor crops, optimize resources, and make data-driven decisions.

Sustainability is paramount. Bharat Pro promotes practices that conserve resources, protect biodiversity, and regenerate soil health. From using renewable energy to implementing water management strategies, they strive for a long-term, sustainable agricultural future.

Farmer empowerment is another pillar. Bharat Pro equips farmers with knowledge, resources, and market opportunities through training programs and financial support. Their goal is to empower farmers and improve their livelihoods.

Ultimately, Bharat Pro prioritizes safe and nutritious food. They implement stringent quality control measures and ensure products meet regulatory requirements.  They act as a trusted supplier and exporter, maintaining the integrity and safety of their food throughout the supply chain.

Driven by values like sustainability, community empowerment, quality, and innovation, Bharat Pro is leading the way towards a more resilient and prosperous agricultural future.

Description:
At Cultivate-Agri, we empower modern plantations and agribusinesses to thrive in today’s dynamic agricultural landscape. Our platform brings together real-time monitoring, resource optimization, automated contract settlement, and seamless accounting integration-delivering the tools you need to unlock new levels of productivity, profitability, and sustainability.

1. Plantation Management Optimization
Gain near real-time insights across your entire operation. Our solutions enable you to make informed decisions, streamline resource allocation, and optimize every aspect of plantation management-from workforce deployment to input usage-driving measurable improvements in yield and operational efficiency.

2. Efficient Contract Settlement and Check Roll Solutions
Simplify and secure your labor management. Cultivate-Agri’s contract settlement tools automate time and attendance tracking, ensure robust data handling, and integrate seamlessly with your accounting systems. This reduces manual errors, eliminates “ghost workers,” and accelerates payroll processing, helping you maintain compliance and build trust with your workforce.

3. Data-Driven Decision Making and Forecasting
Harness the power of comprehensive, multi-channel data collection. Our platform unifies digital and analog inputs-ranging from IoT sensors and mobile apps to smart paper forms-giving you a holistic view of your operations. Leverage advanced analytics and forecasting tools to drive sustainable growth, optimize resource use, and respond proactively to changing field conditions.

Why Choose Cultivate-Agri?
- Real-time control: Monitor field activities and resource use as they happen.  
- Automated processes: Reduce administrative burden and human error.  
- Seamless integration: Connect labor, operations, and financial data for end-to-end visibility.  
- Flexible data capture: Combine digital and paper-based tools for reliable data, even in remote areas.

Name: SecondSky
Description:
SecondSky by iyris is a breakthrough near-infrared radiation-blocking nanocomposite, designed to combat heat stress in farming while allowing light in. Developed in Saudi Arabia and tested in some of the world’s most extreme climates, SecondSky seamlessly integrates advanced technology into traditional agricultural practices—without requiring growers to change how they operate.

 Simple Upgrade, Big Impact. SecondSky is a direct replacement for traditional plastic greenhouse coverings. By embedding the iyris additive during manufacturing, SecondSky offers high transparency while blocking peak heat, allowing growers to protect crops, extend growing seasons, and boost yields—without sacrificing natural light.

 Award-Winning Innovation. Recognized with the prestigious Davidson Prize, SecondSky is celebrated for its contribution to the sustainable future of agriculture.

 Why Choose SecondSky?
 Extend crop seasons & increase yield 
 Reduce water & energy usage 
 Enhance plant resilience against heat stress 

SecondSky covers are available in Polyfilm, Polycarbonate, and Net—whatever your greenhouse needs, we’ve got you covered.

 Learn more: www.secondsky.com

Name: Agorabio
Description:
Within the scope of globalization processes in the field of sustainable development, applied to agriculture and the environment, several challenges have been collectively posed to people, companies and institutions, in order to, through a common harmony and cooperation with each other, define new models. of global development for all humanity with strategies of economic, environmental and human value.

Recent developments and the experience of the various sectors have shown that, more than a discussion around the idea of sustainable development, at the moment, it is the practical question of making the transition to sustainability and its permanence happen, which requires greater attention and acting.

Cooperation is the means by which, to establish and stabilize this transition in an adequate, feasible and lasting way, it is necessary that entities from different sectors with the integration and participation of communities, can jointly develop and apply the strategy for the implementation concrete and sustainable goals.

Humanization is the expression of the stable relationship between man and nature, which is only possible when man interacts with the environment in a healthy and conscious way.

More than an economic project, this is a humanization project through sustainability. Allowing not only the urgent environmental and ecological sustainability, but also, and consequently, the economic sustainability of families with fast-growing and healthy cultures, due to the quality of the soils and their use.

This clear sustainable benefit will also contribute to a model of sustainable citizenship, which focuses on a correct relationship between man and nature, through the correct use of natural and human resources.

A relationship that does not compromise the future man.

With a strong commitment to safety, precision, and client satisfaction, City Class has earned a reputation for delivering projects that meet international quality standards. Its advanced ERP-integrated system enhances efficiency by synchronizing all operational departments — from design and procurement to finance and project execution — ensuring transparency, accuracy, and timely completion.

City Class Water Technologies L.L.C. complements this expertise by offering innovative water and wastewater treatment solutions that promote sustainable resource management. The company provides cutting-edge systems for filtration, desalination, purification, and recycling, helping communities and industries achieve reliable, eco-friendly water infrastructure.

Together, these companies form a powerful alliance under the City Class Business Group, driven by the core values of honesty, teamwork, customer focus, and continuous improvement. Through its commitment to quality and sustainability, the Group continues to build a cleaner, smarter, and more resilient future for the UAE and beyond.

 Essa parceria das empresas busca oferecer soluções avançadas e eficientes para os desafios enfrentados pelos agricultores brasileiros, trazendo uma linha completa de tratores de 24cv a 247cv, fomentando o mercado brasileiro com qualidade, alto desempenho e tecnologia intuitiva, com o objetivo de proporcionar mais produtividade e menos custos aos produtores.

Name: SmartVitiNet
Description:
SmartVitiNet is an EU project funded by the European’s Union’s European Innovation Council and SMEs Executive Agency (EISMEA) for a Smart and Sustainable Drone-assisted Viticulture Excellence Network.

The SmartVitiNet project aims to (a) scale up, pilot and bring to the market an innovative holistic phytosanitary and plant protection system based on the use of  unmanned aerial vehicles, new observational platforms, and new ready-to-use sensors, and (b) establish a Competence Center for Precision Viticulture. 

The proposed research will not only enable the synergies between members of the quadruple helix, but more importantly, it will utilise their complementary knowledge, experiences, and infrastructure in the specific area to achieve the proposed innovative results. The sustainability of the undertaking will be ensured thanks to the establishment of the Competence Centre for Precision Viticulture which aims to upskill sector professionals, create expert networks, and facilitate permanent flows of knowledge transfer between academia, innovative SMEs, viticulture professionals, and regional authorities to increase sector competitiveness, while enacting EU environmental policies, reducing sector health impact and risks of food pollution. SmartVitiNet is expected to significantly impact regional and EU sectors of Agriculture, Health, Environment, and ICT. 

 SmartVitinet is an EU EISMEA-funded project, with 11 partners from 4 EU countries( Greece,  Portugal,  Cyprus, and  France) .

The implemented concepts and ideas will be deployed in several pilots where the feasibility of the work done will be verified and validated so that it will go beyond a theoretical proposition and be proven worthy of being used in a real-world scenario. 

The posts reflect the view of the project partners. The account is managed by the dissemination partner Future Needs Management Consulting Ltd. (www.futureneeds.eu)

Description:

BASE-UK is the perfect organisation to be part of if you are passionate about regenerative agriculture and the sustainability of the industry.

Membership advantages:
• Meetings – online webinars, and face to face with farmers, scientists and industry experts.
• Farm walks hosted by members to showcase their progress in regenerative agriculture.
• International visits – visit other countries to see how they manage their farms and have changed their working practices.  Recent visits have taken place to France and Denmark.
• Website – a phenomenal library of past speakers and event reviews.
• Forum – a private forum for discussions available only to members.
• Network of likeminded farmers and others interested in the benefits of regenerative agriculture.  We maintain at least 80% farmer members to ensure the preservation of our knowledge base.  Connect with other members to explore and discuss topics.
• Annual Conference – our premier event to network and learn.

Name: Grounded Lithium Corp.
Description:
Focused on moving our Kindersley project to environmentally responsible commercial production of Lithium from Brines.  Our current resource is 4.2 MM tonnes of Lithium Carbonate Equivalent with 1 MM of this resource in the Measured and Indicated category.  Our initial Preliminary Economic Assessment demonstrates top tier economics with a 49% Internal Rate of Return (After Tax) and a Net Present Value (8% Discount After Tax) of US$ 1 Billion on an investment of US$ 335 Million.  We accomplish these results not by accident but through a deliberate business plan.  
We achieve our strong economic outlook by deliberately identifying quality resource in quality rock in the least expensive area for development.  Our resource is in the shallowest area for development by typically half of our peers resulting in dramatically lower drilling and lifting costs.  We lack oil and gas associated with the brines that are contaminants to our industry and must be removed as they destroy the Lithium extraction process.  This provides for significantly reduced prefiltering costs.  Typical action plans of responsible resource development professionals. 
We look forward to pilot production of our resource and further drilling to advance more resources into the higher resource categories of Measured and Indicated.  
Our future plans are exciting and can move forward quickly toward commercial production.

Nuestra trayectoria se caracteriza por una constante innovación que busca no solo destacar la calidad de nuestros productos sino también anticipar la temporada de cosecha, inaugurando la temporada de cerezas en la Europa mediterránea desde abril.

Nuestras 19 hectáreas de cultivo están inmersas en un entorno privilegiado, lo cual nos permite dedicarnos al meticuloso cultivo de variedades seleccionadas, adoptando prácticas que priorizan la sostenibilidad y el respeto por el entorno natural.

La pasión que impulsa a Finca Albalate se refleja en cada etapa del proceso productivo, desde la selección de marcos de plantación hasta la implementación de sistemas de riego avanzados, todo orientado a garantizar una producción altamente eficiente y de la mayor calidad. Asimismo, nuestra colaboración con entidades de investigación y empresas especializadas subraya nuestro compromiso con la vanguardia agrícola, buscando constantemente el desarrollo de nuevos materiales vegetales.

En Finca Albalate, entendemos que la excelencia es el resultado de un enfoque detallado y apasionado en cada paso del cultivo. Bajo la dirección de Javier de Pablo Camarasa, ingeniero agrónomo, nuestro equipo está comprometido no solo con la producción de alta calidad, sino también con promover prácticas agrícolas que contribuyan a un futuro más sostenible.

Name: BHI Manufacturing: Contract Manufacturer & Project Engineering Services
Description:
• BHI MANUFACTURING
Based in the industrial hub of Richards Bay, KwaZulu-Natal, BHI is a 55% black-owned & 24% black women-owned company undertaking project engineering and contract manufacturing.
With 70 years of demonstrated expertise in complex engineering, heavy fabrication, and machining, our state-of-the-art facility has 45 000m² of undercover manufacturing area and performs to world-class standards.
Accredited with the ISO 9001: 2015 Quality Management System, BHI follows lean manufacturing principles for efficiency and cost-effectiveness. The latest technologies and innovations drive continuous improvement throughout the processes and assures quality of end products.
PRECISION MANUFACTURING PROCESSES:
• MATERIAL PREPARATION
BHI carefully selects, processes, and handles raw materials before they are transformed into finished products. This includes cutting, chamfering, bending, and rolling. BHI is capable of oxyfuel cutting up to 75mm material thickness, plasma cutting up to 32mm, and laser cutting to 12mm of a variety of metal sheets. BHI can perform 40- and 80-ton vertical bends of <150mm wide, 130- and 160-ton vertical bends of <3 000mm wide, and 520- and 600-ton vertical bends of <6 000mm wide.
Rolling is a form of bending primarily used to straighten material. BHI has the capacity to roll material no thicker than 20mm with a width of up to 1 000mm, or a thickness of 40mm and a width of up to 500mm.
• FABRICATION AND WELDING
BHI welding activities are controlled under ISO 3834-2 to deliver quality fabrication and supply world-class products to market. Quality assurance systems ensure that quality control measures are built into each work bay to deliver a proven reject rate of less than 0,07%. In addition, a comprehensive analyst support system allows tracing back to analyse the conditions under which parts or components were originally fabricated.
OUR TEAM
Our team of over 800 skilled machinists, welders, and assemblers are among the best in the country.

Name: FARM FRESH GAMBIA
Description:
The agricultural production is the main economy activity in Gambia but has declined as a result of several factors including poor rainfall distribution, weak marketing infrastructure, lack of access to credit (especially for youth and women) with limited resources base. The access to healthy and affordable food for the public is not easy, as well as the marketing of farmers’ products which is not developed and leads to the food waste and losses.

• BHI - BELL HEAVY INDUSTRIES
Based in the industrial hub of Richards Bay, KwaZulu-Natal, BHI is a company that undertakes project engineering and contract manufacturing.
With almost 70 years of demonstrated expertise in complex engineering, heavy fabrication, and machining, our state-of-the-art facility has 45 000m2 of undercover manufacturing area and performs to world-class standards.
Accredited with the ISO 9001: 2015 Quality Management System, BHI follows lean manufacturing principles for efficiency and cost-effectiveness. The latest technologies and innovations drive continuous improvement throughout the processes and assures quality of end products.

OUR PRECISION MANUFACTURING PROCESSES
• MATERIAL PREPARATION
BHI carefully selects, processes, and handles raw materials before they are transformed into finished products. This includes cutting, chamfering, bending, and rolling. BHI is capable of oxyfuel cutting up to 75mm material thickness, plasma cutting up to 32mm, and laser cutting to 12mm of a variety of metal sheets. BHI can perform 40- and 80-ton vertical bends of <150mm wide, 130- and 160-ton vertical bends of <3 000mm wide, and 520- and 600-ton vertical bends of <6 000mm wide.
Rolling is a form of bending primarily used to straighten material. BHI has the capacity to roll material no thicker than 20mm with a width of up to 1 000mm, or a thickness of 40mm and a width of up to 500mm.

• FABRICATION AND WELDING
BHI welding activities are controlled under ISO 3834-2 to deliver quality fabrication and supply world-class products to market. Quality assurance systems ensure that quality control measures are built into each work bay to deliver a proven reject rate of less than 0,07%. In addition, a comprehensive analyst support system allows tracing back to analyse the conditions under which parts or components were originally fabricated. 

OUR TEAM
Our team of over 800 skilled machinists, welders, and assemblers are among the best in the country.

Name: DRS Group
Description:
Established in 1984 by Mr. Rajiv Sabhlok, the DRS Group has emerged as a prominent mining, infrastructure, and mobility solutions provider. The company represents all four verticals of the renowned Volvo Group, including Volvo Construction Equipment, Volvo Trucks, Volvo Buses, and Volvo Penta. With its headquarters in Maharashtra and Jharkhand states, the DRS Group has built a reputation for excellence and reliability.

Under the visionary leadership of Mr. Rajiv Sabhlok, the DRS Group has achieved remarkable success through his exceptional business acumen and relentless hard work. In addition to the DRS Group, Mr. Sabhlok also founded UPVL (Upcountry  Vehicle Pvt Limited) in 2004. UPVL has become one of the esteemed dealers for Volvo Trucks in India, further contributing to the group's growth and reputation.

Carrying forward the legacy Mr. Divish Sabhlok founded IMPL (now DRS Millennium) in 2014. Serving as an authorized dealer for Volvo Buses in Mumbai, IMPL quickly expanded its services and added Volvo Penta Dealership to its portfolio. This strategic move allowed the DRS Group to enhance its offerings in the mobility solutions segment.

In 2019, Mr. Divish Sabhlok further diversified the group's operations by founding DRS Earthwork. This dealership specializes in Volvo Construction Equipment & Terex Finlay Crushers and caters to the needs of customers in Northern Maharashtra, Gujarat & Goa. With a strong focus on the mining and infrastructure sectors, DRS Earthwork has become a trusted partner for some of the largest companies in the region.

Today, the DRS Group is known for its commitment to quality, customer satisfaction, and innovation. With a comprehensive range of products and services, the group serves diverse industries, including mining, infrastructure development, transportation, and construction. The group's partnerships with esteemed manufacturers, such as Volvo Group, reinforce its dedication to delivering cutting-edge solutio

Name: AGaaS - Agriculture as a Service
Description:
AGaaS - Agriculture as a Service - is a farm mechanization services provider. Our aim is to bring the modern and rapidly growing technological advancements in Agriculture to the farmers and make it accessible and affordable to all the farmers.

Keeping in mind the day to day problems faced by the farming community, AGaaS is making the farmers' life easier by providing mechanization support. AGaaS Drone Services is the first initiative by us to counter the acute labour shortage for taking spraying operation at right time to contain pest & diseases. As the statistics states, Indian farmers experience 45,000+ snake bites and 2L+ Chemical inhale cases have been recorded which is majorly due to walking inside fields for agricultural operations & handling the pest control chemicals manually. Drone spraying not only helps in eliminating these risks, but also is proven to provide better efficiency and save water and time thereby reducing cost of cultivation and giving incremental yield and Income.

With AGaaS Drone Services, we are providing spraying services to farmers. Since inception AGaaS has covered 20,000+ Acres across 400 villages in 2 States and has a customer base of 1000+ farmers. Out ground team has so far reached 25,000+ farmers for creating awareness and educating on the benefits of Drone technology.

Name: Sycher International

Sycher parts are designed and developed by engineers with expertise in their fields keeping in mind the European and Japanese standards which match the forms of new technology and innovations. That is what Sycher is known for in the market i.e for “delivering excellence for extra miles”.
 
We focus on the concept of kaizen which empowers us with constantly improving, getting engaged in the market and theoretically conducting product research for better client satisfaction. Sycher along with its sub-brand SPARE MASTER is known for its Quality, Reliability, Trust and Authenticity in its whole supply chain mechanism and therefore, we call it a “SYCHER WAY”.
 
Besides manufacturing and supplying spare parts, our breakthrough is in the development of parts as per our clientele needs. The development process goes through the Sycher Way and it is done with the latest technological know-how in the industry.
 
We are committed to manufacturing and delivering spare parts to the automobile industries known to mankind and therefore in alignment with this Vision, we have started with the category of Tractors, Trucks & Trailers, Buses and Heavy Earth Movers and are planning to jump soon to cars and other Industrial sectors.
Our products are not only very easy to choose, order and ship to your destination country but it is also very easy to sell. We have a maximum fulfilment ratio of Quality, Sales, and Profit in the industry.

Pored novih zalivnih sistema bavimo se remontom i revitalizacijom postojećih zalivnih sistema. Izrađujemo tehničku dokumentaciju, obavljamo isporuku i montažu opreme, izvodimo radove na sanaciji i izgradnji crpnih stanica, opremanju bunara, izgradnji cevovoda, kompletnoj elektrifikaciji i automatizaciji sistema
Zastupnici smo kompanije RKD iz Španije koja proizvodi savremene mašine za veštačku kišu tipa: CENTAR PIVOT LINEAR i RENDŽER. RKD spada među najveće evropske proizvođače za ovu vrstu opreme. Njihove mašine se proizvode u Evropi u skladu sa evropskim normama kvaliteta UNE ISO 9001/2000 i karakteriše ih visok kvalitet komponenti, funkcionalnost, visoka pouzdanost u radu i fleksibilnost kada je u pitanju izbor odgovarajuće mašine prema obliku i veličini parcele koja se želi navodnjavati. Navodnjavanje pomoću ovih mašina pokazuje se ekonomičnim, u poređenju sa drugim načinima, već na površinama većim od 20 – 30 ha.
Sa svojim mašinama RKD je prisutan na svetskom tržištu preko 50 godina a na tržištu Srbije 20 godina.

Derneğimiz, üniversiteler, araştırma kurumları, resmi ve özel sektör kuruluşlarıyla iş birliği içinde, sektördeki gelişimi destekleyen projeler ve organizasyonlar gerçekleştirmektedir.

Name: TerraSweet International
Description:
TerraSweet was born from a deep love of the land and a passion for cultivating its finest treasures. Nestled by the Atlantic Ocean and surrounded by pine trees , our mission is to bring the sweetest, most nutritious sweet potatoes to your table—grown with care and a commitment to sustainability. We are not just farmers; we are caretakers of the earth, dedicated to harmonizing with nature to create a responsible, innovative farming cycle.

As Europe’s largest producer of sweet potatoes, TerraSweet is proud to offer a consistent, high-quality supply for 10 months of the year, ensuring our customers can enjoy the rich, vibrant taste of our harvests almost year-round. Every sweet potato we grow is the result of our careful stewardship of the land—nurturing the soil, reading the rhythms of the climate, and respecting the natural growth cycle to bring out the best flavor and nutrition.

At TerraSweet, each harvest tells a story. It’s a tale of patience, craftsmanship, and a deep respect for nature, carried through every step of our process. Our sweet potatoes are more than just a crop—they are the fruit of tradition and innovation combined. We believe that the future of farming lies in embracing time-honored methods while adopting forward-thinking practices that ensure both abundance and sustainability for generations to come. TerraSweet isn’t just about growing food; it’s about cultivating a future.

Name: Eco Crops UK
Description:
At Eco Crops Ltd, we work with landowners, farmers and energy companies alike to grow and source sustainable, high-quality wood biomass for both small-scale boilers and large-scale heating plants, animal bedding and various low carbon wood based products. And plant for biodiversity, carbon, land protection and various other end market products. 

We help connect companies with growers to identify and implement green supply chains and grower groups for end clients; providing an effective and sustainable source of energy while giving a source of income for local farmers.

As we establish long-term supply chain partnerships, growers will receive the knowledge and oversight needed for a successful harvest with good yields and quality products for end-market requirements. We only use a combination of tried and tested perennial wood crops to produce good quality wood chips with all the many long-lasting environmental, carbon and local community benefits. Biodiversity net gain and natural flood management , water quality are the bi-products for growing these wood based crops. 

Specialising in all wood based crops like Short Rotation Coppice (SRC) willow wood crops, SRC poplar and Short Rotation Forestry (SRF), woodland management we can provide both practical advice and hands-on support, from land preparation, project management and planting, harvesting machinery supply to honest and independent advice, woodchip, logs, round wood, briquettes/ heat logs , local supply chains, information and guidance to RHI, BSL, Woodsure & Ready to burn compliance and also help uncover the myths and misunderstandings of growing perennial crops.

Name: SOUL - Society for Organic Living
Description:
SOUL offers a complete proprietary toolkit of Education, Agri-input Products and Processes delivered through Phygital (Physical and Digital) means to the farmers to enable painless & seamless shift to Sustainable Nutrition farming from existing chemical based method.
Farmers want to shift to Organic farming. But only 2% of farmers practice Organic as Economics doesn’t work out. Farmer’s yield goes down discouraging new farmers, organic produce prices goes up for the lack of supply discouraging new consumers.
Inspired by Indian traditional practices, SOUL solves this problem for 10,000+ active farmers across the country backed by 10+ years of research.

Name: REENFORCE Project
Description:
-Any related posts reflect only the views of the project.-

REENFORCE, led by the Agricultural University of Athens, strengthens cross-sectoral collaboration and R&I excellence in Greece and Portugal, focusing on sustainable crop protection. Name: Organic121 Scientific Private Limited
Description:
Organic121 Scientific Private Limited is a pioneering company dedicated to providing innovative solutions in waste water treatment and the manufacturing of environmentally friendly plants. With a comprehensive range of services and cutting-edge technologies, Organic121 is at the forefront of the sustainable development movement. This article will delve into the company's core expertise, including waste water treatment processes such as ETP, STP, CETP, and FESTP, as well as its contributions to green energy production through the manufacturing of bio-cng plants, biogas plants, oxygen plants, argon plants, and more.
Waste Water Treatment 
1.1. Effluent Treatment Plant (ETP)
Organic121 offers state-of-the-art Effluent Treatment Plants (ETPs) to treat industrial wastewater and ensure compliance with environmental regulations. ETPs employ various processes such as physical, chemical, and biological treatments to remove pollutants, toxins, and contaminants from effluent before its safe discharge into water bodies.
1.2. Sewage Treatment Plant (STP)
The company's Sewage Treatment Plants (STPs) are designed to treat domestic and municipal sewage. These plants utilize biological processes such as activated sludge, trickling filters, or membrane bioreactors to remove organic matter, pathogens, and nutrients from wastewater, ensuring the protection of public health and the environment.
1.3. Common Effluent Treatment Plant (CETP)
Organic121's Common Effluent Treatment Plants (CETPs) are specifically designed to cater to industrial clusters or areas where multiple industries discharge their effluents. CETPs centralize the treatment process, offering cost-effective and efficient solutions for treating complex industrial effluents.

Name: Illinois Sustainable Ag Partnership
Description:
The Illinois Sustainable Ag Partnership (ISAP) brings together diverse member organizations who work collaboratively to encourage the adoption of sustainable and profitable production practices that improve soil health and restore local waters. One of the Partnership’s primary efforts is to support Illinois agriculture in meeting the goals of the Illinois Nutrient Loss Reduction Strategy (NLRS) by utilizing data and consistent messaging to increase the technical capacity of ag professionals while minimizing risk and increasing profits for farmers. 

ISAP’s programs are based on a combination of academic and on-farm research data, employing a “train-the-trainer” approach that results in a cadre of professionals who are able to inform and influence producers across the state. Programs can be grouped into four “Program Pillars” which guide the education, research, and outreach efforts of the Partnership. ISAP’s Program Pillars include:

- Production Risk Management
- Soil Health and In-field Management
- Water Quality and Edge of Field Practices
- Network of Practitioners

KAPPA AgTech's Silicone Substrate is the first-of-its-kind structural departure from disposable fibrous materials for plant propagation. Name: ProjectQRSargasso
Description:
As of August 2022, there were 24 million tons of Caribbean sargassum fluitans covering the Caribbean Ocean from Mexico to Brazil. 
The sargassum blocks underwater seabeds from receiving sunlight and nutrients and kills marine life during decomposition. Sargassum blooms increase every year with warming oceans and offshore nutrient discharges.
ProjectQRSargasso will process decomposing sargassum as a feedstock for sustainable fertilizer, biogas, and solid-state hydrogen gas. 
In environmental engineering processes, waste from one industrial process can serve as useful input for another process.
Our circular economy technology captures greenhouse gases from entering the atmosphere during sargassum decomposition and diverts this for energy sector decarbonization.

Description:
Το Μέλι Φλώρινας “Το Εμμελάκι” δημιουργήθηκε πίσω στο 2004, από δεύτερη γενιά μελισσοκόμων της μικρής πόλης. 

Η οικογένεια μας γνωρίζει καλά το ρίσκο και την προσπάθεια οποιασδήποτε καλλιέργειας στη φύση, ξεκινήσαμε λοιπόν με δειλά βήματα από μερικές κυψέλες στην πίσω αυλή, θέλοντας να προσφέρουμε στην κοινότητα το ίδιο αγνό προϊόν που είχαμε μάθει από μικροί. 

Τα μελισσάκια μας έγιναν οι πιο πολύτιμη μας συντροφιά και έτσι, στην πορεία της δεκαετίας, εξελιχθήκαμε σε ένα πιστοποιημένο συσκευαστήριο έξω από τη Φλώρινα. 

Αναγνωρίζοντας τον διατροφικό θησαυρό που βρίσκεται στα δάση και τις πεδιάδες, βάζουμε τα δυνατά μας για να παράγουμε όλες τις ποικιλίες μελιού που βρίσκονται στον τόπο μας. 

Ακολουθώντας άγνωστους χωματόδρομους και κυνηγώντας τις κατάλληλες καιρικές συνθήκες, το πάθος μας για τα μικρά θαυματουργά πλασματάκια και τη φροντίδα τους μεγάλωνε. 

Αποφασίσαμε λοιπόν να προσφέρουμε και σε εσάς λίγη από την εμπειρία μας, διατηρώντας το άρωμα και την ποιότητα του μελιού μας καλά σφραγισμένα πίσω από την ετικέτα με το όνομα της μικρής μας κόρης.

Τι καθιστά λοιπόν το μέλι μας τόσο ξεχωριστό;
Το προϊόν που σας προσφέρουμε έχει αναγνωριστεί ως βιολογικό, ένα τρόφιμο που γεμίζει με ενέργεια την κάθε μέρα σας. Η χρυσαφένια ρευστότητα του μελιού αποτελεί μια φυσική πηγή γλυκύτητας και θρεπτικών στοιχείων την οποία δεν έχετε παρά να απολαύσετε. Η φύση το προσφέρει απλόχερα, ενώ εμείς διασφαλίζουμε την προέλευση και την ποιότητά του μέχρι να φτάσει στο τραπέζι σας. Ίσως, αγαπάτε τα αγνά και ποιοτικά τρόφιμα, ή θέλετε να φροντίσετε την οικογένεια και το σώμα σας.

Η απάντηση βρίσκεται αναλλοίωτη σε ένα βάζο “Το Εμμελάκι”.

Name: Seneca Farms BIOCHAR
Description:
Biochar
We have the ability to produce a wide variety of biochars with our horizontal bed kiln, ranging in process temperature from sub 300° C to 750° C. Our modular post-pyrolysis processing systems can apply a wide range of treatments, including a simple water quench, a light acid wash to increase initial cation exchange capacity and decompose any residual poly aromatic hydrocarbons, nutrient impregnation, steam activation, and particle size reduction.

As discussed on our rationale page, the structural characteristics and biochemical properties of biochar affect its performance in a given application to a very significant degree.1 2 Hence the term “biochar” describes a family of diverse products rather than a single thing.3 4 To produce biochar for a given need, whether it is to increase soil fertility, maintain livestock health as a feed amendment, remediate contaminated soils or act as a filtration medium, the pyrolysis process must be variable and precise, and the biomass feedstock must be appropriate. Each particle of biomass must receive the exact same heat treatment, and the operator must be able to customize that heat treatment and the post-pyrolysis treatment, so the biochar particles produced have the properties needed for the application.

If biochar is used to increase soil fertility, we recommend that it be prepared to emulate humic matter as it is in soil.
Wood Vinegar
Wood vinegar, also known as pyroligneous acid, is a byproduct of our horizontal bed kiln. Our precise, staged pyrolysis method extracts wood vinegar from the condensates of the gases emitted up to 280° C. Research has shown that this is the ideal temperature range for wood vinegar to be used for agricultural purposes.5

Wood vinegar contains over 200 organic compounds, including acetic acid, methanol and furfural. It is widely used in Asian countries as a plant growth and germination stimulant.

Name: KOKAN Air Berry Harvester
Description:
KOKAN Air Berry Harvesters provide an innovative, unique and proven solution for effective harvesting of a wide range of fruits including blueberries for the fresh market, raspberries, blackberries and black currants.

KOKAN uses unique, innovative and patented Air Jet harvesting technology by pulsating air jets of controlled velocity and frequency that shake plant bush and detach the fruits, receive fruits with delayed free fall on the catching system and remove dry leaves/twigs by intensive air stream.

Unlike other industry-available harvesters, the process acts in a natural way, and without physical contact, causing no damage to the berries and plants.

KOKAN needs 3 - 4 staff only and replaces up to 200 pickers per day so that picking costs can be reduced up to 75%.

It can harvest in open fields, under the heil nets, in pots and in tunnels.

KOKAN will pay itself in approximately two seasons depending on farm set ups and use.

The company's new formula increases the potency of its active substance twentyfold, thereby requiring a smaller concentration than that of other products. Name: South India Coffee Company
Description:
With five generations of coffee growers in the family, South India Coffee Company has sprung from a rich tradition of coffee. Our passion for exquisite beans goes beyond meeting the discerning expectations of the third wave coffee movement. Having operations on the ground allows us to find the best micro-lots and single estate coffees in Southern India. 

We share every detail about every coffee bean we grow and source, we support everyone in the supply chain who are invested in quality coffee – from farmer to the exporter, to the roaster and the barista.

We grow and source the best green coffees from our farms and neighbouring framers. We process the beans with great care.  Our Q grader check the quality and scores the coffees which then are shipped by us to the roasters. We handle all the logistics until the coffee reaches your roastery in the UK and Europe. So, when we say direct trade we mean direct trade. 

The amount of physical labour, resources and land that is involved to produce a cup of excellent coffee is astonishing, yet the prices do not reflect all this effort. Higher prices are justified if there is a noticeable increase in quality. Thus, we believe that by increasing the quality of the coffee we export, our customers will be willing to pay higher prices for better quality, transparency, social and environmental sustainability.

Our journey starts with organically grown, single-origin hemp, cultivated sustainably and ethically. Solid Industrial Tyres
Solid tyres for compact construction equipment, aerial equipment and underground mining equipment are our core products and we constantly work on improving existing and developing new products.  Our customer facing distribution experience provides us insights to improve existing products & develop new products that enable the users of tyres to increase reliability & productivity.

Solid Tyre Performance Monitoring System
Traxter’s Principal, Trident has been granted a utility patent by the United States Patent Office (Patent number 10,017,017) for a device developed to capture and relay the temperature and usage of a solid tire.

Polyurethane Foam Filling
Tyre Filling is a process in which a pneumatic tyre is injected & pressurized with a special 2 component urethane polymer in a precise proportion using a special metering pump. The polyurethane cures into a soft, resilient, synthetic rubber core replacing the air in the tyre.

Product Features & Benefits
- Puncture Proof & Maintenance Free
- Enhanced Man & Machine Safety
- Better Ballast in overload conditions
- Extended Limp-in Capability
- Suitable for vehicles with a maximum operating speed of 90 Km/hr & Industrial equipment for which semi- solid tires are not available

Typical Applications
- Access Equipment
- Defense & Paramilitary

Name: TropAg International Agriculture Conference
Description:
The next TropAg conference will be held 11-13 November in 2025 at the Royal International Convention Centre.

TropAg will feature leading Australian and international scientific voices who are actively engaged in advancing research and raising awareness of the many challenges in the diverse field of agriculture and food production.

TropAg will celebrate its fifth international conference in Brisbane, Australia, with more than  700 delegates fromover 40 countries, including high-profile keynote speakers, leading scientific experts, and agriculture industry leaders.

TropAg is hosted by The University of Queensland – a world leader in agriculture and food research, with support from a Scientific Committee, an International Advisory Committee and vital partners and sponsors.

Delegates are encouraged to attend the conference to network and learn from colleagues and leading international scientific voices from across the globe, who are actively engaged in advancing research and raising awareness of the many challenges in the diverse field of agriculture and food production.

The three-day TropAg conference will include plenary speakers, concurrent symposia sessions and social networking events.
