Name: Luisetti Seeds
Description:
Luisetti Seeds was established in 1932 and has remained in the Luisetti Family to the present day. There are 3 Luisetti family members currently working for the company, which has a permanent staff of around 60.

We like to establish long-term relationships with our customers and suppliers, and in some cases, have been dealing with farming families for 3 or even 4 generations.

The company began life as V. Luisetti & Co; a Grain Merchants and Seed Dressing Store on Ashley Street in Rangiora. The company name was later changed to Luisetti Seeds.

In 2009 Stapletons in Ashburton became a fully-owned subsidiary of Luisetti Seeds. In August 2009 we completed a new, centrally located, warehouse in Ashburton, including a purposely designed shed, separate offices and sealed yard.

We produce seed in New Zealand for our local customers and export New Zealand seed around the world. We regularly service our wholesale clients with marketing material, customer field days and staff training, keeping them up-to-date with our new cultivars and other developments.

We are also proud to be involved with our local community and to support young people in Canterbury.

Several years ago, Luisetti Seeds partnered with Lincoln University to support agriculture students by rewarding excellence in their plant science papers. Luisetti Seeds already had a relationship with this programme as a supporter of the Dryland Pastures Research project so an award was a natural extension. The award, guided by Luisetti Seeds, is for the top performing student in the 200 level Plant Production Systems course.

We have been the principal sponsor of Canterbury Country Rugby since 2011. We proudly support the North Canterbury, Mid Canterbury and Ellesmere sub-unions to deliver the Division 1 Luisetti Seeds Combined Country Cup, the Hunnibell Cup, Watters Cup and Coleman Shield competitions.

Name: Global Farm Trust (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
GLOBAL FARM TRUST

The Global Platform for Land Access and Agricultural Collaboration

Global Farm Trust is a pioneering initiative that connects uncultivated farmland with skilled farmers, creating productive agricultural ventures that empower communities, increase food security, and unlock value for landowners and farming families.
We bring together landowners, farmers, cooperatives, governments, NGOs, and agricultural investors through a structured and secure platform that enables transparent partnerships. Our model ensures both parties are legally protected and supported through government compliance, verified documentation, and professional project structuring.
As a global catalyst for modern agriculture, we introduce technology-driven farming, training, climate-smart practices, and profit-sharing frameworks that improve livelihoods for women, youth, and rural communities.

Our Mission
To make every acre count by transforming idle land into productive farms through collaboration, innovation, and sustainable agricultural systems.

What We Do
Match unused land with capable farmers
Facilitate legal agreements and government compliance
Establish modern farms using polytunnels, greenhouses, and hybrid systems
Train farmers and youth through approved agricultural programs
Enable landowners to earn passive income safely and transparently
Build community-based farming networks across countries
Support ESG goals, food security, and rural development
Expand globally through cross-border agricultural partnerships

Where We Work

Starting with Sri Lanka as the pilot model, Global Farm Trust is expanding to:
Asia, Africa, the Middle East, and South America, creating a worldwide network of community-based farms.

Who We Serve
Landowners with unused or underutilized land
Farmers with skills but no land access
Women and youth seeking empowerment through agriculture
Cooperatives and farmer associations
Governments seeking food security solutions
Impact investors and donors
END

Waste-Protein Tech is a Bio-Refinery company. We upcycle organic waste using the Black Soldier Fly (BSF) larvae an insect native to Africa. We processed organic waste and turning into animal & fish feed and fertilizer.

When we look at the Agriculture section then we realise that 70 per cent of the cost comes from feed or fertilizer for livestock farmers and crop farmers. So we have started working on these issues to bring a revolution in the animal feed and Organic fertilizer Industry in Tanzania. Also educating local farmers on how to use organic fertilizer and organic feed for their livestock farm.

By introducing waste to valuable raw materials, we want to bring a revolution in the animal & fish feed and organic fertilizer industry in Tanzania

Name: Ranidae Fisheries
Description:
Ranidae Fisheries is at the forefront of revolutionizing agriculture in Southeast Asia. As the region's leading bullfrog farming and distribution authority, we are driven by a vision to introduce sustainable and innovative farming practices. Guided by a team of dedicated experts, we embarked on a journey to establish Southeast Asia's foremost bullfrog farming enterprise. Over the years, our commitment to excellence and unwavering focus on quality has earned us the trust of partners and clients across the region.

Ranidae Fisheries proudly boasts the development of Asia's first frog aquaponics system. This groundbreaking technology integrates bullfrog farming with hydroponics, creating a symbiotic ecosystem that maximizes efficiency and minimizes environmental impact. Our aquaponics system exemplifies our dedication to pushing the boundaries of sustainable agriculture.

Our farms are not just facilities; they are ecosystems carefully designed to mimic the natural habitat of bullfrogs. We prioritize ethical breeding, employ eco-friendly technologies, and implement waste-reduction strategies, ensuring that every step of our production process treads lightly on the environment.

We believe that quality is non-negotiable. Our stringent quality control measures are the foundation upon which we build our reputation. Each bullfrog that leaves our facilities is a testament to our commitment to excellence. Known for their superior taste, tender texture, and exceptional nutritional value, our products are a testament to the meticulous care and attention to detail that goes into every aspect of our operations.

Beyond our farms, Ranidae Fisheries is deeply committed to the communities we serve. We believe that responsible agriculture is a shared responsibility, one that involves uplifting the lives of those around us. Through partnerships, education, and outreach initiatives, we aim to create a network of stakeholders who share our vision of sustainable agriculture.

Nossas soluções são construídas a partir da integração de sensores óticos, robótica, tecnologia aeroespacial e inteligência artificial. Oferecemos resultados de forma rápida e padronizada, que são facilmente integráveis a outros sistemas e equipamentos de nossos clientes.

Nossos serviços e tecnologia maximizam o desempenho da lavoura, permitindo o fornecimento de informações em tempo real para apoiar as decisões dos produtores. Com respostas mais ágeis e precisas para as anomalias identificadas no campo, a otimização no uso de recursos é imediata.

A missão da Elio Tecnologia é fornecer ao produtor agrícola, com agilidade e a preços competitivos, as melhores imagens e informações geo-referenciadas. Ao utilizar o tipo de tecnologia e nível de serviço que oferecemos, os produtores podem incrementar a produtividade, ao mesmo tempo que reduzem seus custos com insumos (sementes, fertilizantes e pesticidas)

Name: Honeybee Discovery Center
Description:
The tiny world of honeybees goes by every day virtually unnoticed and most often, unexplained. These tiny creatures are responsible for one out of every three bites you eat. The honeybees are in jeopardy, and they need your help.

The Honeybee Discovery Center’s mission is to teach people about honeybees and other pollinators and the vital they play in our food supply and feeding the world.  It is a place to discover the science and art of beekeeping, for bee education and research and role every person can play to save the bees. 

Once constructed, it will be the only Bee Museum in the United States. Currently, the Honeybee Discovery Center is in a temporary facility in the Queen Bee Capital of North America, Orland CA. 80 percent of all queens are cultivated in this rural area of Northern California.

Honeybees are….
•	Essential to agriculture.
•	Vital for the preservation of ecological balance and biodiversity in nature. 
•	The only insects that produce a food that is consumed by humans.
•	Vanishing at nearly 40 percent per year. 

About the building – sustainability keywords

“We need the bees. And the bees need our help.” Carolina Burreson, Beekeeper

This is why a group of retired educators who understand the need stepped up and took action to Save the Honeybees and preserve the history of Beekeeping in North America. They are doing it the only way they know now, by teaching as many people as possible about the role of honeybees and other pollinators. 

Our journey isn’t complete without your help, your contribution, your knowledge about bees and our shared desire to preserve the art of beekeeping and ensure that honeybees live on. 

Make a contribution TODAY and help us get one step closer to our dream 
DONATE ONLINE>> https://www.honeybeediscoverycenter.org/donate

Name: WeNeW Carbology LLC

Some of the fuel pellets are then shipped to our biorefineries where the MEfuel process synthesizes >160 gal of diesel and/or aviation fuel per ton pellets. Our advanced process designs & scaling overcome the conventional barriers & costs to biomass capture & conversion into net-zero diesel & aviation fuels with drop-in replacement quality. The modular, highly flexible biorefinery & depot designs are readily adaptably & retrofitable for widespread, aggressive deployment throughout the US for current & future market scenarios. Name: COYF (Canada's Outstanding Young Farmer's Program)
Description:
Since 1980, Canada’s Outstanding Young Farmers Program (COYF) has been dedicated to identifying, celebrating, and connecting the next generation of agricultural leaders. Our alumni aren't just farmers; they are the voices shaping policy, driving technology, and leading the global conversation on where our food comes from. We recognize the innovators under the age of 40 who are not only excelling in their farming operations but are also redefining the industry through sustainable practices and sharp business acumen.

Our Mission
We provide a national platform to showcase the ingenuity and commitment of young farmers across seven vibrant regions. By highlighting their success, we aim to foster a resilient, innovative, and sustainable future for Canada’s food systems.

What We Do
The COYF program is more than an awards ceremony—it is a launchpad for visionaries and a hub for industry collaboration:

Recognition: We honor regional champions who demonstrate excellence in production, environmental stewardship, and community involvement.

Networking: We facilitate a unique forum where exceptional individuals share groundbreaking techniques and learn from one another’s successes.

Inspiration: We provide a glimpse into the ever-evolving world of Ag-Tech and the pivotal role young leaders play in cultivating a secure food future.

Why It Matters
Agriculture is the backbone of the Canadian economy. By supporting young farmers, we are sowing the seeds for a more innovative and sustainable landscape. 

Join the Movement: Whether you are a producer, an industry partner, or a consumer passionate about innovation, we invite you to explore the stories of these remarkable individuals.

 Follow us for:
- National & Regional Event Updates
- Success Stories from our Alumni
- Insights into Sustainable Farming & Ag-Innovation

Name: Zunde Group
Description:
Transforming smallerholder farmers into sustainable agribusiness. 

Zunde is a Shona word which refers to a traditional granary, it is aligned to a food security system order which was established by the Rozvi empire, the founders of Great Zimbabwe. Zunde also refers to a collective effort by communities in achieving collective goals , in traditional communities the collective effort was towards achieving food security. Zunde Group is a platform to mobilize resources, eradicate hunger and achieve food security on the continent through an integrated approach.

Africa is rich with resources and one key resource the continent has is agriculture. Agriculture is a critical component in the GDP of many African countries and yet only 16% of the Agribusiness economy is traded amongst African countries. We as the Zunde Group would like to play a key role in increasing these margins and insuring that businesses in the agricultural sector see the African continent as a target market.

The Zunde Group has four major pillars of work which are the facilitation of trade and investments in agribusiness in Africa, providing accurate information to African stakeholders in the agricultural sector, linking all the stakeholders in the entire agribusiness value chain as well as to create platforms for local companies to expand their markets.

Description:
At Horticultural Analytics Global (HORT-AG), we are the world’s leading non-profit horticultural analytics firm, committed to researching, developing, and implementing sustainable technologies and processes that help our clients thrive in an ever-changing ecological landscape. We recognize that the world of agriculture and horticulture is rapidly evolving due to environmental pressures, and our mission is to ensure that businesses and communities can adapt effectively and sustainably.

We specialize in providing data-driven insights and innovative solutions that support ecological balance while maximizing productivity and efficiency. Whether you're a commercial grower, agricultural researcher, or industry leader, we offer tailored consulting services to address the unique challenges you face, from reducing environmental impact to enhancing resource management.

Our core areas of focus include:

Sustainable Technology Innovation: Pioneering plant-based alternatives to petrochemical products, including cutting-edge bioplastics and 3D-printed hemp products.

Environmental & Agricultural Analytics: Offering advanced analytics to optimize agricultural practices, increase yields, and improve resource management, all while staying aligned with sustainability goals.

Name: Scottish Quality Crops (SQC)
Description:
SQC is Scotland’s assurance body for combinable crops. The SQC logo gives the supply chain confidence that the grain they are buying has been grown to a set of high standards that include food safety, quality and good practice. 

It's a voluntary membership organisation representing over 3000 growers in Scotland wishing to access domestic and global markets through quality assurance standards. 

Grain grown in Scotland is bought both globally and in the UK for brewing for beer, distilling for whisky, milling for flour and for biofuels. SQC's role is to ensure that the grain meets the basic core standards required by the supply chain and the markets, and by doing this, to maximise market potential for Scottish growers of wheat, barley and oilseeds.
  
SQC sets the standards - based on a sound understanding of supply chain and market needs - and Food Integrity Assurance (FIA) carries out the assessments on farm to provide the independent certification of quality assurance. 
  
SQC is run on a very lean model with one part-time member of staff, the Managing Director, supported by a cooperative board of experts from across the sector, including growers, maltsters, millers and technical specialists. 
  
SQC works collaboratively with the whole supply chain to ensure the standards remain relevant and give its members the widest access to lucrative global and premium markets. 

For full details see our website at sqcrops.co.uk 

This LinkedIn page is to share insights, updates and engage with growers and stakeholders on SQC’s crop quality assurance standards and practices. We welcome constructive discussion and the sharing of useful information. In order to keep this page informative for everyone, we ask that exchanges remain respectful, relevant and on the topic of quality assurance for Scottish crops. Personal attacks or repeatedly unconstructive or off-topic comments may be removed.  

SQC is always open to feedback. Please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Name: Snobelen Farms Ltd.
Description:
Snobelen Farms Ltd. – Quality Without Compromise
Founded in 1971 by Mike and Judy Snobelen, Snobelen Farms Ltd. is a family-owned and operated agricultural company based in Lucknow, Ontario. With a legacy rooted in southern Bruce County, the company has grown from its humble beginnings—starting with two grain bins on a home farm—to become a leading producer, processor, and exporter of food-grade soybeans, commercial grains, and pedigreed seed.

Our Evolution
In 1976, Snobelen Farms expanded by acquiring the Lucknow elevator, followed by the Dungannon elevator in 1987. The 1990s marked a significant milestone as the company began exporting non-GMO, food-grade soybeans to meet European consumer demand. This expansion continued with the acquisition of facilities in Tiverton (2015), Blyth (2012), Brantford (2017), and Palmerston (2018), where a state-of-the-art seed processing and treating plant was established in 2020.

Our Operations
Operating eight elevator locations across southwestern Ontario, Snobelen Farms employs approximately 60 full-time staff members. The company's facilities are equipped to handle a variety of crops, including corn, wheat, soybeans, and flax. The Lucknow location specializes in cleaning, processing, and packaging food-grade soybeans using advanced equipment such as air-screeners, density separators, de-stoners, belt-sorters, and optical color sorters. The Palmerston facility focuses on seed processing for soybeans, wheat, and spring cereals.

Our Commitment
At Snobelen Farms, we are dedicated to maintaining the integrity, identity, and purity of our products. Our comprehensive quality assurance programs ensure that our food-grade soybeans meet the highest standards for safety and traceability. With a focus on exceptional customer service and innovative agricultural practices, we continue to support local farmers and serve markets across Canada and internationally.

Name: ERIM - Empowering Rural India Mission
Description:
For decades, India's farmers have fought a quiet, losing battle - against rising costs, falling prices, broken systems, and broken promises. And yet, they’ve never given up.

Empowering Rural India Mission (ERIM) was born from this very spirit - to stand with our farmers, not as beneficiaries, but as leaders of a new rural revolution. 

ERIM is a bold, mission-led initiative committed to transforming rural India through the creation of SMART FPOs - Sustainable, Market-linked, Adaptive, Responsive, and Technology-enabled Farmer Producer Organizations. ERIM is envisioned as a “vibrant and sustainable ecosystem” for India’s agricultural sector. 

Driven by a consortium of passionate and seasoned agriculture professionals, ERIM empowers farmers, SHGs, and rural entrepreneurs with capacity building, digital tools, transparent governance, and last-mile delivery of government schemes. We address deep-rooted gaps in rural development by combining grassroots action with cutting-edge science.

Our mission includes:

* Converting lakhs of acres to climate-smart and natural integrated farming
* Ensuring clean, affordable food for all
* Generating sustainable rural employment
* Making FPOs engines of self-reliance and local enterprise
* Pioneering innovation through next-gen agri-science

ERIM is more than a project - it’s a movement for self-reliant villages, thriving farmers, and a resilient rural economy. 

ERIM invites every stakeholder - from policymakers and investors to scientists and soil-tillers - to walk together, with humility and purpose, to rewrite the story of rural India, making Farmers win with Dignity, Pride, and Sustainability.

Because when the farmer rises, Bharat rises.

Movimentar e transportar com eficiência é o que fazemos!

Quando uma operação precisa transferir materiais de um ponto a outro com segurança, força e agilidade, é exatamente aí que o Grupo Roll Center entra em ação.

Somos especialistas em garantir o fluxo contínuo dessa movimentação, sem paradas, sem falhas e sem perda de produtividade.

Como Atendemos:

Com um modelo de atendimento que reúne todas as soluções de movimentação industrial em um só lugar, o Grupo Roll Center elimina a necessidade de múltiplas cotações, reduz custos com fretes e elimina as complexidades de lidar com diferentes prazos e fornecedores.

Aqui, o cliente informa o que precisa e resolve tudo com um único time técnico especializado, do atendimento à entrega, de forma simples, direta e eficiente.
Mais agilidade, menos burocracia e máxima produtividade para sua operação que:

-Evita contratempos logísticos

Além do fornecimento de equipamentos, também oferecemos apoio técnico especializado e serviços como emendas de correias a frio e a quente, vulcanizações e instalações em campo.

Esse suporte garante que a operação do cliente funcione sem interrupções e com total segurança operacional.

Name: Tuyoponik.id
Description:
Hidroponik adalah salah satu metode urbanfarming yang perlu dikenalkan pada masyarakat luas sebagai solusi mencukupi kebutuhan pangan mandiri rumah tangga dilahan yang terbatas. Cukup dari halaman rumah, area kantor dan atap gedung, masyarakat sudah bisa menghasilkan produk hasil tani. Bersama Tuyoponik hadir untuk mengedukasi bercocok tanam kepada lingkungan masyarakat sekitar serta siap menyediakan produk dan jasa Instalasi Hidroponik beserta kelengakapannya.

Sadar bahwa kebutuhan pangan dan kebutuhan untuk hidup sehat terus meningkat, masyarakat yang mulai berminat untuk mengkonsumsi sayuran sehat hidroponik dengan konsisten, namun harga sayuran hidroponik termasuk sayuran mahal, pengeluaran belanja harian pun meningkat. Dengan instalasi hidroponik, Meski kebutuhan pangan sayur sehat meningkat, untuk mensiasati agar keperluan belanja pangan harian tidak serta meningkat, solusinya dengan berkebun mandiri dihalaman rumah dengan instalasi hidroponik.

Mulai banyak peminat bertani dengan hidroponik namun karena keterbatasan waktu, banyak juga yang mengurungkan niatnya untuk berhidroponik dengan alasan rumit dan khawatir gagal dalam pembuatan instalasinya saat ini masyarakat tidak perlu lagi kawatir gagal dalam memulai hidroponik, Tuyoponik hadir untuk mendampingi dan memenuhi kebutuhan instalasi hidroponik. Tuyoponik siap untuk menyediakan media tanam dan perlengkapan hidroponik yang dibutuhkan masyarakat.

Tuyoponik hadir sejak Januari 2020 dengan arah usaha produk dan jasa hidroponik yang menyediakan perlengkapan dan juga instalasi media tanam hidroponik serta pembangunan Greenhouse Hidroponik. Produk ini merupakan solusi dari model urbanfarming dimana semua orang masih bisa bercocok tanam walaupun tidak memiliki lahan dengan tanah yang subur bahkan dilahan yang terbatas sekalipun.
Tuyoponik juga mendampingi setiap customer yang memulai berhidroponik. Jadi customer tidak sampai khawatir tidak bisa berhidroponik.

Name: Youth Agri-preneurs Development Initiative
Description:
Africa's agricultural sector, identified as having the lowest productivity globally (Maiga, 2015), contributes to food insecurity and malnutrition. With an estimated ten million African youth entering the labor market annually, engaging them in agribusiness is crucial for employment and development. The negative perception of agriculture among the youth, influenced by factors like traditional farming challenges and economic uncertainties, hinders their involvement. Addressing these constraints is vital for improving agricultural productivity and food security in Africa (FAO, 2023).


The Youth Agripreneurs Development Initiative (YADI) aims to support sustainable agricultural development and economic progress in Namibia, fostering the expansion and triumph of young people in agribusiness.

The primary objectives of YADI include providing financial support to youth-owned agribusinesses, offering capacity-building programs, facilitating market access, agro-processing and value addition, creating employment opportunities, industry information sharing, and supporting research initiatives for innovation within the sector.

What We Offer

Energy-Saving Technology: Our biogas and solar-powered machines free farmers from dependence on unreliable electricity.

Training Programs: We equip farmers with the knowledge and skills needed to reduce chick mortality and improve productivity.

Local Solutions: By building a factory in the region, we create jobs and lower the cost of poultry production for the community.

Our Vision
We envision a future where Nigerian farmers thrive, supported by modern, eco-friendly technology.

Name: Agritopia for Agricultural Technology
Description:
Agritopia provides innovations for agriculture, our brightest star is AutoFarm' targeted at applying a better water use efficiency initiative and upgrading the productivity of  agricultural sector by enabling greenhouse owners to control and monitor their crop requirements. 
AutoFarm will adjust the greenhouse environment to provide optimum farming conditions for specific crops, such as providing accurate water and fertilizer quantities. Not only will this produce an increase in product quality and yield, but it will decrease production costs to farmers who will reduce water wastage and use of agrichemicals in farming.

AutoFarm is a system combining traditional farming with new hydroponic technology. By utilizing the 'AutoFarm' system, which is set up to use specific quantities of water and fertilizer according to experts’ recommendations, the water consumption will decrease by up to 30% and decrease chemicals by at

least 25%. The effects of this are two fold: both reducing greenhouse production costs and reflecting positively on health. This innovation is game-changing because 'AutoFarm' is a fully automated system that can water plants,plant seeds, measure soil moisture, and distribute fertilizer without the help of a human hand.
Water quantity and chemical measurements for each plant will be already installed within the system according to expert recommendations, thus allowing the system to effectively and efficiently farm the plants without the physical assistance of a human.
By applying the AutoFarm system, you will reduce the costs of production and improve crop marketability in terms of reducing costs by: Reducing water wastage. Through ensuring exact calculated amount of water required for irrigation needs. Reducing fertilization requirements due to avoidance of over irrigation patterns. Reducing the percentage of damaged crops. and Improving marketability.

Name: CropCopters
Description:
At Cropcopters, we are leading a technological revolution in agriculture, harnessing the power of UAV and AI technologies to transform modern farming. Over the past six years, we have developed innovative solutions that empower farmers to make smarter, data-driven decisions. Our cutting-edge UAVs provide real-time insights into crop health, soil conditions, and pest infestations, while our AI systems analyze this data to deliver actionable recommendations for optimizing yields and resource management.

By adopting precision agriculture practices, farmers can now target specific areas for irrigation, fertilization, and pest control, reducing waste, labor costs, and environmental impact. Cropcopters is committed to promoting sustainability by enabling more efficient use of water, chemicals, and energy, helping to reduce the overall carbon footprint of farming operations. Our technology is also proactive, offering predictive insights that allow farmers to prevent crop loss and enhance productivity.

Beyond increasing efficiency and reducing environmental harm, Cropcopters innovations are vital in addressing global food security challenges. As the world’s population grows, our UAV and AI systems help farmers boost production, adapt to climate changes, and maintain sustainable practices.

At Cropcopters, we’re not just advancing agricultural technology—we’re creating a smarter, more sustainable future for farming. Our solutions empower farmers of all sizes to maximize their potential, reduce their environmental impact, and ensure that agriculture can meet the demands of tomorrow.

Name: SimplifyAgri
Description:
Simplify Agri is an intelligent platform designed to assist farmers in India by simplifying their daily activities and optimizing their farming processes. 
1.	Simplify Agri provides a user-friendly mobile application available on both Android and iOS platforms. Farmers can use this app to track their daily processes and activities easily.
2.	Farmers can record and log their daily activities, ensuring they understand their farming processes better. By keeping track of their work, they can identify weak points, avoid repeating mistakes, and strive for better performance.
3.	The live information collected from farmers is analyzed by authorized service providers. These experts help interpret the data, identify patterns, and offer insights to optimize farming practices.
4.	Simplify Agri aims to minimize the effort required for cultivation while improving productivity. By streamlining processes and providing actionable insights, farmers can achieve better results with less effort.
5.	By recording processes and analyzing data, farmers can reduce risks associated with farming. Understanding the entire process allows them to make informed decisions and mitigate potential challenges.
6.	Process Optimization and Traceability: Improved process recording leads to better process optimization and traceability. This, in turn, enhances the scope for sales and branding of farm produce.
7.	With a significant percentage of farmers living in rural areas, uplifting their profession through technology can improve their income and social dignity. A prosperous farming community contributes to the overall well-being of the rural economy.
8.	The solution is designed to be user-friendly and self-explanatory, even for farmers who are not tech-savvy. It ensures that technology becomes accessible and beneficial to all.

Forumul Agricultorilor și Procesatorilor Profesioniști din România (FAPPR) este o organizație profesională federativă formată din producători agricoli și reprezentanți ai lanțului profesional agricol din România.

FAPPR susține vocea fermierilor români din 2012, fiind un constant partener de dialog civil al autorităților de la București și Bruxelles, militând în numele membrilor săi pentru soluții și măsuri de politici publice corecte și proporționale.

----------------------------------
The Romanian Forum of Farmers and Professional Processors (FAPPR) is a federative professional organization bringing together agricultural producers and representatives of the agri-food value chain in Romania.

Since 2012, FAPPR has been the trusted voice of Romanian farmers, actively engaged as a civil dialogue partner with authorities in Bucharest and Brussels, advocating on behalf of its members for fair and proportionate agricultural policies and solutions.

Name: West Coast Tomato Grower's Inc.
Description:
Nestled between the rolling hills of the San Luis Rey Valley and the nearby Pacific Coast, Oceanside Pole has the perfect microclimate to grow bright and flavorful produce. The invigorating ocean air that graces cool, misty mornings and warm afternoons produces a hearty tomato flavor and the tastiest Brussels sprouts that simply can’t be matched elsewhere. Walking the fields each day of the season, Mr. Singh and his son Priya take pride in personally examining and tending to each plant to ensure it’s picked only when the time is right. Proving again that their dedication, precision and innovation on the land is unmistakable.

The Singh family and their team place over a million poles on the property every spring, so each one can brace a single tomato plant through the season. This system raises the fruit off the ground to improve airflow—and therefore tomato quality—to ripen to their juicy, robust taste, naturally on the vine.

Name: NY FarmNet
Description:
NY FarmNet works with farmers in times of crisis, change, and opportunity. 

Founded in 1986 in response to the national farm crisis, NY FarmNet provides free, confidential, on-farm consulting to any farmer, farm family, or agribusiness employee in New York State. Our program operates an 800 helpline where a caller can reach someone any time of day, throughout the year, without having to navigate through a phone menu.

NY FarmNet consultants work with farmers in teams of two, one focusing on financial issues and one focusing on family or emotional issues. Financial consultants have a background in agriculture and assist with business plans, cash flow analysis, succession planning, life after farming, developing financial records and record-keeping systems, and loan applications, to name a few. Family consultants have a master's level degree in social work or counseling. They work with farmers to improve family and marital relations, develop strategies for better communication, manage stress and anxiety, facilitate difficult discussions, and run family business meetings in a way that all members have a voice. 

NY FarmNet was founded by the College of Agriculture and Life Sciences at Cornell University, and the main office still operates from Ithaca as part of the Charles H. Dyson School of Applied Economics &Management. The Dyson School is part of both Cornell’s College of Agriculture and Life Sciences and the SC Johnson College of Business. NY FarmNet is funded primarily by grants from the NYS Department of Agriculture & Markets and the NYS Office of Mental Health.

Name: Soil Action
Description:
Soil is dynamic. Nutrients move, transform, and disappear in real time.

Yet most soil decisions are still made as if nothing changes between samples.

Soil Action exists to change that. We’re building a new category of soil management called Soil Signal Management, a shift from static measurements to continuous, in-field understanding.

Instead of chasing a single number, farmers can now hear soil signals as they emerge, while they’re working the field. Patterns replace guesses. Context replaces assumptions.

When soil becomes something you can listen to, not just sample, decisions move from reactive to predictive. And input management becomes precise, timely, and intentional.

Name: Natural Branding Australia
Description:
Natural Branding Australia is on a mission to remove microplastics from our food supply chain. To help achieve this, we have a technology that will remove the need for 500 tons of plastics required to label our fruit and vegetables every year.

This technology not only saves on plastic use by removing the need for plastic labels completely, but it is also 1/4 of the price per fruit (when compared to stickers). The benefits are clear, and there is no other viable alternative - Degradable plastics break down more rapidly into microplastics, and organic compostable stickers dissolve in water.

Please register your support on our website, and tell your fresh food stores about us. We need your support to encourage the supply chain to take up the challenge of removing plastics from our foods.

Name: Diverse Corn Belt
Description:
The Diverse Corn Belt Project (DCB) is a five-year, multi-disciplinary research project exploring opportunities for and barriers in adding more crops and grazed livestock to rotations in the Corn Belt and investigating the real-world impacts of diversified farming systems. With more than 30 research partners on the DCB Team, we are seeking concrete options for diversification and understanding the agronomic, economic, social, infrastructure, and policy changes that could make these options viable.

Our hypothesis—backed by extensive data we’ve gathered during the last four years—is that greater diversity in crops, livestock, and people in the Corn Belt farming community will improve risk management options, resilience, and profitability.

Providing More Options
The current corn-soybean rotation is strongly reinforced by national policy, economic incentives, infrastructure, and culture. We recognize that while this farming system works well for some, it creates challenges for others. 

Diversity in the Corn Belt begins with adding cereals or horticultural food crops to a corn-soybean rotation, including perennial crops like alfalfa or miscanthus, adopting agroforestry, or grazing livestock. 

Rooting Resilience in Diversity
In biological systems—and economic and social ones—resilience is rooted in diversity. DCB’s goal is to expand diversification opportunities that benefit farmers, communities, the regional economy, and the environment. The DCB Team, funded by USDA's National Institute of Food and Agriculture, has entered the final year of an intensive five-year exploration of diversity options for the Corn Belt states of Indiana, Illinois, and Iowa. The team works with farmers, planners, processors, investors, policy makers, and other stakeholders to explore the many interconnected factors that will lead to greater opportunities in the region.

Description:
Bhaumya Innovations Private Limited is a forward-thinking company that is dedicated to providing innovative solutions for the agriculture industry. We are focused on reducing manual labor costs and improving the efficiency of farm operations. Our flagship product, the stone picking machine, is a testament to our commitment to excellence and innovation.

Farms around the world have long been plagued by the problem of stones in their fields. In the past, farmers would spend countless hours manually removing these stones, a task that was both time-consuming and physically demanding. With the increasing demand for food and the need for greater productivity, manual labor was becoming less and less viable as a solution. This is where Bhaumya Innovations Private Limited stepped in with a solution that would change the game.

 After extensive research and development, we developed a machine that would revolutionize the way stones are removed from fields. The stone picking machine, designed and manufactured by our company, is a cutting-edge piece of machinery that makes the process of removing stones from fields quick, easy, and efficient.The machine is incredibly versatile and can be used on a variety of different types of land, including fields, vineyards, and orchards. With its compact design and easy-to-use controls, the stone picking machine is the perfect solution for farmers of all sizes, from small family-owned farms to large commercial operations.

In addition to the stone picking machine, our company also offers a range of other engineering products designed to reduce manual labor costs and improve the efficiency of farm operations. Our products are designed to be user-friendly and versatile, allowing farmers to do more with a single product. With our commitment to quality and customer service, we are confident that our products will help farmers around the world to achieve greater productivity and profitability.

Name: AEDIH - Agricultural European Digital Innovation Hub for Hungary
Description: AEDIH is the Agricultural European Digital Innovation Hub for Hungary. The 4 project partners will increase the digital capabilities of agricultural enterprises and their confidence in digital technologies through digitalisation services. The AEDIH project accompanies agricultural enterprises through the different stages of the customer lifecycle, providing them complementary services that build on each other in a modular system. This pathway starts with the digital scoping where the digital maturity level of the agricultural enterprises is assessed according to an adapted ADMA (Agricultural Digital Maturity Assessment) methodology. This is followed by the preparation of an individual digital development roadmaps, tailored to the organisation. The roadmap is developed in close collaboration with the respective enterprise and includes recommendations for digital upgrades, including specific service proposals of AEDIH. The next step strives for enhancing the digital readiness of the agricultural enterprises and supports the roll-out of digital upgrades by providing training, demonstration opportunities, testbeds and tests before investment as well as concrete investment planning. Fostering digital upscaling is the third level of implementation, this is where the actual digitisation development takes place, the agricultural enterprise is integrated into the agro-digital ecosystem and AEDIH also supports them in identifying funding sources for their digital progress. AEDIH sees agricultural enterprises as its primary, but not exclusive, target group and intends to involve agricultural advisors and businesses providing innovation and digitalisation products and services, who are not necessarily agro-specific, but agro-interested. The foreseen approach explicitly reflects the low digital maturity of the primary target group and will guarantee the improvement in the proficiency level of digital literacy of the Hungarian small and medium sized agricultural enterprises.

Fərqli Cəhətlər 
Vasitəçisiz və anbarsız struktur → Aşağı qiymət, sürətli qiymət təklifi. 
Onlayn Sifariş Prosesi → Parçanın fotoşəkillə müəyyənləşdirilməsi və dərhal qiymət təklifi verilməsi.

Bazar və Rəqabət Təhlili 

Bazar problemləri 
Yetərli və lazımi ehtiyat hissələrinin olmaması, bahalılıq səbəbiylə aqropark və fermerin texnikası yararsız hala düşməsi 
Türk texnikasına birbaşa əlçatanlığın olmaması 
Mövcud sistem anbara dayalı işləməsi və hər bir aqrotexnikaya aid sayısız parçaların olması, uzun müddətlə satışın gözlənməsi səbəbiylə, passiv yatırım olaraq qəbul edilməsi və əksər hallarda qaçınılması 

Rəqibin Zəif Tərəfləri 
Anbar, İşçi tələbi → Artan xərc. 
Texniki biliklərin az olması → Fermeri texnika/hissə seçimində yalnız qoymaq 
Köhnə satış üsulları, Saxlanma qaydaları→ Uzun gözləmə müddəti, keyfiyyətsiz parça təminatı 

Üstünlüklər 
Türk istehsalı aqrotexnikalara inamın olması 
Onlayn bazar boşluğu → Tez nəzərə çarpmaq şansı 
Köhnə aqrotexnika parkı → Hissələrə tələbat davamlıdır

Name: Building Resilient Food Systems: The Gambia Agriculture and Food Security Project
Description: The purpose of the project is to increase food and nutritional security, as well as household income, particularly for the vulnerable households in five administrative regions namely Central River Region (CRR North and South), Lower River Region (LRR), Upper River Region (URR), North Bank Region (NBR) and the West Coast Region (WCR) of the Gambia, through the strengthening of the sustainable Home-Grown School Feeding (HGSF) Programme. This will be achieved by increasing climate-resilient food production, post-harvest management, market access and resilience for identified nutrient-rich food chains; and by promoting smallholder farmers’ access to the HGSF as an institutional market. The connection between the food supply side (farmers) and food demand side (consumers) in the project is the HGSF Programme. The project targets the most vulnerable in The Gambia and acts as a social protection mechanism to promote food and nutrition security in the project areas. This initiative has its bases on on-going and completed programmes led by the World Food Programme (WFP) and in other pilots that are being handed over from Food and Agriculture Sector Development Project (FASDEP) 1 and WFP to the Government of The Gambia. Specifically, it seeks to structure food demand and supply through scaling up of government institutionalized homegrown school feeding programme while improving smallholder’s income.

Name: 2nd Sight
Description:
We are a 10-year-old agtech company based in Spokane, Washington. We design and build hardware & software systems that improve efficiencies in specialty crop and commercial nursery operations in the US, Canada, EU, Australia, South America and beyond. We enjoy solving our customers’ problems – this leads to creating products and improving them.

Labor-tracking solutions: Our systems can track labor by piece, by weight, by hour, and by container. On the back end, our web portal simplifies the time needed to provide accurate pay rate information both to the employer's payroll system and to employees. Our software currently links with several payroll systems, and we are open to collaborating with customers on their specific needs.

Produce traceability: A customer with a packing house asked us to create produce traceability software. Using barcodes, follow your product through processing from receipt in the field to shipment to your customer. This software allows you to meet the requirements of U.S. and Canadian food traceability rules.

Nursery inventory solutions: For nurseries, we have equipment and apps that simplify the tree sizing and counting process. Our caliper system measures trees without bending and stooping and sends the data to a web portal, where the user can track inventory by size. Our apps also allow growers to count and sort plant materials by size and quality.

Tissue culture tracking: Our work with nurseries led to the development of tissue culture tracking software. Using barcodes, you can follow your tissue culture samples from receipt through hardening in the greenhouse. Easy-to-use software shows you parent-child relationships, so you know where your product came from.

Our employees come together as a determined team committed to “Better Solutions for the Ag Industry." We offer innovative ways to improve current technology and practices. Let us help you solve your labor-tracking and inventory-related problems!

Name: Presidential Initiative 2023 - The Science of Food and Drink; Berries and Beyond
Description:
The Presidential Team is a vestigial feature of when the Royal Highland Show originally travelled between the eight RHASS member regions across Scotland, before it settled permanently at Ingliston in 1960. The Presidential Team serves for one year and is comprised of representatives from these ‘host’ areas. The appointment of the honorary roles of President and four Vice Presidents is conferred by the elected Directors of RHASS from the host region. This year Perthshire has the honour of hosting, covering the Fife, Angus, Perth and Kinross areas. 
 
Each year the Presidential Team are tasked with championing a theme for the Show and this year our theme is ‘The Science of Food and Drink’. We aim to highlight the important connection between scientific research and Innovation and explore both the basic and artisan foods produced in the area.
  
The Presidential Initiative offers sponsors a unique platform from which to do business and acts as a valuable forum for networking with clients and partners; as well as the opportunity to gain media coverage at the Royal Highland Show in 2023.

Name: Envirolizer
Description:
We support and promote regenerative, sustainable & natural farming, helping farmers produce more yield, bigger and more nutritious better-tasting crops! We process and produce 100% natural mineral foliar fertilizer without chemical intervention that is harmful to our planet. 

Envirolizer is a natural mineral plant growth enhancer and adaptogen. It contains finely micronized and augmented natural calcite and effectively supplies calcium and silicon to plants; increases photosynthetic activity followed by better CO2 utilisation and production of primary and secondary metabolites. It provides an improvement in fruit and crop yields while increasing plant resistance toward environmental stress. 

It contains finely micronized and augmented natural calcite consisting of calcium carbonate, silicon dioxide, and calcite-related minerals such as dolomite [magnesium calcium carbonate; CaMg(CO3)2] and ankerite [CaM(CO3)2; M= Mn, Zn, Fe].   

Envirolizer fulfils the requirements to be listed as fertilizer (plant aid) in the Input List for Demeter International and the EU Input List.   The product was evaluated according to the provisions of the EU Legislation on organic farming (Reg. EC 834/2007 and 889/2008) as well as according to the Demeter International standard.

Name: Summit Attachments and Machinery
Description:
About Summit Attachments

Founded in 2004 by Eric Krume — a seasoned forestry professional who set out to build the solutions the market was missing — Summit Attachments was born from the field, for the field. What began as a handcrafted “tong tosser” has grown into a full-scale operation headquartered in Kelso, WA, with a team of over 40 specialists, including engineers, welders, CNC machinists, industrial painters, assemblers, and mechanics.

What We Do

We design and manufacture U.S.-built cable systems and heavy-duty forestry attachments — including SY50, SY40, SY40 Super, STY-75, 255H, and the Winch Assist WA-861 HS — along with custom accessories such as tong throwers, smart yoders, and specialty carriages.

We also offer integrated, high-quality services such as:
•	CNC machining
•	Metal fabrication and structural welding
•	Plate cutting and bending
•	Custom mechanical and hydraulic design
•	Industrial painting
•	Full equipment overhauls

Additionally, we provide new and used equipment sales, custom builds, and consignment solutions.

Our Mission & What Sets Us Apart

At Summit, innovation and quality are driven by those who know the field firsthand. Every product is built from real-world experience and focused on safety, efficiency, and results. Our partners are at the heart of every decision — because we believe your success is our success.

Name: Training & Extension for Conservation Agriculture in the Savannahs (TECAS)
Description:
Introduction: 

TECAS – Training and Extension for Conservation Agriculture in The Savannahs. TECAS is a social enterprise, with setup support from the Market-Oriented Agriculture Programme in North-West Ghana (MOAP NW) and EU-Resilience Against Climate Change (EU-REACH), to mitigate the adverse effect of climate change on agriculture, land degradation, inappropriate application of inputs and lack of mechanised CA services in Northwest Ghana, as well as offering diversification of extension services, which is in Ghana currently dominated by the public sector – the Departments of Agriculture under MoFA (Ministry for Food and Agriculture). To address this global phenomenon and reduce yield gaps, as well as increase farm operation efficiency, TECAS provides services aimed at promoting Conservation Agriculture. The services include Promotion and Farmer Mobilization, Tractor Mechanisation Service, Production and Sale of Cover Crops.

The Vision of TECAS:

Rejuvenation of soil fertility is a crucial factor for productive and sustainable agriculture. Farmers shall realize an increase in their income from agriculture in the presence of climate change and contribute to sustainably improve rural livelihoods through the adoption of Conservation Agriculture in the savannah regions of Ghana.

Mission of TECAS:
To promote CA systems to increase the profitability of farming and service provision to improve agro-ecosystem resilience.

Description:
Bioenemy Africa is a Kenyan-based company dedicated to advancing sustainable agricultural solutions across Africa. Our flagship offerings include insect semiochemical products and innovative trapping systems designed for pest monitoring and control.

Founded in August 2023, Bioenemy Africa is driven by a mission to deliver bio-alternatives that match or exceed the efficacy of synthetic chemicals, while reducing environmental impact. We offer a range of natural and effective solutions, including pheromones for monitoring and mass trapping, botanical and microbial insecticides, and plant health enhancers that support integrated crop management.

With a strong focus on sustainability, our products help farmers increase yields, protect biodiversity, and minimize the use of harmful pesticides. From grains to commercial crops, we are committed to helping African growers maintain the health of their ecosystems while improving livelihoods. Our dedicated team of scientists, specialists, and advisors ensures that every client receives top-quality service and support.

With its headquarters in Kasarani Nairobi (67679_00200, Kasarani suites, off Mwiki road, Nairobi, Nairobi 00200, KE), Bioenemy Africa is transforming agriculture one acre at a time, leading the charge toward a greener, more sustainable future for farmers across Africa.

Name: Agridev Automation LLP
Description:
Agridev Automation LLP is revolutionizing Indian agriculture by manufacturing advanced harvesters and planning to introduce AI-driven automation and precision farming solutions. Currently, we are focused on producing high-efficiency corn harvesters with integrated straw management systems, enabling both grain and silage harvesting while reducing waste. Our machines are designed to enhance productivity, reduce labor dependency, and improve farm profitability.

In the future, we aim to introduce AI-powered solutions for water and fertilizer management, soil health monitoring, and environmental tracking. These innovations will help farmers optimize irrigation, reduce input costs, and improve sustainability. Precision farming tools such as automated spraying drones, smart harvesting systems, and post-harvest management solutions are also part of our long-term vision to maximize efficiency and minimize losses.

To accelerate this transformation, we are planning to collaborate with different companies on machinery, automation, and technology, creating mutually beneficial partnerships. These collaborations will help us bring the latest advancements to Indian farmers, ensuring they have access to the best solutions available.

We are also actively working with research institutions, agritech firms, and government agencies to integrate cutting-edge technologies into farming practices. Our revenue model includes harvester sales, AI-driven farm management software, and after-sales support. By 2030, we envision automating 20% of Indian farms, making agriculture more efficient, sustainable, and profitable. Agridev Automation is committed to shaping the future of smart farming in India.

Name: Solina Sahel Agri-Sol Group
Description:
Sahel Agri-Sol, a pioneering Malian enterprise, is dedicated to facilitating the access of premier agricultural goods from the Sahel and West African regions to discerning global consumers. Our foundation rests on the principles of inclusive economic growth, aiming to forge sustainable pathways for agricultural communities while safeguarding their traditions and natural heritage. Through close collaboration with agricultural cooperatives and producers across the Sahel and West Africa, we ensure equitable compensation for their exceptional crops, fostering prosperity and resilience within rural landscapes.

We specialize in a diverse array of Sahelian products, including sesame, soybeans, maize, and shea butter, alongside value-added products from mangoes, maize, cocoa, and coffee. Additionally, we champion the exportation of other high-value crops such as cashew nuts, gum arabic, and peanuts.
At Sahel Agri-Sol, sustainability is our paramount concern. We work intimately with farmers to deploy climate-smart agricultural practices, preserving the delicate balance of the Sahelian and West African ecosystems. Committed to reducing our ecological footprint, we have initiated renewable energy adoption and recycling programs. Our steadfast commitment to quality is upheld through stringent quality control measures, ensuring compliance with the most rigorous international standards.

Join us in our mission to cultivate a more sustainable future for Sahelian and West African farmers by selecting Sahel Agri-Sol as your preferred partner for top-tier agricultural products.

Name: Leenaerts Agro Techniek
Description:
Leenaerts Agro Techniek is een bedrijf dat als dealer van DeLaval zorgt voor de soepele werking en automatisering binnen het melkveebedrijf. Onze firma levert, monteert en onderhoudt melkwinning-, koeling- en voersystemen, begeleidt landbouwers bij hun veestapel management en voorziet tevens in elektriciteits- en watervoorzieningswerken. Uiteraard staan rendement, kwaliteitsgarantie en koecomfort hierbij steeds centraal.

Wij dragen een snelle, correcte en kwalitatieve service hoog in het vaandel. Onze service stopt dan ook niet bij de oplevering van een project, maar gaat verder tot de aanlevering van diverse hygiëneproducten en dagdagelijkse boerderijbenodigdheden. Onze Herd Management Adviseur staat de melkveehouders bovendien graag bij in de optimalisatie van het melkwinningsproces, en bij problemen is er 24/7 één van onze servicemonteurs bereikbaar.

We bouwen dan ook dagdagelijks verder aan een vakkundig en enthousiast team dat onze klanten niet alleen uitstekend te woord kan staan, maar dat bovenal van aanpakken weet. Doordat we sinds 2017 niet enkel in de provincie Antwerpen, maar ook in Zuid – West Nederland actief zijn, telt onze organisatie ondertussen een dertigtal medewerkers.

Door dit uitgebreide gamma en de kennis die we de afgelopen jaren hebben opgedaan, kunnen we beter aan uw wensen voldoen en zoeken naar een oplossing op maat voor uw bedrijf.

Sinds 2009 hebben we bewezen dat service nauw aan ons hart ligt. Door onze passie in de melkveehouderij hebben we eind 2017 het dealerschap van DeLaval Zuid-West Nederland overgenomen. In 2022 mochten we hierbij ook het dealerschap van Spinder stalinrichting aan het lijstje toevoegen.

Samen met ons vakkundig team staan we dag in dag uit klaar om een goede service te kunnen verlenen.

Name: IAPIndia
Description:

Members here are requested to invite their connects who maybe interested in Agriculture and allied sector in India.

Some highlights of the member demographics are as follows:
- Over 6500 senior and CXO level professionals in agriculture companies including 1000+ such leaders from outside India
- 3000+ professionals with trading, procurement and purchase backgrounds in the agri-commodity sector
- 250 investors from marquee Venture Capital funds and family offices
- Over 3000 startup founders or senior management personnel in startups
Besides this, there are 70,000 more professionals in the group out of whom roughly 20K are in countries outside India.

IAP on LinkedIn and other social media platforms are evolving into crowd sourced digital extension platforms for agriculture and are being run as public utilities for all stakeholders. IAP hopes to become the townhall for the agriculture and allied sector ecosystem in India and the Global South. Euglena Co., Ltd. was founded with a noble vision to address nutritional deficiencies. It was inspired by Mr. Mitsuru Izumo’s observations during his visit to Bangladesh in 1998. Since its establishment in August 2005, Euglena Co., Ltd. has been at the forefront of innovation, including pioneering the world's bio jet fuel. On the other hand, Grameen Krishi Foundation assists the nation in achieving self-sufficiency in food production and ensures food security for the rural poor people and small farmers for the development of an improved and integrated farming system. The Grameen Family is led by Dr. Muhammad Yunus, Bangladesh’s first-ever Nobel laureate. 

Beside this, we are continuously researching for diversification of crops and processed agro-based foods. We are collaboratively working with domestic research institutes and international research base nonprofit organization. Our mission is to improve the socioeconomic status of Bangladeshi farmers by increasing the yield and quality of the produced crops for export in the international market.

“GENKI Program”
Mr. Izumo, president of euglena Co., Ltd. Laid the foundation of “GENKI Program” in April 2014 with the aim of solving nutritional problems for children in Bangladesh. By GENKi Program we are providing 10000 packets of biscuits every day to Underprivileged school going children. The Program is continuing at 96 Schools and expanded to 13 districts in Bangladesh. Under this Program, over 18 million biscuits are distributed to these students.

Fast forward too today Joel is using Drones to help make his client's lives, safer and easier!

With a long list of successfully completed jobs, in the most challenging terrain Oakdale UAV Solution's specializes in Aerial Drone Spraying, Seeding and Mapping

Application by drone is a game changer! 

No wheel tracks, Bogged vehicles just effortless application from the sky! and they also reduce chemical exposure! Seriously what's not too like? 

Oakdale UAV Solution's uses the amazing DJI AGRAS T40 drone system, which is an application powerhouse, setting the standard for Spray drones and technology.

Coupled with the Mavic 3 Multispectral UAV is a very powerful duo indeed!

If you want to learn more about us you can message me directly or checkout my website at www.oakdaleuavsolutions.com.au  or email jgilbert@oakdaleuavsolutions.com.au

Name: AgriTanya
Description:
**Welcome to AgriTanya**  
 
Where farmers, agripreneurs, and homegrowers connect, learn, and grow together.  

AgriTanya is your trusted partner in agriculture, offering a global platform for anyone passionate about farming and sustainable food production. Whether you're a seasoned farmer, a budding agripreneur, or a home gardener, we’re here to empower you with the knowledge, tools, and resources to thrive in the field.  

 **What We Do**  
At AgriTanya, we bridge the gap between traditional farming practices and modern agricultural innovation. Our platform is designed to provide:  

**Educational Materials:** Comprehensive guides, e-books, and online courses covering a wide range of topics—from crop cultivation and pest management to agri-tech solutions and sustainable farming.
 
**Service Directory:** Find and connect with trusted service providers, including suppliers, agronomy experts, and equipment manufacturers tailored to your agricultural needs.  

**Community and Support:** Join a global network of like-minded growers through forums, webinars, and interactive discussions to exchange ideas and solutions.  

 **Why Choose AgriTanya?** 
 
**Global Reach, Local Impact:** Accessible to farmers and homegrowers worldwide, with a special focus on solutions that work in tropical and all-year-round climates.  

**Empowering Growth:** We focus on practical, actionable insights to help you make informed decisions for your farm or garden. 
 
**Tech Meets Tradition:** Harness the power of agri-tech while respecting and enhancing traditional farming practices.  

 **Join the AgriTanya Movement**  
Be part of a community that’s reimagining agriculture for a sustainable future. Follow our page for the latest updates on farming trends, exclusive learning resources, and opportunities to connect with experts in the field.  

 **Grow Smarter. Farm Better. Live Healthier.**  
Together, let’s cultivate a better tomorrow with AgriTanya.

Name: Farm Minerals

Our focus is on nutrients: not as simple inputs, but as catalysts. Each mineral has a role to play in restoring balance, building resilience, and awakening the natural intelligence of the farm ecosystem.

We believe agriculture’s next transformation won’t come from synthetic shortcuts or heavier chemistry — it will come from understanding nature’s design and working with it.

Our mission is to bring that understanding to the surface. To help farmers grow crops that nourish, soils that endure, and systems that thrive on their own strength.

Because when we get the foundation right, everything above ground changes.

Name: Todorović Winery
Description:
Vinarija Todorović smeštena je u selu Potrkanje nadomak Knjaževca. Vinarija se bavi organskom proizvodnjom grožđa i vina. Proizvodnja i zaštita grožđa bazirana je na organskim preparatima koji su propisani od strane Ministarstva Poljoprvirede kao i sertifikacione kuće Ekocert. Od 2021 godine vinarija je i zvanično završila proces sertifikacije koji je trajao tri godine i ima mogućnost da svoja vina označi kao organski proizvod. Vinarija Todorović raspolaže sa 27 ha na kojima se nalaze sorte: Cabernet Sauvignon, Pinot Noir, Merlot, Vranac, Shiraz, Sauvignon Blanc, a od 2019 godine i Chardonnay. 2018 godine podignuta je vinarija u sklopu koje se nalazi sala za degustaciju kao i barik sala namenjena odležavanju vina.

The Todorović Winery is located in the village of Potrkanje near Knjaževac. The winery deals with the organic production of grapes and wine. The production and protection of grapes is based on organic preparations prescribed by the Ministry of Agriculture and the certification house Ekocert. As of 2021, the winery has officially completed the certification process that lasted three years and has the possibility to mark its wines as an organic product. The Todorović Winery has 27 ha, where there are varieties: Cabernet Sauvignon, Pinot Noir, Merlot, Vranac, Shiraz, Sauvignon Blanc, and since 2019, Chardonnay. In 2018, a winery was built, which includes a tasting room as well as a barrique room intended for wine aging.

The My Farm European project (2023-PI-ALL-INNO-EDU-ENTERP-101140288) is a collective effort of 11 organisations from 6 countries (Italy, Cyprus, Greece, Portugal, Romania and Ukraine) to promote a holistic approach in Multifunctionality Farming.

Multifunctionality originates in the supposition that agriculture, apart from the production of food also has other broader social functions and aspects, such as maintaining production potentials, encouraging rural development keeping the population in the country, cultivating the landscape), and protecting the environment. This approach emphasizes that the relationship between agricultural holdings and their local communities can to be symbiotic. 

From this perspective, multifunctionality is considered a "proactive development tool for promoting a more sustainable economy, including synergies", whose activities should "create opportunities for additional income and employment in agriculture".

KAMU Safety boots don’t just meet safety standards; they exceed them. Every pair complies with Australian, European, and American safety certifications, and is engineered for superior slip resistance and durability in harsh environments. Our range includes custom-built models for both men and women, ensuring a perfect fit and optimal support for every worker.

Our commitment to innovation has earned us the prestigious iF DESIGN AWARD 2024, recognizing our relentless focus on anti-fatigue design and workplace health. Through strategic partnerships-like our collaboration with Safety Mate-we’re making next-generation safety footwear accessible to businesses of all sizes across the region.

At KAMU, we believe your energy is everything. Our boots are designed to help you reclaim your energy, stay focused on the job, and have something left for life beyond work. Experience the KAMU difference-where advanced engineering meets real-world comfort, safety, and style.

Name: AgriRain Agro Industries Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
AgriRain is first in the world to provide “Irrigation as a Service”.

Mechanized irrigation available to small farmers is too expensive, and often requires subsidies. In addition, the irrigation options are ineffective due to lack of integrated solutions, complex purchasing decisions, inadequate farmer training, high operational expenses for pump/fuel, and requires more labor and time. In effect, vast majority (90%) of small farmers rely on erratic rainfall or sub-optimal methods of irrigation. Small farmer income has remained stagnated and climate change has only aggravated the uncertainty.  

AgriRain was founded in 2017 with the aim of finding an economical and effective solution which works for small farmers. While Hosereel systems are widely employed in Western agriculture contexts, they are large and difficult to operate in the fragmented and highly segregated land holdings as well as the heterogeneity of cropping systems to fit in the Indian and African context. AgriRain has thus devised and modified Idrofoglia’s (leading Italian irrigation company, est. 1979) Hosereel technology to provide a movable and flexible irrigation system that can cater to the typical land parcels ranging from 0.5-5 acres of smallholder farmers. 

Additionally, the unaffordable high CAPEX cost of irrigation systems for smallholder farmers, resulted in the genesis of a novel “Irrigation as a Service (IaaS)” model. Trained operators use fully integrated and mobile Hosereel technology to provide hassle-free, pay-per-service, and on-demand irrigation. 

AgriRain’s customized irrigation solution is modern and water efficient with WUE ~75-80% which is comparable to drip and sprinkler systems. With right partnerships, the model is proven to be scalable and farmer’s income has increased significantly.

Name: HumaTerra Regen Ag Inc.
Description:
HumaTerra is on a mission to improve soil health by increasing the diversity, density, and resilience of soil microbes in agricultural and reclaimed land.

Since 2016, HumaTerra has been on a mission to improve soil health by increasing the diversity, density, and resilience of soil microbes in agricultural and reclaimed land. We work to improve the health of soil in ways that make an immediate, positive impact.

Healthy soil supports healthy plants that grow healthy food. Microorganisms play a key role in health. For people, it is about gut health. As this has become better understood, we have adopted probiotics into our diet to ensure our bodies have the microbes needed to extract nutrients and digest food.

Proof of concept studies with H-Start have showed a consistent positive response in crop trials in northeast Saskatchewan. Initial trials looked at quantitative impact on the crops treated. Over time, qualitative metrics were established and assessed to understand the effect that H-Start was having on soil as well as crops.

Today, HumaTerra employs over 20 people in rural Canada, providing jobs to highly skilled people in places where we want to live. Our head office and plant in Birch Hills, Saskatchewan make up an ultra-modern facility right in the heart of agricultural land that feeds the world.

Our customers are farmers, ranchers, commercial and residential gardeners and land reclamation specialists.

We strive to be industrious and innovative, offering our customers products that provide current value while creating a soil legacy we can all be proud of.

Name: IAS Labs
Description:
IAS labs is a globally recognized ISO 17025-certified agricultural laboratory and research facility that prides itself on being easy to work with. We offer exceptional customer service, answer the phone when you call, and provide free consulting with every test to ensure you get the most value from your results.

We specialize in precise analytical testing and research services across multiple industries:

◦ Fertilizer & Manure Industries – Ensuring product quality and compliance through concentration and ratio analysis for retail distribution.

◦ Humic & Fulvic Acid Testing – Providing in-depth analysis of humic and fulvic acid content for soil amendments, fertilizers, and agricultural applications, supporting product development and quality control.

◦ Water Quality & Safety – Conducting comprehensive water testing to ensure safe drinking water for homes, businesses, and agricultural use by analyzing for contaminants, pH balance, and mineral content.

◦ Nurseries & Landscapers – Supporting the growth of high-quality plants and vibrant landscapes through expert soil and water analysis.

◦ Homeowners & Gardeners – Offering soil fertility and water suitability testing to promote lush flowers, healthy fruits, and thriving vegetables.

◦ Agriculture & Farmers – Enhancing crop yields and fertilizer efficiency with plant tissue, petiole, and soil analysis.

◦ Construction & Engineering – Conducting materials testing in compliance with ASTM and DOT  standards.

◦ Research & Development Support – Assisting companies in product formulation, efficacy testing, and innovation through analytical testing and scientific expertise.

International permits for soil and plant sample testing are available upon request.

Prima-vent’s styrke er kombinationen af fleksibilitet og opfindsomhed. Det omfattende standardprogram og evnen til at levere individuelle løsninger, der svarer præcist til hver enkelt kundes behov, har givet luft under vingerne.

Ud over vores brede produktsortiment, udvikler vi ligeledes totalløsninger, som er tilpasset hver enkelt kundes behov og ønsker.

Vi står for stort set alle led i projektet og værdikæden, lige fra udvikling, produktion, levering, installation og service.

Konstruktion- og produktudvikling

Name: Amiable Aquaculture and Hydroponic Services
Description:
We are an aquaponic enterprise committed to bridging the gap between aquaculture and agriculture by ensuring fish and vegetables are available all year round. Our goal is to provide practical solutions to challenges in food production - ranging from limited land and water resources to inconsistent supply of fish for consumption and processing.

We have designed specialized hybrid aquaponic systems and regenerative production models that empower communities, schools, and households to actively participate in sustainable fish jumbo production - our main raw material for developing affordable and nutritious fish snacks.

Mission Statement
Our mission is to build resilient food systems that merge aquaculture and agriculture, making fish and vegetables accessible, affordable, and sustainable. Through innovation, education, and community participation, we aim to create inclusive economic opportunities while promoting environmental stewardship and healthy living.
Our Impact
Through our aquaponic initiatives, we are reducing food insecurity, promoting circular economy practices, and creating jobs across multiple value chains—from hatchery operations and vegetable production to fish processing, value addition, and community empowerment. We are not just growing food; we are growing opportunity, resilience, and hope for a sustainable future.
Vision Statement
To become Africa’s leading model for sustainable aquaponic innovation - empowering every household, school, and community to produce nutritious food while restoring balance to the environment. We envision a future where fish and vegetables are grown in harmony, creating jobs, improving livelihoods, and advancing food security for generations to come.

Name: Sustainable Competitive Agriculture in Suriname
Description:
Welcome to the Sustainable Competitive Agriculture in Suriname page!

This page will showcase developments within the agriculture and livestock sector in Suriname, resulting from the Agricultural Competitiveness Program and the Sustainable Agriculture Productivity Program. These programs are implemented by the Project Execution Unit (PEU) of the Inter-American Institute for Cooperation on Agriculture (IICA), in close collaboration with the Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, and Fisheries, and funded by the Inter-American Development Bank (IDB).

Objective:
The aim is to increase the productivity and income of farmers across Suriname, enabling them to achieve success in both local and international markets.

Why it Matters:
By strengthening agricultural services, the productivity, income generation, and export capacities of Surinamese farmers can be enhanced, while promoting sustainability and reducing environmental impacts.

Sustainable Agriculture Productivity Program:
This initiative focuses on improving irrigation and drainage systems and enhancing agricultural statistics, with the goal of promoting productivity and resource management.

Agricultural Competitiveness Program:
This program aims to enhance the competitiveness of the agricultural sector through improvements in plant and animal health, food safety measures, and laboratory infrastructure to meet international standards. It includes investments in capacity building, facilities, and equipment to improve services and support Surinamese farmers.

This integration breaks down data silos and creates a single source of truth that enables better decision-making across your business.

Once your core data foundation is established, we can help you implement an enterprise AI platform tailored to your specific needs. This approach leverages your unified data to deliver immediate value while preparing your operation for the future of digital agriculture.

At Innovative Grain, we focus on making your most important data work better together. Our clients achieve faster insights, improved operational efficiency, and a competitive edge through smarter use of their existing data assets.

Name: IADAAM Project
Description:
Irrigated Agriculture Development in Ararat and Armavir marzes (IADAAM) project, financed through the European Union (EU) with implementation by the French Development Agency (AFD) is an integrated initiative aimed at transforming irrigated agriculture in Armenia.
Within IADAAM project a technical assistance component is implemented jointly by Agriconsulting Europe S.A, Avenue Consulting Group, Strategic Development Agency NGO and 3R Strategy LLC consortium and aims to provide institutional support to the Ministry of Economy (MoE) in the formulation of agricultural policies and reforms in priority areas, provide technical support to the MoE in the implementing project activities, ensure communication and reporting for the IADAAM project.
The project supports the Government of Armenia in policy matters linked with the development of modernized irrigated agriculture, particularly, this project is implemented jointly with the Ministry of Economy (85%) and the Ministry of Territorial Administration and Infrastructure (15%), reflecting a collaborative approach to address the existing challenges of the agricultural sector. 
The project provides strong support at local level to farmers and concerned stakeholders at crafting, promoting and financing pilot operations in Ararat and Armavir marzes. Through sustainable advisory services and efficient irrigation technologies the IADAAM project is also supporting the adaptation to climate change and making agricultural production more resilient to the effects of changing weather events such as draught, heavy rains and hail. In addition, it addresses land consolidation and cooperation for High Value Agriculture. The project will also support the UN Sustainable Development Goals and in particular support Women and young farmers and the youth to participate in project activities and grants.

Complementing ASTANI, Darifarm delivers premium, high-quality produce from Agrari-supported farms. Our products address the challenges farmers face in meeting market demands for high-quality yields. Description:
