By leveraging advanced analytics and telemetric technology, BeeSTAR enables remote monitoring of hive conditions, allowing beekeepers to assess hive health and status from anywhere at any time.

Recognizing the critical role bees play in global food production—contributing to two-thirds of the world's food supply—BeeSTAR is committed to enhancing bee monitoring processes to ensure the sustainability and security of our food systems. In Australia alone, there is a shortage of more than 300,000 hives needed for pollination. Factors such as pests, natural disasters, and rising operational costs are impacting the beekeeping industry. BeeSTAR offers solutions that provide cost and operational savings, addressing these challenges head-on.

Aligned with Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles, BeeSTAR emphasizes environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and transparent governance in all aspects of its operations. By empowering beekeepers with innovative tools and actionable insights, BeeSTAR is leading a revolution in beekeeping practices, ensuring a sustainable future for both bees and humans

Name: New World Laboratories
Description:
New World Laboratories is a Western Australian, independently owned construction materials testing laboratory delivering reliable, accurate results that support confident decision-making across civil, infrastructure, mining and regional projects.

NATA-accredited to ISO/IEC 17025, we provide a comprehensive range of laboratory and field testing services for soils, aggregates, bitumen, asphalt and associated materials. Our focus is simple: quality results, fast turnaround times and responsive service you can rely on—whether you’re working on a metropolitan project or a remote regional site.

Operating from our primary laboratory in Canning Vale, we also support projects across Western Australia through flexible field services and remote annex laboratories established specifically to meet project demands. This allows us to deliver consistent testing outcomes, even in challenging or logistically complex environments, without compromising quality or compliance.

Our experienced technical team brings strong industry knowledge and practical insight to every project. We work closely with contractors, consultants, local government, mining operations and asset owners to ensure testing programs align with project specifications, Australian Standards and Main Roads WA requirements. Accuracy, traceability and transparency underpin everything we do.

At New World Laboratories, we understand that testing is more than a compliance requirement—it’s a critical part of risk management, performance assurance and long-term asset durability. That’s why we invest in modern equipment, robust systems and ongoing staff training to continually improve the way we deliver our services.

From early-stage material assessment to production testing and project delivery support, New World Laboratories is committed to providing dependable testing solutions that help projects move forward with confidence—backed by science, experience and local expertise.

Name: Philippine Rural Development Project
Description:
The Philippine Rural Development Project (PRDP) is a national project under the Department of Agriculture (DA), in partnership with the World Bank, that aims to establish a modern, value chain-oriented, and climate-resilient agriculture and fisheries sector.

In partnership with local government units (LGUs) and the private sector, the Project shall provide key infrastructure, facilities, technology and information to raise incomes, productivity and competitiveness in targeted areas.

Likewise, it aims to strengthen good governance, transparency and accountability mechanisms at all stages of the project cycle. It also intends to operationalize a local-level convergence platform among relevant national line agencies and other stakeholders such as the private sector, civil society and academe to synergize programs and projects. This multi-stakeholder convergence is seen to facilitate the implementation of more relevant interventions that benefit a bigger segment of farmers and fishers, ushering them towards inclusive growth.

Name: Women's Ag Network
Description:
Women are deeply involved in every aspect of agriculture and conservation. The Women’s Ag Network (WAN) is a statewide program created to support, connect, and elevate women across agriculture, conservation, and related industries in South Dakota.

WAN provides opportunities for personal and professional growth, leadership development, and meaningful connection. Through events, education, mentorship, and peer-to-peer collaboration, the network supports women in learning, connecting, and driving positive change in their communities.
A key feature of WAN is our local HUBS, community-based groups across the state that bring women together in their regions. HUBS offer regular opportunities to connect, learn, and collaborate, whether through in-person meetings, workshops, or networking events, making it easier for women from all walks of life to engage with the network close to home. Current HUB locations include Brookings, Eagle Butte, Huron, Sioux Falls, Spearfish, and South Central South Dakota.

Women in agriculture and conservation come from all backgrounds, from those living and working on farms to conservationists, bankers, engineers, agronomists, teachers, agri-business professionals, veterinarians, and more. WAN is a place to connect, learn, and grow together.

No matter your role or experience, you belong here. Join us and be part of a community supporting women who are leading the way in agriculture and conservation across South Dakota.

Name: Tokri Fresh
Description:
Our focus is to develop India’s underserved regions. Association with farmers to improve the quality and quantity of their produce. The company intends to reduce agri wastage, by streamlining the value chain, to less than 2 percent in comparison to the country’s average of 30 percent. Majority of this saving translates into increased farmers’ earnings.

We provides farmers & retailers with secured income based on long term off-take agreements and all-round support to improve productivity and quality.

Will offer various value add processing services and a full assortment of ‘readyto-retail’, customer-friendly products. It is also in the final stages of implementing, a B2C consumer traceability and other functionalities, can track the product from farm to shelf allowing customers and consumers to get transparent insight into when, where, and how the food was grown.

Mission
Fresh produce begin to deteriorate the moment they are harvested, so it is essential for cold chain logistics & Packaging to insure the cargo kept in optimum storage conditions so that shelf life and therefore commercial potential is maximized.
India’s agriculture is facing serious challenges such as low & high yield and enormous wastage across the value chain.
Tokri attempts to address these challenges by fundamentally transforming and modernizing critical stages of the entire supply chain.
By restructuring the supply chain, the company brings efficiency in delivery from farm to fork which results in minimum wastage of the produce and ensures better pricing for the farmers.
We aim to transform the way fresh produce is grown and distributed in the India by introducing global best practices. In parallel, we empower the farmers by providing knowledge & extension services such agriculture credit, crop insurance and warehousing. We ensure regular and secured income for the farmers with long-term off-take agreements.

Name: iBreed Aqua LLC
Description:
Introducing iBreed Aqua: Pioneering Intelligent Selective Breeding Programs for a Sustainable Aquaculture! 
Hey everyone, I’m excited to share the incredible news about a groundbreaking venture that's making waves in the world of aquatic biology and genetics! 
 About iBreed Aqua 
iBreed Aqua is not just a company – it's a movement towards shaping a sustainable and vibrant future for our aquatic ecosystems. Founded by Dr. Thomas Gitterle, a passionate marine biologist and senior genetics enthusiast, our company is dedicated to revolutionizing the way we approach selective breeding programs and genetic interventions for aquatic species.
 Our Mission 
Our mission is crystal clear: to leverage cutting-edge genetic technologies and scientific expertise to enhance the health, resilience, and diversity of aquatic species. By collaborating with researchers, conservationists, and aquaculture experts, we are committed to developing innovative genetic strategies that empower us to tackle the challenges facing our oceans and freshwater environments.
 What Sets Us Apart 
At iBreed Aqua we stand out through our:
1. Expert Team: Our team consists of brilliant geneticists, marine biologists, and conservationists who bring a wealth of knowledge to the table.
2. Ethical Approach: We prioritize ethical considerations and environmental sustainability in every project we undertake. Our selective breeding approach is designed to promote the long-term well-being of species and ecosystems and therefore a sustainable aquaculture industry.
3. Innovative Solutions: We utilize the latest advancements in genetic research and technology to devise innovative solutions tailored to each species' unique characteristics and farming conditions.
4. Collaborative Network: We collaborate closely with academic institutions, conservation organizations, and aquaculture enterprises to foster a holistic approach to genetic interventions.

Name: SOLDEVCO Pty Ltd
Description:
Soldevco (Pty) Ltd is a pioneering, 100% youth women-owned enterprise based in Cape Town, South Africa, specialising in sustainable water treatment technologies. Founded in 2021, the company leverages its managements 45 years of combined expertise in civil engineering and water quality management to deliver innovative solutions across agriculture, aquaculture, hydroponics, and wastewater treatment sectors.
 Core Innovations
•	Ultra-Oxygen Technology: Soldevco's patented micro- and ultrafine bubble generators enhance dissolved oxygen levels by up to 450%, significantly improving water quality while reducing energy consumption and chemical usage.
•	UO2-Drylet Biocatalyst: This biocatalyst accelerates bioremediation processes, effectively breaking down contaminants in both aerated and anaerobic environments.
•	UO2-Quantum Disinfection: Utilizing silver-based germicidal ceramics, this technology provides rapid and effective water disinfection without the need for contact time .
•	Smart Farmer & Aqua-Smart IoT Systems: These Internet of Things (IoT) solutions offer real-time monitoring and control of water parameters, optimizing resource use and enhancing productivity in various applications.
 Global Reach & Impact
Soldevco's technologies are deployed across South Africa, Europe, and the Middle East, supporting Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) related to clean water, sustainable agriculture, and climate action. The company's growth is driven by a combination of sales, strategic partnerships, and government grants, ensuring scalability and sustainability.

Soldevco stands at the forefront of sustainable water treatment, offering cutting-edge solutions that address critical environmental challenges while promoting efficiency and innovation.

Industries
Manufacturing, Agriculture-Forestry-Fishing, Professional-scientific and technical activities

Name: Smallridge Bros Ltd
Description:
Smallridge Bros Ltd
Smallridge Brothers was established in 1977 when brothers David and Michael Smallridge started their Agricultural Engineering partnership.

In the early years of the company which saw David (Bert) Shambrook join the team in 1979, Smallridge Bros were mostly involved in the repair of Agricultural machinery and equipment and the occasional sale of used tractors.

Because of their attention to detail and after-care service the popularity of their quality used tractors and services grew to a position that many of their customers thought they were John Deere dealers. Their efforts were rewarded in 1990 when John Deere approached them with an offer of becoming an official franchise dealership.

In 2011 the company spread its wings to Cornwall with a second depot at Callington, and in the summer of 2014 a third depot was acquired in Holsworthy which joined up the existing territories.

In 2018 Simon Smallridge, son of David Smallridge was appointed as the company’s Dealer Principal.

2020 saw further growth for Smallridge Bros with an expansion into west Cornwall. A new depot was set up in Truro meaning the company could offer their unrivalled service and back-up across all of Cornwall.

Smallridge Bros now employs over 90 staff and covers a large part of Devon and all of Cornwall with the JD franchise, and has exclusivity with the franchises of many other brands over the whole of both counties.

Despite the change the company has seen over recent years, Smallridge Brothers have not forgotten its roots and still recognises the importance of good service and backup. These values are how we built our trust with farmers, and how we will continue to maintain that trust.

This is the bedrock on which the company has been built and is still the company’s ethos over 40 years later.

Name: SpawnX
Description:
The world faces shortage of ultra-fresh locally grown food. 
We need to move to local production because of logistics, pandemics, geopolitics and climate change.

On an existing industrial scale mushroom farm 50% of mushrooms is written off during logistics from the farm to the consumer.

We bring the city farming principle to the mushroom growing industry. This can decrease write-off rates by 80%.

But there is no technology and business model for such farms. 70% of them go bankrupt in 3 years of work.

Our solution is a turnkey mushroom farm. That consists of: our unique substrate machine, mushroom growing rooms with growing racks, sensors and ventilation unit, climate controlling software and production planning software.

All together it increases the margin of mushroom city farms.

All the systems already work on our own farm where we produce 10 tons of oyster, eringi and shiitake per month.

We are a technology supplier and not a farming company. Hardware is produced on contract factories and farms are assembled by our contractors. 

We are providing mushroom farming technology. That’s why we can scale up the number of farms sold exponentially.

We earn money on mushroom farm sales and monthly sales of mycelium and substrate to the farms. Our goal is to make our hardware for free for our clients and move all the costs to the monthly mycelium sales.

Our vision is to develop a product line of kit farms of different formats, sell them all around the world and supply them with high quality mycelium.
Breed more effective mycelium strains and continuously educate the automation software on the network of farms to grow different types of mushrooms more efficient.

We are building the first worldwide monopolist in mushroom growing technology. And will be happy to invite You to our journey.

Name: Amuse Hinnova Agri Private Limited
Description:
Amuse Hinnova is an organic and hydroponic vertical farming company. We founded this company in Chennai to supply everyone with fresh, quality veggies daily. We are all aware that the world of tomorrow will be incredibly efficient and continue to expand faster. As a result, even if we are willing to pay a premium price, our access to world-class food remains uncertain.

At Amuse Hinnova Farm, we use cutting-edge vertical hydroponic techniques to minimise land and water deployment. To put this in numbers, we mean that we use 85% less water and almost no soil than the standard procedure. Because we are densely and vertically packed, we produce output comparable to one acre of land in only 1500 square feet.

Amuse & Hinnova joined hands in indigenously developing this futuristic system. We are growing various plant varieties, including leafy greens, herbs, microgreens, and exotic veggies. We are passionate about introducing many more soon.

Name: Hylo Ag
Description:
At Hylo Ag, we want to solve common problems. The first on our list is the issue of rural communities lacking infrastructure and processes to recycle farm plastics.

We've set our sights on the 15,000 tonnes of plastic that the Australian Livestock industry produces on farm every year. Visual and electronic ear tags are vital for biosecurity and traceability, but have you ever wondered where all those little plastic pieces end up after sheep and cattle have left our properties?

With over 2M head of cattle produced every year, and our national sheep and lamb slaughter averaging 25M head,  a HUGE volume of 5-10 gram plastic ear tags are involved in our supply chain. 

We aim to develop a business model that facilitates collection of waste ear tags at the end of their life, and re-directs them to a partnering recycler who helps us to create new items from the recovered plastic feedstock. 

Not only do we grant access to such a service, we also track your impact with our Hylo Ag app, similar to an online banking app. Users send us ear tags, we keep record of the volume of plastic diverted from landfill, making it extremely easy to report and share.

As the adage goes, one person's trash is another person's treasure!

Name: 360 Ag Solutions
Description:
360 Ag Solutions is a team of focused professionals dedicated to the success of the farms they serve. Finding ideal, comprehensive solutions requires a 360 degree overview of each farm. Understanding management constraints, crop potential and the goals of the farm, that is the objective of 360 Ag Solutions.

Create a process. Give that process precision. Profit.

Process -- We take a 360° approach to farming — tying together feeding, cow comfort, reproduction, herd health, nutrition, finances, and agronomy. It’s all about making your farm more efficient, effective, and built for long-term success. Every piece matters, and we help you bring it all together.


Precision -- Precision on the farm means enacting well-designed game plans and processes with excellence. Whether it's feeding, breeding, planting, or managing herd health, every decision is backed by data and executed with purpose. It’s about being dialed in — doing the right things, at the right time, in the right way — to boost efficiency, production, and long-term success.


Profit -- Profit is the result of a process rooted in precision — where every decision, from crop inputs to herd management, is made with the bottom line in mind. It’s not just about making money today, but building a system that supports long-term success and sustainability. When all aspects of the farm work together efficiently, profit isn’t just possible — it becomes the natural outcome.

Ir jau sekantį sezoną įmonė pasitiko stipriai paaugusi ir pasiruošusi padėti ne tik ūkininkams, bet ir žemės ūkio bendrovėms. Taigi, nuo to laiko įmonė orientuojasi į žemės ūkio technikos nuomos, pardavimo ir papildomas paslaugas, leidžiančias ūkininkams ir žemės ūkio bendrovėms dirbti efektyviau ir paprasčiau. Kasdienio darbo, tobulėjimo ir orientacijos į klientą dėka, šiandien UAB „Klovima“ vardas puikiai žinomas visame žemės ūkio sektoriuje.

Name: Hazelnut Marketing Board
Description:
Nestled between the grandeur of the Cascade Mountains and the scenic Pacific Ocean lies Oregon’s Willamette Valley -- one of the world’s premiere agricultural regions. Over 99% of American hazelnuts are grown in this fertile valley. The rare combination of volcanic soils, moderate temperature and ample precipitation makes this the optimal region for hazelnut orchards. These thriving groves yield hazelnuts renowned globally for their unparalleled size, consistent quality, and distinct flavor. 

Oregon hazelnuts boast a robust, buttery smooth flavor and are the ideal accent for exquisite entrees or decadent desserts. They are also great by themselves as a healthy yet decadent snack. Oregon hazelnuts come in many forms -- including kernels, meal, flour, sliced, diced, paste and oil -- making them easy to eat and use. 

Visit our website at OregonHazelnuts.org to learn more about the Oregon hazelnut difference. 

Oregon Hazelnuts truly are indulgence in a nutshell.

Name: Ancient Organics Bioscience
Description:
Ancient Organics Bioscience specializes in designing and manufacturing self-sustaining plant and soil microbial inoculants from a unique collection of microorganisms that are genetically diverse and from of ancient origin. The composition of the inoculants are designed using a proprietary algorithm that includes flux balance modeling and field testing to solve plant production, soil health and contamination problems that affect the agricultural industry and forestry.

Our microbial consortia are is self-sustaining microbial guild that was rationally designed based on the genetic characteristics of each microbe and the symbiotic relationship among all members of the guild. Formulation of our products is guided by the computational power of our proprietary MetaFlux metabolic model to specifically address problem solving for plant growth promotion, nutrient acquisition, restore soil diversity and remediation of contaminated environments.
We currently have three products and several others in the pipeline.

PaleoPower is self-sustaining microbial guild that was rationally designed to accelerate plant growth, promote flowering and decontaminate soils from harmful contaminants that might reduce plant yield or product quality.

PaleoRestore is designed to to  decontaminate glyphosate and chelate heavy metals that might be present in soils and water. It naturally bioremediates this herbicide and crop desiccant from soil and water.

PaleoCoat is a powerful seed coating that promotes germination while boosting seedling health and preventing wilt caused by fungi.

The headquarter and premises of the Ltd. are in a 10-hectare major. Our company’s activities – the production of oyster mushroom substrate, the cultivation of oyster mushrooms, the commercial distribution and trade of fresh oyster mushrooms, and the production of electricity and heat from biogas production – are closely related to each other.

Our company, whose main activity is oyster mushroom cultivation, also plays a role in research and development. In recent years, it has been a participant and leader of numerous domestic and international R&D projects. We have several own know-how in the field of substrate production of champignon mushrooms and the utilization the by-products of mushroom cultivation.

Thanks to a quarter of a century of professional experience, as well as the innovative and open minded, company management that considers environmentally conscious development as a goal, Pilze-Nagy Ltd. is now considered as one of the leading oyster mushroom growing and trading companies in Hungary and Europe.

Name: Laurik International
Description:
In an era of shifting global trade, the corridor between Mercosur and Southern Africa represents one of the next great frontiers for agribusiness growth. Laurik International is the indispensable strategic partner for enterprises bold enough to seize this opportunity. We specialize exclusively in navigating this complex, high-potential route, transforming geopolitical shifts—like the recent EU-Mercosur agreement—into strategic openings for market diversification and resilient growth.   

Success in this corridor requires more than just market data; it demands a mastery of the SACU-Mercosur PTA, fluency in divergent business cultures, and a deep understanding of on-the-ground realities. We provide the clarity and expertise to turn these complexities into your competitive advantage. Our team's deep-seated knowledge of both regions allows us to anticipate challenges, identify unseen opportunities, and de-risk your investments.   

Our unique approach, delivered fluently in Spanish, English, and Afrikaans, offers a powerful synthesis of services. We provide rigorous strategic advisory and export facilitation for key sectors like animal genetics, agtech, and agricultural machinery. This is complemented by our curated technical expeditions—immersive, on-the-ground programs designed to validate opportunities and build the foundational relationships essential for long-term success. We don't just produce reports; we build resilient supply chains and forge high-value partnerships.   

We are committed to fostering responsible and sustainable agribusiness investments that deliver lasting value for our clients and their stakeholders. Contact us to explore how we can unlock the full potential of this dynamic corridor for your business.

En el año 1996 BOLTRAC ha sido premiada por JCB como el Dealer con Mayor Penetración de América.
Con el propósito de encarar eficientemente la globalización e incrementar su penetración en el mercado boliviano, el año 1997 se capitaliza fusionándose al Holding liderizado por Clemsa, lo cual ha significado para BOLTRAC un mayor respaldo económico para las operaciones comerciales, quienes ya habían desarrollado el mercado de maquinaria en países tales como Chile y Perú.

Name: مصنع المراعي للأسمدة
Description:
مقدمة عن مصنع المراعي للأسمدة
يُعَدُّ مصنع المراعي للأسمدة من الشركات الرائدة في إنتاج الأسمدة العضوية بالمملكة العربية السعودية، ويقع في قلب مدينة الخرج، حيث يمثل رمزًا للإبداع والتطور في القطاع الزراعي. يتميز المصنع بتقديم حلول زراعية متكاملة تهدف إلى تعزيز جودة التربة وزيادة إنتاجية المحاصيل عبر منتجات مبتكرة وصديقة للبيئة.

تاريخ وتأسيس المصنع:
تأسس مصنع المراعي للأسمدة بفضل جهود مجموعة من الخبراء المتخصصين في علوم الزراعة والإنتاج الزراعي، الذين اجتمعوا لتلبية الاحتياجات المتزايدة للأسمدة العضوية في السوق المحلي والإقليمي. تم تجهيز المصنع بأحدث التقنيات والمعدات الحديثة، مما يتيح له إنتاج أسمدة ذات جودة عالية تتوافق مع المعايير العالمية.

رؤية المصنع:
تتمثل رؤية مصنع المراعي للأسمدة في أن يصبح الخيار الأول للمزارعين في المملكة ومنطقة الخليج من خلال تقديم منتجات ذات جودة ممتازة تدعم الزراعة المستدامة وتساهم في تحسين البيئة الزراعية. نهدف إلى تحقيق الابتكار المستمر في تطوير منتجاتنا لنواكب أحدث التطورات في صناعة الأسمدة.

مهمة المصنع:
مهمة مصنع المراعي للأسمدة هي تحسين خصوبة التربة وزيادة إنتاجية المحاصيل الزراعية عبر تقديم أسمدة عضوية ذات تركيبات متقدمة. نحن ملتزمون بالمعايير البيئية والسلامة لضمان تأثير إيجابي على البيئة الزراعية.

Name: AfroHarvest ventures
Description:
AfroHarvest Ventures is a dynamic youth-led agribusiness startup committed to transforming food systems through sustainable horticulture. Based in Tanzania, we focus on empowering youth and women by creating opportunities in climate-smart farming, agribusiness, and value addition.

Our startup is currently running a flagship project on oyster mushroom cultivation and processing, which showcases the potential of innovative, low-cost farming models. This project is just the beginning. AfroHarvest is actively scaling into a broader range of horticultural crops such as leafy greens, tomatoes, peppers, and indigenous vegetables that contribute to improved nutrition, food security, and income generation.

Our work centers on four key pillars:
 Horticulture – Promoting high-value, nutritious crops through sustainable practices
 Agritech – Integrating smart technologies for farm management, climate adaptation, and data-driven decision-making
 Value Addition – Reducing post-harvest losses by turning raw produce into market-ready products
 Market Access – Connecting farmers to reliable markets, buyers, and supply chains

We also run training programs, demo farms, and youth-focused incubation hubs that support agri-entrepreneurship, food processing, and digital agriculture. By building inclusive, tech-driven agricultural ecosystems, AfroHarvest is helping shape a more resilient and equitable future for Africa’s farmers.

 Vision:
To lead sustainable agribusiness in Africa by empowering youth and women through smart, eco-friendly farming.

 Mission:
To grow healthy communities by producing quality mushrooms and scaling into diverse horticultural solutions.

Name: Diggy.app
Description:
What if your teams, machines, and data all worked in sync?

The reality for most mining and construction sites is a mix of spreadsheets, WhatsApp groups, point solutions, and guesswork. This isn't just inefficient—it's incredibly costly.

Industry data shows why:
▸ A typical fleet operates at just 27-42% of its capacity (McKinsey & Co).
▸ Reacting to a breakdown costs 3 to 5 times more than preventing one (PwC).
The core issue is a lack of shared, real-time information. Your field teams, office staff, and assets operate in different silos, preventing a single, trusted view of the operation.

Diggy.app connects them all.

Our platform gives everyone—from the site manager to the COO—a unified view to see problems before they happen and find opportunities to improve.

With Diggy.app:
▸ You get live dashboards & reports instead of hunting through spreadsheets & scrolling on your phone.
▸ Your team can react faster to breakdowns through live alerts
▸ You make decisions based on facts, not guesswork.

The result is simple: Higher uptime, reduced costs, and safer, more profitable projects.

This is how modern operations win.

Description:

Norwest Manufacturing Equipment is a national distributor and manufacturer of agricultural equipment and ground engaging tools used in the aftermarket replacement industry. Its products are sold all over the United States, Canada, and Mexico. Norwest Manufacturing Equipment specializes in potato, sugar beet, and a multitude of cultivation and harvest tools, but also is involved in most all types of row crop cultivation practices. Norwest Manufacturing Equipment also has strong supplies of parts used in hay, grain, and bean applications. The company is located in the very center of the potato growing region in Rupert, Idaho. Idaho has been a leader in the potato, sugar beet, and many other farming markets for many decades.

Norwest Manufacturing Equipment is the major supplier to the “Rolled Eye Flail Blade” market to both equipment dealers and original equipment manufacturers. Rolled Eye Flails are made from 5160 steel and heat treated to a 38 to 44 Rockwell hardness. Along with flails Norwest Manufacturing Equipment makes a variety of three point attachment, pivot track fillers and much more.

Joe and Carman were born and raised right here in Rupert Idaho and have another agricultural business just around the corner that has been in our family for the last 33 years. Name: SaskMilk
Description:
SaskMilk (Saskatchewan Milk Marketing Board) as established in 2011 as a producer marketing board under The Agri-Food Act, 2004.  SaskMilk’s general role and responsibility is to design and implement dairy policies and programs for the benefit of producers and other industry stakeholders.

The SaskMilk Board of Directors is comprised of seven active dairy producers and elected by the province’s licensed dairy producers.  The Board is charged with a number of responsibilities including the purchase of producer milk, the transportation of milk to licensed processors, compensating licensed producers through a multiple-component pricing system, enforcement of facility and quality standards, and managing production levels in conjunction with national and regional marketing agreements. 

SaskMilk has a new promotion partnership with Dairy Farmers of Canada to promote to consumers the benefits of consuming dairy products.  Dairy Farmers of Canada is focused on milk and other dairy products promotional activities that engage consumers primarily through print media, online and television advertising. SaskMilk also maintains an extensive presence at the provincial level including advertising, promotion of events, the school milk program, sponsorships, and experiential activities.

SaskMilk has partnered with the University of Saskatchewan and other farm commodity organizations to fund the construction of the Rayner Dairy Research and Teaching Facility located on the U of S Campus. SaskMilk makes ongoing contributions to the Facility for research and is engaged in advising the U of S on pertinent research opportunities through an Advisory Board comprised of industry, academic and government members.

Wintmolders is een familiebedrijf van de vierde generatie gespecialiseerd in hoogwaardige machines voor de land- en tuinbouw en de industrie. We dragen onze kennis en ervaring al meer dan 75 jaar over van generatie op generatie. Daarnaast koppelen we die expertise aan een grote voeling met de modernisering van land- en tuinbouwbedrijven en de evoluties in de industrie. 

De noden van onze klanten staan altijd centraal. Zo komen we tot duurzame klantrelaties gebaseerd op betrokkenheid en vertrouwen. Onze focus ligt op drie pijlers: optimaal presteren, efficiënt personaliseren en oplossingsgericht assisteren. 

Optimaal presteren? Ja, want we zorgen ervoor dat je je machines zo optimaal mogelijk kan gebruiken. We bieden zelfs training ter plaatse aan tijdens je werkzaamheden. Bovendien zijn we goed op de hoogte van de ontwikkelingen rond SmartFarming.

Efficiënt personaliseren? Zeker, want dankzij onze personalisatie van machines en een persoonlijke uitleg op maat krijg je een machine die goed aansluit bij je situatie. Zo werk je comfortabel, ergonomisch en doeltreffend.

Oplossingsgericht assisteren? Uiteraard, want Wintmolders ondersteunt je in elke fase. We bieden een uitgebreide service met proactief onderhoud en herstellingen, en begeleiding bij de administratie rond financiering, verzekeringen en inspectie. Altijd punctueel en gebaseerd op duidelijke afspraken.

Kortom, drie sterke pijlers, waardoor jij kan focussen op je werkzaamheden en het runnen van je bedrijf. Met een partner aan je zijde die de sector door en door kent en zijn ervaring met jou deelt. Want duurzaam samenwerken, dat ligt in onze aard(e).

Name: IPREFER
Description:
Welcome to the "Integrated Pennycress Research Enabling Farm & Energy Resilience Project."

We are a USDA-NIFA funded SAS-CAP project whose goal is to see pennycress commercially launched as a cash cover crop by addressing requirements to ensure successful grower adoption. 

Our lead institution is Western Illinois University, the home institution of Project Director Dr. Win Phippen. 

Our project partners CoverCress, Inc. Illinois State University, University of Minnesota, Ohio State University, USDA-ARS-NCSCRL, and interested stakeholders who are poised to deliver the following and more:

   -  Improved pennycress breeding and genetics
   - Improved pennycress agronomic management
   - Supply chain establishment and reduction of supply chain bottlenecks
   - Education and extension networks that can enhance pennycress adoption as a cash cover crop.

As a winter cover crop, pennycress will impact many of the top news stories covering rural economics, natural resource management, biofuel technology, energy security and the development of a more resilient and more Midwestern farm economy. Pennycress can:

 - Positively impact the profitability of production agriculture,
 - Decrease soil erosion and nutrient runoff
 - Protect water systems
 - Support pollinator health and biodiversity,
 - Suppress spring weeds,
 - Increase energy security by diversifying the nation’s energy portfolio
 - Contribute to the economic health of rural communities.

IPREFER is supported by Agriculture and Food Research Initiative Competitive Grant No. 2019-69012-29851 from the National Institute of Food and Agriculture. Any opinions, findings, conclusions, or recommendations expressed in this publication are those of the author(s) and do not necessarily reflect the view of the U.S. Department of Agriculture.

Name: Alabama Sustainable Agriculture Network
Description:
Vision: ASAN envisions a thriving sustainable food system in Alabama.

Mission: ASAN coordinates knowledge sharing, builds resources, and strengthens networks of sustainable farmers and local food advocates to deepen relationships between the people of Alabama, the food we eat, and the land.

Who we are: ASAN is a farmer-centered organization welcoming all who wish to implement, expand, and support sustainable agricultural practices in the state of Alabama. We prioritize the perspectives of BIPOC, women, LGBTQ+, and other underrepresented farmers who root their livelihoods in sustainable agriculture. To move forward successfully, we partner with consumers, advocates, and other organizations committed to supporting the Alabama food system, sustainability, and environmental justice.

We define sustainable agriculture as a balanced web of intergenerational relationships that produce food and fiber in a way that is ecologically regenerative, equitable, and economically viable, allowing the land and those who work the land to thrive.

Our core values:

Equity: We promote access to opportunities that build a just and fair food system for all.
Right-relationship: We embrace the ongoing processes of aligning our thoughts and actions in service to kindness and care for ourselves, each other, and the land.
Thriving community: We aim for an existence where all individuals and living beings can prosper, flourish, and exist in harmony with one another. We believe we all have an active role in shaping these communities.
Transformation: We welcome all who strive to grow and change to improve themselves and the systems we exist within.

Name: Agri Business Growth
Description: Agri Business Growth encompasses strategies and platforms designed to scale agricultural enterprises through modern technologies, funding, and market access. Leveraging Agri‑SaaS, precision agriculture, digital marketplaces, and fintech, it empowers farmers and agribusinesses to optimize yield, resources, and profitability. Tremendous market expansion is expected—India’s agritech sector alone may reach US$24billion by 2025, while global agri‑tech platforms could hit nearly US$40billion by 2032 . Key drivers include AI, IoT, big data, and automation, which lower barriers and enable sustainable practices . This integrated ecosystem fosters efficiency, financial inclusion, and innovation, fueling long‑term growth across the agri‑value chain.

In today’s world, sustainability has become a crucial focal point across various industries, with the iron and steel sector being no exception. Our commitment to sustainability involves the adoption of innovative technologies and methodologies aimed at reducing carbon emissions and enhancing resource efficiency. At Hyderabad SSP Exim, we understand that sustainable practices not only contribute to environmental conservation but also bolster our competitive edge in the market.

As we delve deeper into the realms of sustainability, we aim to implement practices that promote recycling, waste reduction, and energy conservation. Name: AGRI AGRO GRAND EXPO
Description:
Agri Agro Grand Expo 2025, the inaugural national Exhibition on Agriculture Technologies, will take place in 14,15, & 16 February 2025 at the Kothi Meena Bazar Ground, Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India.

Agri Agro Grand Expo is set to establish itself as a premier platform for both national and international visitors to engage and collaborate with leading agricultural technology companies across India. This event marks our first exhibition, and we are committed to making a significant impact on the agriculture industry.

As India’s foremost emerging exhibition on agriculture, Agri Agro Grand Expo encompasses all aspects of the agricultural industry, both major and minor. We aim to attract not only significant stakeholders but also farmers from nearly every state in India. The event offers unparalleled networking opportunities with various groups, including high-ranking agriculture officials, enabling attendees to identify and explore business and investment opportunities across India.

Agriculture plays a crucial role in India’s economy, with a significant portion of the rural population relying on it for their livelihood. Therefore, all stakeholders in the agricultural industry will benefit from participating in this event. Agri Agro Grand Expo stands out as one of the most comprehensive forums where Indian agriculture experts, academia, institutional investors, venture capitalists, analysts, progressive farmers, and other experts can shape the future collaboration landscape of agricultural technology.

Name: Jitban Supply Chain
Description:
Welcome to Jitban Supply Chain, your trusted partner in the world of agriculture produce. We specialize in developing a Sustainable Supply Chain for consistent quality, naturally grown produce, ensuring that you and your customers receive only the best nature has to offer. With our commitment to sustainable farming practices and stringent quality control measures, we bring you a diverse range of delicious and nutritious produce, free from harmful chemicals. Explore our wide selection and experience the true taste of pure, natural goodness.

Vision
To ensure Healthy Foods to current & future generations leaving no one behind by collaborating with different stakeholders

Mission
To increase production and productivity of Agri-horticulture crops in an environmentally friendly way using Agri-technology. Develop an efficient and sustainable supply chain with demographic inclusion, generating margins from efficient operation by reducing supply chain losses.

Environment Policy
Jitban is committed to continuously improving its Supply Chain for agricultural produce, aiming for Sustainability.

In our journey towards Climate Neutrality and Sustainability, using technology & primary data, devise quantified short-term goals & action plans for continuous improvement through our business operations to lessen the impact on the local and global environment by conserving energy, water, and other natural resources, reducing waste generation and recycling. 

Jitban is committed to environmental excellence and pollution prevention, meeting or exceeding all environmental regulatory requirements.


USP
We are Seed to Fork B2B company rather than a Farm to Fork company, thus we can:

Maintain consistent quality.
Guide farmers from sowing time. Using past & real-time data to match Demand and supply better.
Keep a check on our pricing.
Generate margins by reducing waste & maintaining quality.
Thus, developing an Efficient rather than Effective Supply Chain.

Established in 2017 under Montana law, we serve the growers of lentils, chickpeas, dry peas, and fava beans through smart investments in research, market development, education, and policy.

As the leading state in U.S. pulse crop production, Montana plays a critical role in feeding the world with nutritious, affordable, and conservation-friendly protein. The MPCC ensures that Montana producers see a strong return on their checkoff investment by funding forward-thinking projects that improve yields, open new markets, and elevate the profile of pulses locally and globally.

We collaborate with research institutions, industry partners, and policymakers to drive innovation and strengthen rural communities. From expanding pulse-based products to highlighting the role of pulses in regenerative agriculture, we champion the producers behind every seed.

Follow us to connect with the heart of Montana agriculture and stay informed about the future of pulse crops.

Backed by 6 years of R&D with the Canadian National Research Council and proven through award-winning commercial systems, Plantafarm enables local production of premium berries with superior economics, shorter supply chains, and improved freshness.

We deliver turnkey greenhouse infrastructure, long-term maintenance and training contracts, and branded berry programs, aligning farmer profitability with sustainable food security goals under Saudi Vision 2030.

Our technology offers several unique features that set us apart from other beekeeping solutions. We provide real-time monitoring of bee health through remote sensing capabilities, allowing beekeepers to make informed decisions about hive management. Our technology is also portable, making it easy to move between multiple apiaries. In addition, our hive management information provides timely interventions to increase productivity and maintain bee health.

Bees are crucial for pollinating over 33% of the world's food supply. Without bees, many fruits, vegetables, and nuts we rely on for our daily meals would struggle to grow. At Bee Cube, we're dedicated to transforming beekeeping to ensure a stable supply of bees for farmers. Name: Regen Harvests
Description:
Regen Harvests formerly Agrobulking stands at the forefront of revolutionizing the bulking model in Uganda by introducing an innovative interest-free Crop Advance Payment solution and a range of value-added services, empowering the smallholder farmers who make up the 82% of the farming communities in uganda on their journey towards agroecology and regenerative agriculture.

This visionary and forward-thinking company is dedicated to facilitating smallholder farmers, whose composition is about 65% women particularly those transitioning to agroecology and regenerative agriculture, aiming not only to sustainably boost agricultural production but also increase and elevate household income in farming communities in uganda. 

Pioneered by Regen Harvests team through the Rootical Business Builder Studio, the Crop Advance Payment (CAP) is a financial mechanism designed to address the longstanding challenges faced by small holder farmers which include limited access to financial services because they don’t have the needed collateral required by financial institutions. These farmers, often marginalized and financially underserved, find themselves caught in a cycle of debt, poverty and uncertainty. Besides this is further exacerbated by Climate change which poses a significant threat to agricultural productivity, with unpredictable weather patterns affecting crop yields. Besides this Small holder farmers often face barriers such as limited access to markets for organic produce and heavily rely on the middlemen for quick solutions.

Name: Ag-Uni
Description:
AgUni is an Intelligent Ecological AgTech company pioneering the Agricultural CDMO model — bridging production, technology, and global supply chains.
Through AgDome, our smart-factory-type agricultural infrastructure, AgUni transforms agriculture into a scalable and data-driven industry.

AgDome serves as a core production and data platform that connects cultivation, processing, and digital economy systems — including Digital Cultivation Rights (RWA) and Carbon Credit Modeling.
This platform not only enables transparent and sustainable food and life science production, but also evolves into new forms of ecological space — AgDome-based restaurants, wellness centers, and urban green hubs that redefine how agriculture coexists within cities.

By extending agriculture’s role from production to spatial innovation and urban regeneration, AgUni presents a new model of convergent agriculture — where smart cities, ecological design, and digital assets are harmonized through one integrated system.

From Korea to ASEAN, the Middle East, US and Europe, AgUni continues to connect agriculture, finance, technology, and policy to build a resilient and inclusive future for both people and the planet.

 AgDome | Agricultural CDMO | Digital Cultivation Rights (RWA) | Carbon Credits | Urban AgTech | Convergent Agriculture

애그니(AgUni)는 지능형 생태농업( Intelligent Ecological AgTech ) 기업으로,
세계 최초로 농업 CDMO(Agricultural CDMO) 모델을 구축해
생산–기술–공급망을 하나의 구조로 연결하고 있습니다.

애그돔(AgDome) 은 단순한 농업 시설이 아니라

이를 통해 투명하고 지속가능한 농업 생산뿐 아니라
레스토랑·웰니스공간·도시 녹지 허브 등 새로운 공간가치로 확장되는 생태농업 인프라를 실현합니다.

Name: CommonGround Project
Description:
The CommonGround project (CG) is a four-year (2022-2026) Wageningen Environmental Research (WENR) project implemented by Integrated Seed and Sector Development (ISSD) Uganda, with funding from the Embassy of the Kingdom of the Netherlands in Kampala in partnership with other local partners (JESE, AID, Caritas Kabale and A2N Uganda).

The project is rolled-out in the highlands of Uganda: Rwenzori (Ntoroko and Bunyangabu), Kigezi (Kabale, Rubanda and Kisoro and Elgon (Bududa).

The project’s goal is to build 150, 000 resilient smallholder farmer households in communities and watershed in the highlands of Uganda, based on sustainable farming systems, restored watersheds, and improved marketing opportunities.

Name: Iowa's Center for Agricultural Safety and Health
Description:
In 1990, the Iowa State Legislature identified a need for a statewide center addressing concerns in agricultural safety and health. Iowa’s Center for Agricultural Safety and Health came out of that legislative session and continues to be one of the only mandated, state funded centers for agricultural safety and health in the country.

Designated as a collaborative effort between four Iowa institutions: The University of Iowa, Iowa State University, the Iowa Department of Public Health and the Iowa Department of Agriculture and Land Stewardship, I-CASH works to improve the health and safety of the agricultural population by developing statewide prevention and educational initiatives.

Although there have been many structural and technological changes in Iowa’s agriculture, farm-related injuries and fatalities remain higher than those in other industries.

Name: SkyAgro Armenia
Description:
SkyAgro: Revolutionizing Armenian Agriculture.

At SkyAgro, we're not just about precision agriculture. We're pioneers, reshaping agricultural innovation in Armenia. Our motto, "We Help Farmers Grow", embodies our mission to transform traditional farming into sustainable, efficient practices.

 Crop Dusting: Using advanced drones (https://skyagro.am/drones), we ensure precise, eco-friendly crop protection, cutting down chemical usage by 20-50%.

 AgroPilot Trainings (https://skyagro.am/pilot): We're nurturing Armenia's next generation of agro-specialists, focusing on young students from STEM oriented schools of border villages.

 Agro-Drone Rentals: Overcome budget constraints with our rentals, granting farmers access to top-notch drone tech without heavy investments.

 CrowdFunding & Crowd-Investments: Harness the power of community! Join our mission, invest in Armenian agriculture, and fuel innovation. (https://skyagro.am/invest)

Our Vision:
We dream of placing Armenian agriculture on the global map. By fusing traditional practices with modern tech, we aim for an empowered, knowledgeable farming community ready for tomorrow's challenges.

Embark with us on this transformative journey, intertwining tradition and tech for a thriving Armenian agricultural future.

Name: Roots to Riches of Andhra Pradesh
Description:
In alignment with our global mission, we are committed to transforming rural livelihoods in Andhra Pradesh by reaching 600,000 households through agriculture and livestock-based interventions by 2030 and beyond. This vision supports the Government of Andhra Pradesh’s Swarna Andhra Vision 2047, focusing on sustainable development and inclusive growth.

As part of this effort, we are convening a select group of thematic experts to co-create a bold, inclusive, and future-ready roadmap, Andhra Pradesh Strategy 2030. This strategy will focus on transforming food systems, strengthening agriculture and livestock value chains, and empowering women and smallholder farmers through Scale, Permanence, and Partnerships.

We invite you to be a part of this transformative journey, bringing your institutional expertise to shape a people-centric, sustainable future for Andhra Pradesh’s food and farming landscapes.

Together with government leaders, corporates, INGOs, and academia, we aim to: Eradicate rural poverty through regenerative, high-value, and inclusive agriculture and livestock systems—empowering women, smallholder farmers, and youth as entrepreneurs and change agents within resilient food and market ecosystems.

Foster ecological stewardship by promoting climate-smart agriculture and nature-based solutions aligned with the SDGs, national priorities, and Andhra Pradesh’s socio-economic aspirations.

Define thematic goals and systemic enablers for long-term, measurable impact by blending global insights with local wisdom through a participatory approach.

Inspire the next generation of farmers by enhancing rural livelihoods, integrating agriculture, livestock, food systems, education, and health to create dignified, opportunity-rich pathways.

Strengthen farmer institutions like FPOs, SHGs, and cooperatives, enabling responsible agriculture through certification, capacity building, and access to value-added markets

Socijalno poduzeće Greens d.o.o. osnovano je 2018. godine kao odgovor na potrebe savremenog čovjeka za provjereno zdravom ishranom ali i s ciljem radne integracije i ekonomskog osnaživanja osoba s invaliditetom. Prvo je poduzeće za proizvodnju mikropovrća, začinskog bilja i jestivog cvijeća u Bosni i Hercegovini.
Nastao je uz podršku nevladine organizacije ProRehe koja se bavi radnom rehabilitacijom, edukacijom, osposobljavanjem i zapošljavanjem osoba s invaliditetom i drugih teško upošljivih kategorija ljudi.
Greens posjeduje OK certifikat (organska kontrola), koji potvrđuje da su naše mikrpovrće, začinsko bilje i jestivo cvijeće premium kvalitete i da su uzgojeni isključivo na organskim principima. U procesu proizvodnje i distribucije važnu ulogu imaju osobe s invaliditetom.
Za organsko i začinsko bilje smo se odlučili jer je istraživanje tržišta u BiH pokazalo da se na njemu ne mogu naći domaće mikropovrće, začinsko i ljekovito bilje, a posebno ne svježe i uzgojeno na ekološkim i organskim principima, a to je upravo ono što mi radimo. Također smo kroz višegodišnji rad sa osobama s invaliditetom uvidjeli da je ovo idealan posao za njih, jer oni biljkama pružaju posebnu pažnju i ljubav, imaju istančan osjećaj za mikro detalje što ih čini stručnjacima u ovoj profesiji.

ElectroMech Agri are recent recipients of the Platinum Level Innovator recognition from Innovator NI for creating a new design & innovating the rotary platform market. The enhancements by us have made the process more efficient for the operator and added value to businesses and produced new profits & business growth.

After installation, we deliver the highest level of support & service with our highly trained team that covers all of Ireland, Scotland; available 24/7, 365 days a year. Our service team is available for servicing and upgrades.

Name: The Open Field
Description:
The Open Field integrates technology with tradition to redefine sustainable agriculture and agro-tourism. Rooted in the tribal economy, we empower farmers by building transparent, efficient supply chains for forest produce (mahua, tamarind, shellac), native rice, and millets. 

Our blockchain-enabled platform ensures fair pricing, traceability and accountability in sourcing, processing, and marketing., while IoT-enabled solar dehydration, cluster-based inventory management and direct farmer partnerships we enhance product value at the source & reduce post-harvest losses. 

At our experience center, visitors engage with indigenous ingredients, traditional cuisine, local culture, and farm-to-table hospitality. Our commitment to impact entrepreneurship is evident in our initiatives that drive rural prosperity, promote afforestation, and preserve biodiversity.  

Incubated at NSRCEL, IIM Bangalore, and ABIF, IIT Kharagpur, The Open Field is building a future where sustainability meets innovation. Join us in shaping a resilient, transparent, and equitable agricultural ecosystem.

#SustainableAgriculture #Blockchain #AgroTourism #TribalEconomy #ForestProduce #ImpactEntrepreneurship

From farm productivity to traceable marketplaces, nutrition planning to cooperative finance, we are building the digital rails and physical infrastructure that power a smarter, more inclusive agricultural economy.
We believe that when smallholder farmers are equipped with the right tools, technology, training, traceability, and trade, they can feed communities, build generational wealth, and drive sustainable development.

Our Vision
To transform global food systems by empowering agriculture through smart technology, scalable infrastructure, and inclusive solutions.

Our Mission
To empower smallholder farmers and agribusinesses through a connected ecosystem of digital tools and physical infrastructure that drives productivity, sustainability, and inclusive growth across agricultural value chains in Africa and beyond.

Name: Sentek Galcon USA
Description:
Who We Are
Since 1991, Sentek designs, develops, manufactures, supports and globally distributes world-class technologies for measuring and managing soil moisture, salinity and temperature.

Use Sentek technologies to monitor groundwater movement, generate exceptional research data and gain vital insights into crop water usage to make better irrigation decisions.

Growers using Sentek technologies save on input costs, reduce waste, increase crop yield and quality and ensure long-term sustainability.

Sentek products are sold and supported by a global network of highly trained dealers who are the local experts you can contact for advice on site selection, installation, setup, ongoing product care and data analysis.

We have representatives based in the USA, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Europe, Africa, Asia, South America and the Middle East who can help you choose the right Sentek Technologies to measure and manage soil moisture, salinity and temperature.

World-class quality
We stand by the products we produce and we invite independent third parties to test our technologies, business model and inventions. These regular reviews ensure we make the best soil moisture measuring and monitoring products possible. Business, industry associations and government have all independently endorsed our products. We have also achieved the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) 9001 certification that proves our quality management system is world-class, our products comply with consumer and regulatory standards and Sentek is a brand you can trust.

Become a Dealer
Have you considered joining our global network of specialised Sentek dealers? The three key strengths you need for success are: farming knowledge, sales and marketing skills and technical capability. Learn how you can connect farmers, researchers and engineers to Sentek soil moisture monitoring technologies and how we help you develop the skills to distribute our products and offer quality advice.

Description:
About Us

At ZeroFood by SafeGarden, we are redefining the future of food with a mission to deliver clean, safe, and nutrition-rich products to businesses and consumers worldwide. As a doctor-led, nutrition-first company, we stand for health, longevity, and sustainability.

Our Role

We are proud to be among the leading exporters, distributors, aggregators, and suppliers across the GCC, India, and Southeast Asia — serving both B2B and B2C markets. With our efficient, technology-driven supply chain and trusted farmer network, we ensure that every product is handpicked, residue-free, and delivered fresh with precision and care.

What We Deliver

Our portfolio covers all major food categories that drive daily life and wellbeing:
 Fruits & Vegetables – farm-fresh, zero-chemical, handpicked produce
 Groceries & Essentials – clean staples for homes and businesses
 Protein & Nutrition Bars – fueling health and performance
 Baby Foods – safe, pure, and carefully crafted for little ones
 Instant Mixes & Indian Snacks – authentic, convenient, and nourishing

Innovation & Impact

 Regenerative Farming: Supporting farmers while protecting the planet

 AI-Powered Marketplace & Chikitsa AI: Personalized nutrition, smarter choices, and access to expert doctors

 Zero Skin Care: Organic, chemical-free products for all ages, including infants

Our Legacy

With over 20 years of expertise through our parent brand, SafeGarden, we’ve delivered more than 100,000 kg of residue-free produce to 50,000+ households, building a legacy of trust, quality, and impact.

Our Movement

ZeroFood is more than just a marketplace — it’s a movement for clean food and healthier living. From farm to fork to future, we are committed to empowering communities, businesses, and families with food that supports nutrition, longevity, and wellbeing.

Name: Constro International Exhibition
Description:
CONSTRO is India’s Largest Integrated Construction EXPO that converges brands and services related to infrastructure and construction. It is open to all EXPO which encourages the thought leaders and biggest brands in the industry to converge at a single location. 

CONSTRO is a biennial EXPO and is an initiative of the Pune Construction Engineering Research Foundation (PCERF) which is a torch bearer of innovation in the construction and infrastructure industry.  PCERF has been at the forefront of the infrastructure and construction industry and is focused on creating avenues, and opportunities and conducting expert knowledge dissemination for industry professionals.

PCERF has been organizing CONSTRO International EXPO biennially since 1985 with the objective of ‘ Education Through Exhibition’. It is focused on Construction Machinery, Materials, Methods, and Projects and is organized at par with international standards.

CONSTRO 2023 is more than an EXPO, it also consists of Knowledge Sharing sessions, Seminars & Conferences. This EXPO will include products and services related to Mobility, Housing, Civic Infrastructure, Energy, Sustainable Development, Communication, and Healthcare.  

CONSTRO is planned around a specific theme each time. This year. the theme for CONSTRO 2023 is -’ Infrastructure Catalyst for Development Aatmanirbhar” This is the 17th edition of CONSTRO EXPO  which will be held from 12 January to 15 th January 2023 at Pune International Exhibition and Convention Center ( PIECC), Moshi, Pune, India. PMRDA is  honorary concept partner for CONSTRO 2023.
For more information on booking a stall for your business, please visit www.constroindia.org or contact 9823508576.

We design and produce biodegradable seedling bags made from recycled waste cartons, offering farmers a durable, eco-friendly alternative to plastic grow bags.

Our innovative solution decomposes at the right stage of plant growth, enriching the soil and reducing long-term waste. Bana Bags serves greenhouses, nurseries, cooperatives, NGOs, and government institutions—starting in Kigali and expanding nationwide.

Beyond products, we provide marketing and consultation services to promote sustainable agriculture and environmental conservation. As a woman-led, youth-driven venture, Bana Bags aims to create an impact across gender, class, and regional lines, partnering with organizations such as the Rwandan Ministry of Agriculture, local NGOs, and agricultural cooperatives.

Our vision: A future where agriculture thrives without polluting the planet.

Name: JCB DE LA SOBERA
Description:
La innovación está en el corazón de todo lo que hacemos
La historia de JCB es una historia de innovación, ambición y mucho trabajo. Desde sus modestos comienzos en 1945 como constructora de remolques basculantes agrícolas hasta llegar a ser la empresa de fabricación líder en el mundo en la que se ha convertido, JCB ha ido superando continuamente sus límites gracias a nuestro deseo de ser los mejores. El lema de Joseph Cyril Bamford, mi padre y fundador de la empresa, era: “Nunca estoy satisfecho”, y tenía razón, nunca estamos satisfechos con nuestros logros. No obstante, opino que incluso él se asombraría de lo que ha llegado a ser esta empresa. Actualmente tenemos 22 fábricas en 4 continentes y más de 750 distribuidores en todo el mundo.

Historia JCB
Esta es una época emocionante para nosotros. En solo 67 años, hemos pasado de ser una sola persona trabajando en un taller de Uttoxeter a convertirnos en una importante marca reconocida en todo el mundo por su espíritu innovador. Todo esto se lo debemos a nuestra gente: una sólida plantilla de 10 000 empleados que conforman la familia JCB, de la que estamos muy orgullosos. Nuestros logros en estos 67 años han sido considerables, pero en JCB creemos que hay que mirar siempre hacia delante, centrados en la siguiente creación, en el siguiente nivel de éxito. Mientras usted lee estas líneas, JCB sigue innovando y superando los límites de la investigación y el desarrollo, sobre todo en materia de sostenibilidad, ya que los costos energéticos y las emisiones son un aspecto que cobra cada vez más importancia a la hora de adquirir maquinaria. Muchos de nuestros clientes tendrán que reinventar sus negocios para cumplir los nuevos estándares de construcción y la legislación sobre emisiones, y nosotros estaremos allí para ayudarles durante todo el proceso, como siempre lo hemos hecho.

Dedique un minuto a leer los hitos de innovación que hemos establecido durante décadas en el menú que figura a continuación.

Anthony Bamford

Name: Nutrientul Sa Palota
Description:
Înființată in 1991, Nutrientul SA este o societate pe acțiuni, cu capital 100% românesc, a cărui actionar majoritar este dl ing Iosif Pazuric. De atunci si până in prezent compania a reușit sa se dezvolte si sa isi mareasca aria de activitate an de an, creând un grup de firme in agribusiness - Nutrientul Grup. De aici si motto-ul firmei: CREȘTEM ÎMPREUNĂ!
Nucleul afacerii este reprezentat de Fabrica de Nutreturi Combinate Palota care produce furaj pentru fermele grupului si pentru clienți externi. La acest moment, prin grupul de firme Nutrientul, ne-am dezvoltat si pentru a converti furajul in carne de porc sau de pui cat si pentru a ne asigura materie prima pentru fabrica de furaj.
In sectorul producerii cărnii de porc asigurăm prin fermele noastre toate fazele tehnologice pentru obitinere porcului gras destinat abatorizarii. Avem o capacitate de cazare combinata pentru 5000 de scroafe si spațiile necesare pentru întreținerea pana la 110-120 kg a produsilor lor.
In sectorul producerii cărnii de pui avem ferme de ferme de crestere si îngrășare care au o capacitate de cazare de 1.000.000 pasari pe serie. Facem pași serioși sa ne dezvoltăm intern si partea de reproductie a pasarilor prin înființarea de ferme de reproductie si a unei stații de incubatie.
Pentru producerea furajului in fabrica noastra exploatam 2500 ha de teren in partea de vest a țării si avem o capacitate de stocare a cerealelor de 60.000 tone in mai multe locatii.
Fiind într-o zonă propice cultivării porumbului am investit într-o moara de porumb de ultima generatie, care valorifica superior porumbul producand malai grisat pentru consum uman si subproduse pentru fabrica de furaje.
Credem ca impletirea potențialului local cu tehnologii si practici de ultima generatie ne oferă consistența necesara pentru a cladi un business care sa dainuie.

Name: Lactalign
Description:
Are your clusters sitting evenly? Balance the Bias with Lactalign. A simple and effective solution to support the weight of a milking cluster evenly.

Lactalign has been designed and engineered to support the weight of a milking cluster evenly under the cow, providing equal weight and vacuum across all four quarters of the cow’s udder.

An unbalanced cluster puts uneven weight across the four quarters, increasing the chance of liner slip or cluster kick-off. Even if the cluster is reattached or repositioned, the milk let-down is interrupted, making complete emptying unlikely. In turn, this can impact the cows’ health and milk yields.

THE PROOF
To assess the effectiveness of Lactalign, an independent study was carried out by the Dairy Group's Ian Ohnstad. By presenting the weight of the cluster evenly under the cow and distributing the cluster’s weight evenly over all four quarters, the following reductions were observed thanks to the herd experiencing a more comfortable milking:

* 50% Reduction in cases of mastitis in the front quarters
* 59.6% Reduction in liner slippage
* 47% Reduction in the number of kick-offs
* 65% Reduction in reattachments

Please find full details of the study on our website.

Lactalign cluster supports can be easily installed in most milking parlours, including rotary, herringbone and rapid exit parlours.

Please contact us if you have any query relating to its suitability for your palour.  Dealer enquiries welcome.

Name: Farm Security Ltd
Description:
At Farm Security Ltd, we offer a comprehensive range of security solutions tailored to the unique needs of UK agriculture. Whether you’re securing machinery, vehicles, livestock, or property, we provide proven technologies to help protect your livelihood from rural crime.

With many years of experience in the agricultural sector, our team truly understands farming and rural business life. Whether it’s a newborn piglet or a £1 million harvester, your income relies on having your assets exactly where you need them – on time and in full working order.

Our mission is simple: To keep UK farms safe from theft, intrusions, and criminal activity – giving you peace of mind and a secure business.

Rural crime is rising. As the value and liquidity of farm machinery and produce increase, so does their appeal to criminals. Our team members come from backgrounds in farming, agriculture, and rural business, so we know how critical timing can be – like having your sprayer ready when the weather window opens for disease or stress control. We also understand the vital role GPS and RTK systems play in delivering efficiency, precision, and profitability. These systems are frequent targets for theft, yet what criminals often don’t realise is how disruptive their loss is to the farm’s entire operation.

Description:
ASSEA Bioenergy & Biosoils transforms marine plant waste and biowaste into high‑quality organic compost and biosoils. 
 Based on Kos Island, we recycle Posidonia oceanica seaweed and other biodegradable materials through controlled aerobic composting, creating natural, peat‑free, chemical‑free products that support soil health and plant vitality.
- Thanks to our many years of experience and expertise, we produce Bio Compost ASSEA and BioSoil ASSEA, natural products that enhance soil structure, aeration, nutrient absorption, and plant resistance.
 We work with farmers, nurseries, garden centers, municipalities, hotels, and eco‑conscious individuals seeking reliable, natural soil solutions. Our approach is rooted in circular economy principles: we collect, recycle, and return organic matter to the earth, thereby closing the loop between the sea and soil.
~ ASSEA holds a national innovation certificate and has been recognized as an EU FLAG good practice for sustainable coastal management. Every product reflects our commitment to sustainability, responsibility, and soil health.

Name: Growzone Farms
Description:
Welcome to GrowZone Farms, a pioneering hydroponic farm at the forefront of sustainable agriculture. Founded in 2021, we have dedicated ourselves to revolutionizing the way we grow food. With a deep commitment to environmental stewardship and technological innovation, we have created an oasis of flourishing crops in an urban setting.

At GrowZone Farms, we harness the power of hydroponics, a soil-less cultivation method that maximizes resource efficiency and minimizes environmental impact. By precisely controlling nutrient delivery, light exposure, and climate conditions, we produce consistently high-quality, pesticide-free crops year-round.

Our team of dedicated experts combines their passion for agriculture with cutting-edge techniques to nurture a diverse range of vegetables, herbs, and fruits. From leafy greens to vibrant tomatoes, our produce is grown with utmost care, ensuring exceptional taste, superior nutrition, and extended shelf life.

Beyond our commitment to exceptional produce, we prioritize sustainability in every aspect of our operations. Through efficient water usage, reduced land footprint, and minimized waste generation, we strive to set new standards for environmentally friendly farming practices.

But GrowZone Farms is more than just a farm. We aim to cultivate a community built on shared values of health, sustainability, and food security. Through educational initiatives, partnerships with local organizations, and open-door policies, we invite individuals and groups to learn about hydroponics and experience the wonders of urban farming.

We believe that sustainable agriculture holds the key to a greener future, and at GrowZone Farms, we are proud to be leading the charge. Join us on this exciting journey as we shape the landscape of modern farming and pave the way for a more sustainable and resilient food system.

Benefits from use include improved soil structures, stronger plant growth with increased yields giving rise to healthier and more vibrant crops and animals.

Penergetic soil, plant, compost, slurry, animal, and water products are each standalone products, although they also have synergistic benefits when used in combination, especially the soil & plant products. Suitable for all soils, crops, and climates.

Working in partnership with Penergetic’s international network of clients, new and innovative individual products and solutions are continually being developed. Name: TerraSpray
Description:
TerraSpray GCS
TerraSpray GCS is a purpose-built ground control system for agricultural spraying UAVs.
Designed for professional crop spraying operations, TerraSpray GCS focuses on what matters in the field — accurate planning, controlled application, and compliance-ready workflows — without locking operators into proprietary hardware ecosystems.
As regulatory pressure and NDAA requirements continue to shape the industry, TerraSpray GCS provides a vendor-neutral, NDAA-ready control platform that works with compliant flight controllers and modern agricultural UAV architectures.
Built specifically for spraying missions, TerraSpray GCS supports:
Field-first planning with boundaries, obstacles, and no-spray zones
Application-driven controls such as rate per hectare, swath width, and droplet size
RTK-aware workflows for high-accuracy operations
Offline and online planning for real-world field conditions
TerraSpray GCS exists to give operators, integrators, and growers choice, control, and confidence in how aerial spraying missions are planned and executed.

But what makes us truly unique?

Farmer-centric focus: We design everything with farmers in mind, addressing their specific needs and challenges through local languages, offline functionality, and tailored solutions.
Data-driven insights: We harness the power of data to provide farmers with actionable recommendations on improving yields, managing finances, and connecting with buyers.
Sustainable solutions: We champion climate-smart agriculture and environmentally friendly practices, ensuring long-term success for farmers and the planet.
Collaboration is key: We partner with leading organizations, NGOs, and stakeholders to build a robust ecosystem that supports and empowers farmers across Africa.
Join us on this journey!

Follow us for inspiring stories of farmer success and insights into the future of African agriculture.
Stay updated on our latest innovations and how you can get involved in our mission.

Together, let's unlock the potential of African agriculture and create a brighter future for generations to come.

Name: Rouna Fresh
Description:
About Us:
At Rouna Fresh, our journey started in 2019 when we began supporting subsistence farmers in Papua New Guinea by supplying seeds and buying back their crops. During the COVID-19 pandemic, we worked closely with farmers in the Sogeri region, providing essential resources and helping deliver fresh fruits and vegetables to corporate clients like PricewaterhouseCoopers (PWC). This experience opened our eyes to the struggles faced by subsistence farmers, from limited market access to the challenges of improving farming practices.
In response to these challenges, we have refocused our efforts to work even more closely with local farmers, aiming to create lasting improvements in farming techniques, income flow, and market access. Rouna Fresh is now focused on building an ecosystem that supports farmers not only with better practices but also by helping them grow their income through stable, sustainable sales channels and contribute to the overall economic growth of the region.
Key Areas of Focus:
•	Farmer Support & Education: Training in modern farming techniques, crop management, and sustainability to boost yields and quality.
•	Market Access & Income Growth: Connecting farmers to fair-priced local, regional, and corporate markets.
•	Building a Farmer Ecosystem: Creating cooperatives to enhance resource sharing, collective strength, and economic growth.
•	Expansion & Sustainability: Growing our network to include farmers in Central and Gulf Provinces for long-term impact.
Through this holistic approach, Rouna Fresh aims to be a reliable partner in transforming the agricultural landscape for subsistence farmers, creating a pathway to prosperity for local communities and contributing to Papua New Guinea’s economic growth

Name: Super intensive olive grove plantations INVESTMENT FUND IN SPAIN - HORACIO LOPEZ CARVAJAL
Description:
### Investment Opportunity: Super-Intensive Olive Grove Plantations in Spain

#### Overview of Super-Intensive Olive Grove Plantations

Super-intensive olive grove plantations are designed for maximum efficiency and productivity. They feature:

- **High Planting Density**: 1,500 to 2,000 trees per hectare, versus 100 to 300 in traditional setups.
- **Specific Varieties**: High-yield, super-intensive compatible varieties like Arbequina, Koroneiki, and Arbosana.
- **Efficient Irrigation**: Drip irrigation for optimal water and nutrient delivery.
- **Mechanization**: Extensive use of machinery for tasks, reducing labor costs and increasing efficiency.
- **Advanced Monitoring**: Technology like soil sensors and drones for tracking growth and production.

#### Investment Fund: Super-Intensive Olive Grove Plantations in Spain

Led by Horacio López Carvajal, this fund focuses on developing and managing super-intensive olive plantations in Spain. Spain’s status as a leading olive oil producer makes this model a lucrative investment due to:

- **High Profitability**: Faster return on investment (ROI) and higher yields per hectare.
- **Rising Global Demand**: Increased worldwide consumption of olive oil due to health benefits.
- **Sustainability**: Efficient resource use with minimal environmental impact.
- **Government Support**: Policies and subsidies in Spain favor modern, sustainable agriculture.

#### Financial Highlights

- **Investment per Hectare**: Establishing a super-intensive olive grove requires €12,000 to €15,000 per hectare.
- **Yield per Hectare**: Mature groves produce 10 to 12 tons of olives annually, translating to 1,500 to 2,000 liters of olive oil per hectare per year.
- **Return on Investment (ROI)**: Achieved typically within 5 to 7 years, compared to 10 to 15 years in traditional plantations.

#### Horacio López Carvajal: Fund Leader

Horacio López Carvajal is a distinguished expert in agricultural investments, with a successful history of managing mod
