Name: Projet PDACG Guinée
Description:
Le potentiel agricole considérable du pays est sous-utilisé. Seulement 25 pour cent des terres agricoles sont cultivées. Seuls 32 000 ha ont été aménagés pour un potentiel de 360 000 ha de terres irrigables (soit moins de 10%). L'importance des cultures commerciales dans le PIB agricole reste toutefois négligeable et les exportations sont faibles malgré les potentialités agroécologiques et les opportunités de marché.

Le Projet de Développement de l’Agriculture Commerciale (PDAC) est l’une de ces interventions et fait également partie du soutien du Groupe de la Banque Mondiale à la stratégie à moyen terme du Gouvernement guinéen pour faire face aux impacts du COVID-19, en particulier ses composantes sur la relance économique et la résilience aux chocs. 

L'objectif de développement du projet est d'accroître les investissements privés dans les chaînes de valeur agricoles inclusives dans les zones du programme. Sur sa période de mise en œuvre, le programme devrait (1) augmenter les investissements privés dans l'agriculture de 150 millions de dollars US et (2) créer 24 000 emplois le long des chaines de valeur de l’agriculture commerciale.
A ce titre, la mise en œuvre de ce projet devra contribuer au programme de développement économique et agricole de la Guinée et favoriser la réduction de la pauvreté telle que définie dans le PNDES et le PASANDAD. Le programme aura de forts impacts de développement et d’amélioration des conditions sociales et économiques dans les zones ciblées.

Name: Bourgault Tillage Tools (BTT) UK Ltd
Description:
Canada’s leading wearing parts manufacturer, Bourgault Tillage Tools, is investing in UK agriculture by setting up a subsidiary business, BTT UK Ltd, which is based at Peterborough in Cambridgeshire. 
Bourgault Tillage Tools are not new to UK agriculture, as their products have been purchased by British farmers for many years. However having a UK operation takes the offering of a complete range of Bourgault Tillage Tools to a whole new level, explains Ian Clayton-Bailey, Managing Director of BTT UK. Bourgault Tillage Tools actually having a business and site in the UK offers many benefits to UK farmers. One of the major advantages from this investment is to have a comprehensive stock holding in the UK so it is available where and when it is needed. This ensures prompt and cost-effective supply of products 7 days a week at peak operating times. Bourgault Tillage Tools recognised that wearing parts located in Canada or crossing the Atlantic, is no good, when a UK customer needs the product and work flow timings and weather windows are a major factor in having a successful drilling period. 
Bourgault Tillage Tools have been delivering quality, innovative ground engaging tools to agriculture worldwide for 50 years and the company is still owned by its founder, Joseph Bourgault. The company’s longevity and success is down to a few key elements says Ryan Olson, General Manager of Bourgault Tillage Tools in Canada. “At Bourgault Tillage Tools we pride ourselves on delivering high quality, innovative ground engaging products that offer value for money, whilst ensuring our customers are always put first when it comes to service and knowledge transfer.“ 
UK farmers may know Bourgault Tillage Tools because of the VOS (Versatile Opener System) seeding products that are becoming very popular with min and no till operations, as well as the quick-change Speed-Loc system as used by some UK OEM’s amongst others. A Dallas Autonomus está trazendo uma nova era para a agricultura global, onde o céu é o novo campo de avanços extraordinários. Conecte-se conosco nesta jornada transformadora, onde cada voo é um passo rumo a uma agricultura mais inteligente e conectada.

Name: Sabar Farm Harvesting Care LLP
Description:
Founded in October 2024, Sabar Farm Harvesting Care LLP is built on the core philosophy of “Farming to Direct Serve”—bringing 100% pure, chemical-free, and sustainably cultivated herbal products directly from our farm to consumers. Our vision is to revive traditional farming practices while integrating modern branding and distribution strategies to create a trustworthy and transparent supply chain.

Our Brands & Offerings

We have introduced two premium herbal brands that stand for purity, authenticity, and sustainability:

 Vruksh Veda – A brand dedicated to herbal powders made from carefully cultivated medicinal plants and herbs. Each product is processed naturally, without any additives, fillers, or chemicals.

 Twist Tingle – A brand focused on natural mouth fresheners crafted from farm-fresh ingredients, delivering an unmatched blend of freshness and health benefits.

We ensure that all our products are sourced directly from our own farms and partner growers, maintaining full control over quality, purity, and sustainability.

Own Farming & Sustainable Practices

At Sabar Farm, we follow a farm-to-product approach, growing a variety of herbs and organic vegetables using traditional and scientific techniques. Our agricultural methods emphasize:

Organic Cultivation – No use of synthetic fertilizers, pesticides, or harmful chemicals.

Soil Health & Sustainability – Natural composting and crop rotation to maintain soil fertility.

Direct Farm-to-Consumer Model – Eliminating middlemen to ensure fresh, affordable, and unadulterated products reach customers.


Innovation in Branding & Marketing

Our marketing strategies focus on:

E-commerce & D2C Growth – Selling through digital platforms, reaching global consumers.

Customer Education – Raising awareness about the benefits of pure herbal products.

Sustainable Packaging – Eco-friendly, biodegradable packaging to reduce environmental impact.


With a commitment to purity, quality, and sustainability.

Non loin de la frontière Togo-Bénin et bercé par le fleuve Mono, le village de Togbehoue est l'endroit idéale pour la plantation de maïs, tomate et de manioc. 
Pour se faire, un travail considérable a été réalisé par notre équipe sur place afin de rendre ces hectares cultivables et commencer les premières plantations. 

Persuadés que ce modèle d'agriculture peut être bénéfique tant pour les locaux que pour l'économie béninoise, la SCA de Togbehoue a pour objectif de collaborer avec des professionnels de l'hôtellerie ainsi que du commerce de gros et de détail. 

Un réel challenge et une magnifique aventure familiale qui commence.

Name: Cuprina Pollination Services
Description:
Insects play a vital role in agriculture, aiding the pollination of crops so that they produce fruit and vegetables. CEA facilities typically conduct artificial pollination by hand, using fans, or even robotics to carry pollen flower to flower. We believe, and science tells us, that nature’s own method works best: insects.

Cuprina Pollination Services seeks to develop products and solutions that work with nature, not against it, to produce the best crop results for farmers and growers. Using proprietary technology, we are creating an integrated solution that will enable farmers to conduct on-demand insect pollination, from the release of insects when conditions are optimal, to monitoring pollination rates and finally recapturing insects when their work is done.

The aim of the companies belonging to the Agrone group is to farm the fields and grasslands of Estonia and to produce foodstuffs, ensuring the preservation of soil fertility and reducing the negative environmental effects of farming.

We are mainly active southern-Estonia, where our six production companies' produce raw milk, cereals, beef and eggs. Agrone farms approximately 13 000 hectares of crop- and grasslands, where we produce wheat, rye, oat, rapeseed and maize. Agrone annual harvest of cereals is around 30 000 tons. Our number of total herd of animals is around 9 400 and we produce annually 60 000 tons of elite category raw milk.  

We currently employ approximately 250 industrious, hardworking and cheerful people. We are one of the largest food producers in Estonia and have an important role in supplying foodstuffs and providing food security.

Name: European Milk Recording (EMR)
Description:
European Milk Recording (EMR) is a European Economic Interest Group created in 2015, following the Interreg NWE project OptiMIR.

During this project, the partners wanted to share spectral data to produce common FT-MIR prediction models, but faced the problem that these spectral data were not harmonized between partners. Indeed, the spectral data came from different laboratories, which used different brands of spectrometers and different analysis models. Data sharing was therefore not possible as such, without considering a first step of standardisation of the spectral data.

The Walloon Agricultural Research Centre (CRA-W) developed a method of standardisation thanks to the expertise of Clément Grelet and other scientific collaborators. At the end of the OptiMIR project, the partners decided to create the EMR group to spread this new standardisation solution amongst members and beyond.

Originally, the standardisation service was only available for our members, we then started to have new clients, and finally, in 2019, we launched our prediction webservice. This method now allows anyone to access high quality spectral predictions for management or breeding purposes.

World-class quality

We have also achieved the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) 9001 certification that proves our quality management system is world-class, our products comply with consumer and regulatory standards and Sentek is a brand you can trust.

Become a Dealer

Learn how you can connect farmers, researchers and engineers to Sentek soil moisture monitoring technologies and how we help you develop the skills to distribute our products and offer quality advice.

We provide comprehensive support to farmers and businesses, ensuring Africa’s most resilient and nutritious food and fibre can thrive commercially.

1. Research & Trials: Utilizing on-farm trials and data-driven optimization to enhance indigenous crop varieties (e.g., sorghum, amaranth, African nightshade).

Description:
As the name implies, Precision Agriculture is a strategic, targeted approach to farming. It is based on the fact that no two fields are alike. Soil and fertility factors can vary dramatically. Even within a single field.
It begins by collecting and analyzing readily available information on your fields in order to devise a Precision Agriculture strategy tailored to you. Factors we look for include:
- Soil Type (texture, moisture, salinity)
- Elevation/ Topography
- pH Levels (acidity)
- Organic Matter
- Drainage
- Seed Varieties
- Plant Population
- No-till vs. Tillage
- Crop Rotation
- Insect/Weed Pressure

Name: FeedXchange
Description:
About Us:

FeedXchange is revolutionizing the agricultural supply chain. We're on a mission to bring transparency, efficiency, and profitability to the livestock and feed industry.

Who We Are:

At FeedXchange, we're more than just a technology company; we're farmers, innovators, and industry experts passionate about reshaping how feed ingredients are bought and sold. Our diverse team brings decades of experience in agriculture, technology, logistics, and finance, making us uniquely qualified to address the challenges facing our industry.

Our Vision:

We envision a future where farmers and livestock producers have easy access to real-time pricing and a vast marketplace of high-quality feed ingredients. With FeedXchange, they can make informed purchasing decisions, optimize their operations, and secure the best prices for their livestock.

What We Do:

FeedXchange provides an online platform that connects buyers and sellers of feed ingredients. Our user-friendly platform offers transparency in pricing, access to a wide range of feed commodities and byproducts, and market intelligence tools that empower our users.

Why Choose FeedXchange:

Transparency: We believe in open and transparent markets. Our platform provides real-time pricing and historical data, so our users can make informed decisions.

Efficiency: Our technology streamlines the buying and selling process, reducing the time and effort required to procure feed ingredients.

Expertise: Our team combines deep agricultural knowledge with technological expertise to provide a platform tailored to the needs of the industry.

Join Us in Transforming Agriculture:

We invite you to connect with FeedXchange on LinkedIn to stay updated on industry news, agricultural insights, and the latest developments in our platform. Together, we're shaping the future of agriculture.

Visit our website FeedXchange.com to learn more about FeedXchange and how we're making a difference in the world of agriculture.

Tuberosum Technologies Inc is an innovative potato research and development company dedicated to improving the efficiency and sustainability of potato production. In addition to its own breeding program in Canada, Tuberosum has contracted exclusive breeding programs with private breeders in the Netherlands and Chile to generate new and improved genetics for emerging and innovative potato markets.

Our world is ever changing. Tuberosum is aware of the strains of farming can have on our ecology. With this in mind, Tuberosum’s primary focus is to create more resilient crop with higher yields, more nutrients, and more resistant to abiotic stresses. Achieving potato varieties with these qualities will lessen the strain potato production has on the grower and the environment. Using traditional breeding methods, Tuberosum’s mandate is to help feed the world better.

Inspired by the rich nutritional benefits of finger millet, we embarked on a mission to introduce millet-based products to the global market, focusing on finger millet due to its unique health benefits and versatility in cooking applications.
At Millet Shakti processing unit, we believe in the power of millet to provide a complete dietary intake with Protein and Minerals. Our products are accurately crafted using the finest finger millet. Our product line is designed to cater to a wide array of dietary preferences and lifestyles.
We promote millets as a healthy and sustainable choice, emphasizing benefits for consumers, farmers, and the planet. The campaign highlights the impactful act of incorporating millet into diets, creating consumer demand that supports farmers and encourages the cultivation of carbon-efficient millet crops.
Our strategic focus is on expanding our export operations and online sales, making our products accessible to consumers worldwide. 

#MilletShakti #FingerMillet #ReadyToCook #ReadyToEat #HealthyLiving #SustainableFuture

Name: BeeSync
Description:
BeeSync is an Armenian innovation company developing next-generation AI-powered smart hive technology to protect pollinators, boost honey production, and support sustainable agriculture globally.

Bees play an essential role in our food system — pollinating more than 75% of crops. Yet hive losses continue to rise due to disease, climate change, pesticides, and invasive species. We believe technology can change that.

Our advanced IoT sensors, computer vision, and AI models continuously monitor hive health indicators including temperature, humidity, bee activity, acoustic patterns, weight, queen performance, and disease risk. BeeSync gives beekeepers and farmers real-time visibility into colony conditions — anytime, anywhere.

With early warning alerts, predictive analytics, and actionable insights, BeeSync helps prevent colony loss, increase yields by 20–30%, and reduce operational costs. Whether you manage 10 hives or 10,000, our scalable platform adapts to every beekeeper’s needs.

Our Impact
Protect pollinators and biodiversity
Enable climate-resilient food production
Empower youth and women in rural communities
Strengthen economic growth through modern beekeeping
Reduce environmental pressure through smarter practices

Our Solution
Smart Hives with AI analytics
Web & Mobile management dashboard
Predictive disease and queen monitoring
Theft alerts and GPS tracking
Remote control & future automation

At BeeSync, we believe technology must serve nature. Our mission is to ensure bees thrive — for the sake of our farmers, our food supply, and the future of our planet.

Join us in building a world where innovation protects life.
Together, we can transform beekeeping and secure a healthier future for all.

Name: KhetAgro Innovations Private Limited
Description:
At KhetAgro, we don’t just sell food.

We honour the hands that grow it, protect the land that nurtures it, and build trust with every customer who chooses it.

We are a new-generation Indian food brand born out of anguish - and built with purpose.

Our story begins in the heartlands of India, where smallholder farmers, especially women, have cultivated nutrient-rich food for generations. But somewhere along the way, this sacred bond between the farm and the fork was broken. Middlemen flourished. Farmers suffered. And consumers, unknowingly, began eating food laced with chemicals, additives, and false promises.

We decided enough was enough.

Truth You Can Taste

We created KhetAgro with one core belief: food must be honest.

This means:
* Zero Adulteration: Every batch is lab-tested by third-party NABL-certified labs.
* 100% Traceable: Know your farmer. Know your food. We source directly from our trusted partner farms.
* GMO-Free, Unbleached, Virgin, and Unprocessed: The way nature intended.
* Ground-to-Order: Especially for spices and flours, we grind only what you buy - no old, rancid stock.

We don’t just call ourselves “natural” or “organic” - we prove it, and we go beyond what regulations require.

Name: Agroclimático
Description:
Overview de Agroclimático

Agroclimático es un evento único diseñado para abordar el impacto del cambio climático en la agricultura de América Latina. Reúne a productores, científicos, asesores, empresas, y tomadores de decisiones para colaborar en la búsqueda de soluciones innovadoras y prácticas que mitiguen el estrés climático en los cultivos.

El evento ofrece un espacio integral donde los participantes pueden aprender de expertos internacionales, explorar tecnologías avanzadas, y participar en talleres prácticos que conectan la teoría con las necesidades reales del campo. Además, fomenta la colaboración entre diversos actores del sector para promover una agricultura más resiliente, sostenible y productiva.

Con un enfoque en herramientas tecnológicas, bioestimulantes, microorganismos y estrategias de manejo agronómico, Agroclimático no solo busca enfrentar los retos actuales, sino transformar estos desafíos en oportunidades para garantizar la seguridad alimentaria y fortalecer la economía rural. Este es un espacio para construir el futuro del agro con innovación y acción colectiva.

Description:
Siyoyisile Indlala Community Farm and Projects seeks to establish a comprehensive organic farming venture focused on producing organic pesticides, fertilizers, compost, seedlings, and a range of organic vegetables and herbs. Additionally, we aim to engage in agro-processing and food 
preservation initiatives while providing training programs tailored for children, youth, adults, and the elderly. By implementing sustainable practices and promoting education in organic farming, we are committed to contributing to both community wellbeing and environmental health. Business Objectives 
 
1. Production of Organic Products: To establish a production line for creating organic pesticides, fertilizers, compost, organic seedlings, vegetables, and herbs that meet high standards of quality. 
2. Agro-Processing: To develop a process for preserving our organic produce and creating value-added products, including pickles, jams, and dried herbs. 
3. Educational Programs: To design and implement training sessions for various age groups, instilling knowledge of organic farming practices and healthy food choices. 
4. Sustainable Rabbit Farming: To incorporate rabbit farming as an additional protein source and an educational component of our training programs.

The establishment of Siyoyisile Indlala Community Farm and Projects represents a unique opportunity to contribute to the growth of sustainable agriculture while fostering community education and empowerment. By investing in organic production, agro-processing, and training, we aim to create a positive impact on health, the environment, and local economies. We invite you to join us in this venture, facilitating a future where organic farming flourishes, knowledge spreads, and communities thrive.

Name: Sea Vegetable Company
Description:
Sea Vegetable was founded in 2016 with a vision of creating a business in aquaculture that actively incorporates local communities, empowering people within these communities to support their local environment. 
The business model we currently employ was at the time the world’s first to successfully cultivate seaweed on land using underground seawater. The foundation of our company begins by extracting seeds of mother algae from various coastal regions of Japan. We then carefully nurture them through infancy to eventually cultivate them using mineral-rich underground seawater in our land-based farming facilities. We have also since developed techniques in environmentally-friendly open-sea cultivation, where we collaborate with local fishermen all over Japan.

Name: Agrinext Consultancy
Description:
Services :-
1. Irrigation Design and DPR
We deliver precise and customized irrigation designs for farms, institutions, and government projects. Our DPR services include GPS Survey, Hydraulic Design, Crop-Water Requirement analysis and Cost Estimation. With GIS-based mapping and GPS survey integration, we ensure technically sound and economically feasible irrigation solutions for sustainable water use.

2.	Project Monitoring and Evaluation
Agrinext offers Monitoring and Evaluation (M&E) frameworks for Agriculture and Irrigation Projects. Our team conducts periodic field assessments, performance tracking and impact evaluations to ensure projects achieve their intended outcomes. We provide data-driven insights and recommendations to enhance project effectiveness and accountability.

3. Agriculture Technical Trainings
We conduct professional and practical training programs in Irrigation Design, Modern Agricultural Technologies and Skill & Entrepreneurship Development programs. Our hands-on training modules are designed for students, farmers, government officers, and industry professionals—bridging the gap between Academic Knowledge and Field Applications.

4. Implementation of Solar Powered Irrigation Systems
We promote sustainable farming by designing and implementing solar-powered irrigation solutions that reduce dependency on conventional energy sources. Our expertise covers system sizing, design integration with existing irrigation networks, and on-ground implementation support, enabling farmers to achieve cost-effective and eco-friendly irrigation practices.

5. Feasibility Studies and Assessment
Agrinext conducts detailed feasibility studies to assess the technical, financial, and environmental viability of agricultural and irrigation projects. Our team evaluates site conditions, resource availability, and community needs to provide actionable reports that guide informed decision-making and successful project execution.

Name: Higher Ground Plant Consulting
Description:
About Us
Welcome to our agricultural consulting firm, where innovation meets science to cultivate sustainable solutions for the future of agriculture. Our team of experts is committed to advancing the field through a wide range of specialized services, ensuring that our clients achieve optimal results in their agricultural endeavors.

Our Mission:
Our mission is to provide comprehensive, science-driven consulting services that enhance agricultural productivity, sustainability, and compliance. We empower our clients with the knowledge and tools needed to thrive in the ever-evolving agricultural landscape.

Our Services:

Experimental Design and Analysis:
We offer meticulous experimental design for field, lab, and bench-scale studies. Our statistical analysis services deliver robust, data-driven insights, while our bio-efficacy testing identifies critical concentration dependencies and thresholds. We conduct both experimental and validation trials to ensure reliability, evaluate stress factors, and perform detailed product stability, toxicology, and mode-of-action studies.

Plant Science and Optimization:
Our expertise in plant physiology and biochemistry focuses on optimizing secondary metabolite production. We provide strategic nutrient analysis and delivery, along with grow room design for controlled environments. Committed to eco-friendly practices, we implement regenerative agricultural methods and offer strategic crop selection to maximize yield and sustainability.

Compliance and Regulatory:
Navigating agricultural regulations is our specialty. We ensure compliance with USDA, EPA, APHIS, FDA, and FSA standards, handle regulatory registrations, and maintain high standards of bio-security and safety. Our services include ISO certification auditing, application submission and licensing for hemp and medical products, and regulatory strategy development. We also interpret Certificates of Analysis (COA) for our clients.

Specialized Services:
Leveraging advanced tech

Name: Farm Automation
Description:
Farm Automation (‘FMA’) focuses on solving agricultural problems through machine learning automation and optimising existing human approaches, which are inefficient in terms of duration and results.

Farm Management’s solution applies patented proprietary software and optimisation of farm management systems using a range of leading-edge technologies.

The result is an innovative, user-friendly system in that the farmer manages critical factors through a simple-to-use mobile application (app), resulting in increased milk production that is reliable and sustainable.

Description:
Tom Farms is a multi-generation, family owned organization firmly planted in fertile prairies of North Indiana. Tom Farms has evolved into a global crop production, sales and service company and industry leader.  Today we are one of the leading suppliers to the DEKALB seed production supply chain.

Agriculture, by nature, is an unpredictable business. Ensuring the shipment of more than 30 million pounds of seed corn, 100 million pounds of corn, and 13 million pounds of soybeans each year requires innovation along with careful planning and quick thinking. Providing our customers with exceptional service is just the way we do business at Tom Farms. We do it by utilizing superior technology, round-the-clock vigilance and flawless execution—to lower costs and increase efficiency, combat weather and disease, and nourish the land—all while maximizing the productive capability of every single acre.
